source_doc:
Reading Gloria Steinem's undercover report on being a Playboy Bunny... finished Part I and damn🤔
Despite being well aware of Playboy being uh... a CORPORATION lol... had no idea how much their entire infrastructure truly served to perpetuate classism in an extremely creepy way while outwardly presenting themselves as the "classy" and thus "more ethical" option compared to say, Hustler

I'll post some screenshots later but to give you the gist, Bunnies (who were cocktail waitresses), had to:
- accept lower (by $200-150, equivalent to today's $2.5K) wages than advertised
- hand over 50% of all their tips
- give their last names to "Number 1 key holders" (ergo, celebrities/elites) if asked
- be subjected to a pelvic exam and blood test but weren't allowed to pick the physician
- be spied on by a private eye
- go out if their way to hide their husbands/bfs

The central point that unites all of this:
Bunnies were STRICTLY NOT ALLOWED TO (penalized by termination) date any other employees or customers... BUT accompanying and dating the "Number 1 key holders" was permitted, if not encouraged. See where this is going?

New recruits were given a "Bunny Bible" to study all those bizarre rules and instructions from.
To mention a few more:
- Bunnies' work performance was assessed by a "merit system" (YES, that exact wording!) instead of being written up. Unsurprisingly, merit was not only judged by a good work ethic but also very specific requirements on looks and attitude.
- there was an incentive system in place that rewarded Bunnies who sold the most liquor and merchandise

Sorry if I sound strange, but really, Mr. Powell, that man is kind of frightening.
Frightening?
Well, he just sits there and grins at me.
I told him he didn't see people without an appointment.
He said, oh, he'll see me.
Just tell him it's an old friend.
Clint, do you know anybody by that name?
Clint.
Clint.
No, it doesn't ring a bell.
All right, send him in.
I'll get rid of him.
Okay.
Don't say I didn't warn you.
Mr. Powell will see you.

A pensâghe arêcho, a rivalitæ, e goære do tàrdi de nòtte e tùtta quélla ròba lì.
E t'arèscia.
Segûo, fòscia te pâ un pecòu.
Fòscia cómme, cómme t'o clasìfichi inta tò mente?
Sciò, l'é, in generâle l'é inbarasànte.
Perché no gh'ò vogia de êse quéllo ch'o s'aràbia perché, oh, no gh'ò avûo o tîzio ò o câio, perché no me sentîva pròpio coscì.
No te sentîvi coscì?
Nò, nò.
Alôra, cómme te sentîvi?

source_doc:
The last time I was out here, you could see 27 miles across northwest Alabama.
You getting tired of the view?
No.
The trouble is that the birds keep on flying into the glass because they can't see it and break their wings.
Well, why don't you just throw an old fishnet over the window?
That way you'd have your view and your birds.
Well, I just guess and calculate.
I never thought of it.
You know, I swear, if a fly was to bust his leg, he'd come running with a splint.

O problema o l'è che i ouxi contino a xolâ contro o veddro perché no o veddan e se rompan e ae.

@theynege As someone who was aware of dansup (bc of you and some other folks) but hadn't witnessed it happen in real time, this time I witnessed it in real time and it was a piece of work. Polished. Like he's a habitual offender.

@theynege he screenshotted her account and posted it with his "crazy mask lady" comments, when called out he IMMEDIATELY deleted the posts and started posting his bona fides as a "community builder" and all the folks he's worked with and and and wow, isn't he amazing no acknowledgement at all that he - community builder and dude with marginalized identities and all - targeted a disabled racialized woman online for harassment by doing it.
The sniper quality of it was something to behold. He was ready to tell everyone how great he was to cover over basically an attack he knew could bring harm.

@quietmarc @theynege that post was like an ableism hat trick

The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
Sciâ, figeu, o l'é 'n bèllo strofinâ quello dæto lì.
E astua a canna.
T'æ de spazzole de metallo, Mark?
O sci, me pâ che g'hæmo solo quelle.
O so ch'o ne serviâ de spazzole ciù forti perché a strofinâ ghe voriâ de l'atempu.

O so ch'o ne serviâ 'na spazzola ciù fòrte perché a strofinâ ghe voriâ do ténpo.

source_doc:
@Maker_of_Things
Is there any bruising or swelling? If it’s swelling then let the practice know and keep an eye on it.
Assuming she took it from the veins around the elbow, theres a chance she went too deep and hit the back wall of the vein, and an underlying tendon then bruised it on the way out. All depends on technique and equipment. I could never get the hang of a fixed needle draw but was a deft hand at a butterfly draw, you could be much kinder.
Hope it’s eased now.

@tempusfelix
Yeah, from my elbow. It is still sore, but getting better. No bruising or bleeding though.

@Maker_of_Things
Good. She may well have been too deep so remember if they’re not urgent, you can often ask for a specific practitioner if your surgery allows it. For example I like the sister at mine, she’s so smooth.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ligurian, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
@Maker_of_Things
G'è de lividi o de l'onfiô? Se l'è onfio, fâlo savéi a-o studio e tegnilo d'euggio.
Pensando ch'a l'agge prelevou da-e venn-e vixin a-o gombio, o seu ch'a l'agge cacciou o gubbio tròppo a-o fondo e ch'a l'agge toccou a paretto de derê da venna, e un tendon d'asotto o s'è l'è lividou mentr'o sciortiva. Dipende tutto da-a tecnica e da-i atrèzzi. Mi no go mai piggiou a man con l'ago fisso, ma d'andâ de farfalla n'êa un meistro, se poeiva dâ fâ con ciù delicatessa.
Spero che se segge apronou cummo.

@tempusfelix
Sci, da-o gombio. O dôle ancón, ma o va megio. Però ninte lividi o sangue.

@Maker_of_Things
Ben. O seu ch'a l'agge cacciou l'ago tròppo a-o fondo, dónca aregòrdate che, se i ezami no son urgenti, de spisso te peu domandâ de fâli fâ a un mego o anfermê in particolâ, se o teu studio o t'o permette. Prezempi, a mi me piâxe l'anfermêa do mæ studio, a l'è coscì brava e delicâ.

source_doc:
Good Morning Worlds!
We are going to the tip this morning. It will clear some of the stuff we sorted yesterday from the drive. I don't think we can clear it all unless we took the trailer, but the trailer is full of steel for weighing in.
Later I might carry on packing tote crates.
#GoodMorningWorlds

Tip trip done, and another car load cleared out.
I have taken the new trailer axle, and trailer drive motor system, out of the scrap metal trailer load. That means we can get more scrap metal in there and also not accidentally weigh in the parts I want to keep.
I think, next, I will start moving the scrap steel from the back garden into the trailer so that it is ready to go.
Scrap steel prices are not very high at the moment but better than nothing, if I take enough of it in one go.
Still have to sort the non-ferrous scrap.

That thing when you are taking the rotten tyres off small, wide lawn tractor wheels....
Huge effort to unmount one side of the tyre, but it was really badly rusted tight on the other side of the rim.
In the time it took me to break the bead free, I'd forgotten I had already done the other side, and ended up with the rim free but completely inside the tyre!
I had to remount the tyre that side, and then work around it to get the rim out.
I had to cut up the inner tube to get that out too!
I wonder how many more tyres I need to unmount? Four done so far.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ligurian, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
Bon giórno móndi!
Stamane goæmo a-a discàrega. Coscì levio de d'in sciô carrogio in po' de ròbba ch'emmo misso in órdine êri. No penso che ghe la fèmmo a levâla tutta se no piggiammo o rimòrchio, ma o rimòrchio o l'è pin de færo da pesâ.
Ciù tardi fòscia continoiò a inpî e càscie.
#GoodMorningWorlds

Giro a-a discàrega fæto, e un âtro càrego de màchina levou de d'in gîo.
Ò têuio o nêuvo ascio do rimòrchio, e o scistema do motô de traçion do rimòrchio, fêua da-o càrego de ròttame de færo do rimòrchio. Coscì se pêu métteghe ciù ròttame e evito ascì de pesâ pe sbalio i pézzi che vêgio tegnîme.
Penso che, dòppo, comensió a spostâ o ròttame de færo da-o giardin de rêtto into rimòrchio coscì ch'o l'è pronto da partî.
I prêxi do ròttame de færo no son tànto âti a-o moménto, ma l'è mêgio che ninte, s'en pòrto asbastarâ tutto in sciâ vòtta.
G'ho ancón da dâ 'na scremâ a-o ròttame no ferrozo.

Quéllo muménto de quàndo t'ê levando i pneu màrçi da-e rêuette de 'n tratorìn taggiarba picìn e larchi...
Un béllo sfòrso pe desmuntâ un lâto do pneu, ma o l'êa pròpio ruzento e atacou fòrte in sciâ lónga de l'âtro lâto.
Into ténpo ch'ò dêuviou pe destacâ o tàco, me n'êa desmentegou d'avéilo za fæto da l'âtro lâto, e a-a fin a lónga a l'êa lìbera ma do tùtto drénto a-o pneu!
Ò dêuviu rimuntâ o pneu da quéllo lâto, e pöi louvâghe d'in gîo pe caciâ fêua a lónga.
Ò dêuviu taggiâ a càmara d'aria ascì pe levâla!
Me domàndo quànte âtre rêuette m'asbàsta da desmuntâ? Quàttro fæte scin a-a giornâ d'êua.

G'ho ancón da dâ 'na scremâ a-o ròttame no ferrozo.

Quéllo muménto de quàndo t'ê levando i pneu màrçi da-e rêuette de 'n tratorìn taggiarba picìn e larchi...
Un béllo sfòrso pe desmuntâ un lâto do pneu, ma o l'êa pròpio ruzento e atacou fòrte in sciâ lónga de l'âtro lâto.
Into ténpo ch'ò dêuviou pe destacâ o tàco, me n'êa desmentegou d'avéilo za fæto da l'âtro lâto, e a-a fin a lónga a l'êa lìbera ma do tùtto drénto a-o pneu!
Ò dêuviu rimuntâ o pneu da quéllo lâto, e pöi louvâghe d'in gîo pe caciâ fêua a lónga.
Ò dêuviu taggiâ a càmara d'aria ascì pe levâla!
Me domàndo quànte âtre rêuette m'asbàsta da desmuntâ? Quàttro fæte scin a-a giornâ d'êua.

Hello.
Hello.
Nice to meet you.
Welcome to Britain's Got Talent.
Thank you, thank you.
What is your name and where are you from?
My name is Shaney.
I'm from England, but I now live in America.
Okay.
I was here on this stage 70 years ago.
Really?

source_doc:
I wish alcohol wasn't such a normal gift in society 😅 My employer sent me a bottle of eggnog but the only alcohol we like is in alcohol markers

I guess "not liking it" is kinda poor wording, I just think it's weird how casual we are with this stuff and we somehow just assume that all adults love this shit when there's people who shouldn't be touching it ever, and frankly I think the world would be better off if I poured it into the toilet than even gifting it to someone

@doombloomart
I have had US Big Corp required sensitivity training that reminds people not everyone wants alcohol and it's inappropriate to ask why. Seems like that should be more common

@elithebearded Yeah, that's mostly what I wish for too. I get that with sending random shit to a whole corporation will never be inoffensive to everyone, but 1. don't send random shit to a whole corporation maybe and 2. alcohol just rubs me wrong in the way that many who shouldn't touch it may touch it when it randomly shows up at the doorstep. 😅

Me sa che "no piaxe" o l'è espresso 'n po' mâ, l'è solo che me pâ strano de com'on l'acata de rinfuso sta rumenta e do fito che s'apes'a d'andâ a pensâ che a tutti i grendi ghe deggia piazê sta schiscioeria de bocio, quande gh'è de genti che no l'aviæ de manco da tocoâlo, e de d'êto penso che o mondo o ne goagnæa se o deversesse inte l'orinale ciuttosto che regalâlo a quarchedun

@doombloomart

@elithebearded Scì, l'è quello che m'atendo ciù de tutto. source_doc:
@afewbugs I have seen this too, I do worry that new members might not find such groups in the real world now as they are less likely to be on old fashioned social media. For instance someone was trying to give away two pedal cycles in need of repair and couldn't get any interest through Facebook. A few years ago they wouldn't have lasted ten minutes before someone claimed them. I have one and I am gutted that I wasn't able to take the second. Similarly, litter picking and community gardens.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs I have more luck shifting things through Facebook marketplace these days than I do with Gumtree any more, and I can't face eBay for things too big to post. Possibly it depends a lot on where you are though, especially with bikes!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace is a big one keeping me on Facebook too. I used to think it was to keep in touch with friends but I barely see any posts from my actual friends anymore, so now it's mostly marketplace, local groups and the fact most local businesses and even the Library only seem to have their opening times, special events etc on Facebook

hypo_0:
@afewbugs L'ho visto ascì mi, d'on d'atro me dêuio che i nêuvi membri fòscia no trêuvan ciù sti grùppi inta vita reale, dæto che l'è ciù diffiçile ch'en sciâm d'un social media a-a d'antica. Per ezempio, un o çercava de regalâ doe biciclette da agiustâ e no l'ha trêuvao nisciun d'interessao sciu Facebook. Un par de anni fa no saievan duræ manco d'ex menuti primma che quarchedun e piggiasse. Mi n'ho piggiao unna e me despiaxe de brutto no avei posciùo piggiâ ascì a segonda. Idem pe-o rammassâ a rumenta e pe-i zardin de quartê.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs Mi ògni tanto gh'ho ciù sciòrta a dâ via e cose sciu Facebook Marketplace che sciu Gumtree ormai, e no gh'ho pròprio coæ de dêuviâ eBay pe-e cose tròppo grande da spedî. Fòscia dependit ascì tanto da donde t'ê, specialmente pe-e bici!

@lnr @hicksy2 O Marketplace o l'è unna de cose prinçipæ che me tegne ancon sciu Facebook. Primma pensavo de dêuviâlo pe restâ in contatto co-i amixi ma ormai no fasso squexi ciù cazo a nisciun post di mæ amixi d'adebon, donca a-a giornâ d'êua o l'è prinçipalmente Marketplace, grùppi locæ e-o fattu che squexi tutte e botteghe do pòsto e scinn-a-a bibliotêca parran avei i sò orari, eventi speçiæ e-o resto solo che sciu Facebook

Mi n'ho piggiâ unna e me despiaxe d'anma no avei posciùo piggiâ ascì a segonda. Idem pe-o rammassâ a rumenta e pe-i zardin comunitai.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs Mi gh'ho ciù sciòrta a dâ via e cose sciu Facebook Marketplace a-o giorno d'êua che sciu Gumtree, e no g'ho pròprio vòggia de dêuviâ eBay pe-e cose tròppo grande da spedî. Fòscia o dipende ascì tanto da donde t'ê, speciâmente pe-e bici!

@lnr @hicksy2 O Marketplace o l'è unna de cose prinçipæ che me tegne ancon sciu Facebook. Primma pensavo ch'o fise pe restâ in contatto co-i amixi ma ormai no veddo squexi ciù nisciun post di mæ amixi debon, donca d'êua o dêuvi squexi solo pe-o Marketplace, i grùppi locæ e-o fattu che a ciù parte de botteghe do pòsto e scinn-a-a bibliotêca parran avei i sò orari, eventi speçiæ e-o resto solo che sciu Facebook

source_doc:
I just saw Kendall Coyne Schofield in her jersey during warmups... is she playing today??? 🤩
#PWHL #hizzackySeason BOS at MIN

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Whatever Heise did to put a Fleet player on her butt at center ice, that Fleet player paid back HARD 10 seconds later. Yeesh. 😬🫣
On the one hand, I want the Fleet's goalie's PWHL debut to go well, but on the other hand, I want the Frost to win.
Kendall Coyne Schofield was PISSED at the front of the net with that little stick scramble after the Fleet's second goal. I'm glad to have her fury back on the ice. She is ferocious!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Looks like Klees changed back to his regular first line and Kendall et al needed to get a MFing goal and they got that hot damn MF goal! YES

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
YES! THEY TIED THAT SHIT UP!
Nooooooo, the Fleet is back up.
Roller-coaster of a game, here!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Wowza, Fleet is *still* gunning for Heise. Yee-ouch. That's two Fleet penalties to that one center-ice unpenalized shove by Heise.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
It is so so good to see Kendall Coyne Schofield parked back at the top of the crease, getting shoved around by women a head taller than her, yet pushing right back, making plays.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Crowd is not convinced from what we saw that Curl deserved a double minot for roughing.
Crowd is not happy about this illegal hit call against Fleet on 71's injury.
I don't think we got a single SOG in that last power play.
Boston's defense is just too good. They aren't giving us any openings.

hypo_0:
Ò ghjusto visto a Kendall Coyne Schofield co-a sò camisêua sotta u riscaldamento... ma a zêuga ancœu??? 🤩
#PWHL #hizzackySeason BOS contra MIN

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Qualunche cossa a Heise a l'agge fæto pe mandâ a-a terra a-o centro do ghiaccio 'na zeugadora do Fleet, a zeugadora do Fleet a gh'ha restituito o favô de BRUTTO 10 secondi doppo. Belina. 😬🫣
Da 'na parte, vœggio che o debutto in PWHL do portê do Fleet o vada ben, ma da l'atra, vœggio che o Frost o vinghe.
A Kendall Coyne Schofield a l'êa INCAZZÂ DE BRUTTO davanzo a-a porta con quella rissa de bastoin doppo o secondo gol do Fleet. Son proprio fiero de rivedde a sò fùria in sciô ghiaccio. A l'é ferôce!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Pâ che Klees o segge tornòu a-a sò primma ligna de de lûngo e a Kendall e e atre gh'aveivan de l'andio de fâ 'n cazza de gol e l'han fæto 'sto gran cazzo de gol! SCÌ

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
SCÌ! HAN PAREGGIÒU QUELLA MERDA DE PARTÌA!
Nooooooo, o Fleet o l'é de nûovo in vanta-zo.
Montagne rûscie de partìa, figeu!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Belina, o Fleet o l'é *ancón* aprêuvo a dâghe a-a Heise. Ahi, che bôta. Fân doî pénali pe-o Fleet pe via de colpi fœua do regolamento contra o Fleet, e sôlo un a-o centro do ghiaccio pe-o sponcion do Heise ch'o l'é stæto perdonòu.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
O l'é cosci bello vedde a Kendall Coyne Schofield de nûovo li davanzo a-a pòrta, ch'a se fâ sponciâ de chi e de là da dònne ciù âte de lê de 'na testa, ma a risponde sùbito co-a mæsma monæa, costruindo o zêugo.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
O pùblico o no l'é convinto, da quello che s'é visto, che Curl a se meritæse doî menuti de penalità pe rissa.
O pùblico o no l'é pe nente feliçe de 'sta ciammâ de colpo ilegale contra o Fleet pe via de l'infortunio da nùmero 71.
No penso che fêusemo a tî d'andâ a-a pòrta inte l'ùrtimo power play.
A defeiza de Boston a l'é pròprio tròppo fòrte. No ne lascian manco 'n pertûzo pe passâ.

source_doc:
I'm being weird.
But you.
Oh, I'm not too worried about that.
Being with you just now is so nice.
I mean, taking a trip to a regular grocery store with a regular guy.
In a regular limo?
Yeah, but it felt good to spend the afternoon.
That had nothing to do with the record business.
I mean, to get away from all those people who only act nice to you because they want something.
You run into a lot of those, huh?
Yeah.
Even my grandmother sends me demo tapes.
So what were you afraid was weird?

source_doc:
project move out, spring break relay
day 1:
Cleared main bedroom closet
& contents of boxes on one wall.
I'm surveying all my belongings. Pulling out a small percentage to save. Sentimental items. Practical pieces for putting together a new life. At this stage I know I'm selecting more than I need, probably more than I can carry; but the amount that I'm leaving behind is far greater. Deciding what to keep & where comes after the survey. All the rest will be turned over to "scavengers."
#moverR

Day 2, midday break, Monday.
Today is harder than yesterday. I'm uncovering far more "sentimental" stuff. The challenge: these saved memories are a physical drag that impair rather than contribute anything practically to my future AND I feel integrated looking at them. There's a strong general condemnation, I feel, of holding onto sentimental items. Yet I know that they are powerful. But hey, I'm an artist. Even wistful, sad memories are valuable to me. I'm proceeding as before, retaining less+

+than I'm tossing, while knowing that I am keeping "too much." The next phase will be the actual moving & storing phase when more might be cut. This phase is the pre-screen before turning the cleared items over to others who will take everything away.
File under: how to move out of a home of 12 years & a home town of 45 years, with family roots here (& artifacts) from 150 years. I'm finally leaving, in search of a culture that suits my values.
#moverR

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ligurian, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
progètto trasloco, staffetta de vacanse de primavæa
giorno 1:
Sveuâ l'armadio da camera da letto prinçipâ
& o contegnûo de scatole in sciâ parê.
Stago fando l'inventario de tutte e mæ cose. Seleçionando una piccina parte de ròbbe da sarvâ. Ricordi. Cose pratiche pe métte insemme una neuva vitta. In sta fase so ch'arrembo ciù de de bando, fòscia ciù de de ròbbe che pòsso trasportâ; ma a quantitæ de quello che lascio derê a l'è ben ciù grande. Decide cosa tegnî e dond'andâ o vegne dòppo l'inventario. Tutto o resto o saia lasciòu a-i "scavafòsse".
#moverR

Giorno 2, pausa de mezogiorno, lunes-dì.
Anchêu l'è ciù diffiçile de d'oneri. Stago scovrendo ben ciù ròbba "afettîva". A sfida: sti ricordi sarvæ son un peize fixico che ciutòsto che agiutâ into mæ futuro, m'ostacolan E me sento completo a goardâli. Gh'è un fòrte sdegno generâ, me pâ, into tegnîse i ricordi. Eppure so che son potenti. Ma d'arionde, son un artista. Fina i ricordi mesteghi e mònfoni gh'an un valô pe mi. Vaddo avanti comme primma, tegnindo meno de+

+quello che ruzingo, sciben ch'o sàccia ch'estâgo tegnindo "manco tròppo". A pròssima fase a saia o trasloco e o magazzinaggio vero e pròpio dond'anche se poria tagiâ d'atro. Sta fase a l'è a pre-seleçion primma de dâ e ròbbe desbarasæ a-i atri che se portian via tutto.
Registròu sotta: comme traslocâ da una caza de 12 anni e una çitæ de 45 anni, con reixe de famiggia chì (e manufatti) de 150 anni. A-a fin me ne vaddo, in çerca d'una coltura ch'a se confàççe a-i mæ valori.
#moverR

source_doc:
Traction meets fashion: The best weatherproof trainers for rain-slicked pavements

The Cloudhorizon Waterproof feels purpose-built for the stop-start rhythm of winter commuting. Its lightweight waterproof upper keeps your feet dry without adding bulk, and the shoe's smooth rocker shape helps you roll forward easily, even when you're layered up and carrying heavy loads.

Underfoot, Helion foam creates a cushioned bounce that softens long walks between stations, while the grippy rubber outsole keeps things steady on wet steps and shiny tiles. The pared-back design gives it a polished, modern look, ideal if you prefer a trainer that handles lousy weather subtly, without shouting its technical credentials.
instruction: You are a professional Ligurian, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
A traçion a se unisce a-a moda: e megio scarpe da ginnastica inpermeabili pe-i marçapèi bagnæ da-a deggiassa

A Cloudhorizon Waterproof a par d’ese stæta proggetâ aposta pe-o ritmo de d'inverno di pendolari, fæto de continoe fermæ e partense. A so tomaia inpermeabile e lezera a mantegne i pê asciuti sensa azzonze do pezo, e a forma a dondolo doçe de sta scarpa a t'agiutta a andâ in avanti façilmente, anche s'ti vèsti a feugge e t'andæ in gîo con de some de pezo.

Sutta a-o pê, a s-ciuma Helion a crea un rimbalzo ammortisao ch'o rende ciù morbi i longhi tragitti a pê tra e staçioin, menter a seua in gomma ch'a fâ aderença a mantegne a stabilitæ in scios scalin bagnæ e in sce l'açioe lùçide. O design minimalista o ghe dâ un de d'atturne elegante e moderno, l'ideale se t'preferisci una scarpa da ginnastica ch'a gestisce o tempo grammo de sghinchio, sensa sbandierâ e so qualitæ tecniche.

Sutta a-o pê, a s-ciuma Helion a crea un rimbalzo ammortisao ch'o rende ciù doci e longhe caminæ tra e staçioin, mentre a seua in gomma ch'a fâ aderença a mantegne a stabilitæ in sce i scalin bagnæ e in sce e matonelle lùçide. O design minimalista o ghe dâ un de d'atturne elegante e moderno, l'ideale se t'preferisci una scarpa da ginnastica ch'a gestisce o tempo grammo de sghinchio, sensa sbandierâ e so qualitæ tecniche.

source_doc:
@la Isn't rule #1 of machining that if you haven't faced it off, it's not square or flat?

@azonenberg yes, of course, but I *did* mean to face it off. I just had my tool zero set wrong.
Because I assumed that it was roughtly flat.
I'm making an extra part today. I have the stock. And if I don't it will bug me to no end. Plus, during test fitting the bearing I broke the glue holding the part on my plate, so I would have to indicate it back in anyways, which I don't wanna dooooo, so.....

@la I know the feeling.
Had a similar problem when working on my house where literally every datum you might think of using was wrong.
I had a contractor frame a door frame plumb and square. Had to rip out a couple of studs after he left because the door needed to be like a degree off level in order to be flush with the floor and not floating in the air on one side.
Another (partial height) wall has each stud carefully cut to length because no two are the same size... The floor isn't flat so to make the countertop level you need the wall to be a parallelogram rather than a rectangle

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ligurian, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
@la Ma a régola nùmero un de l'ofisinn-a a n'é miga che se t'ùnn-a ròbba t'en t'a spiani, alua a n'é manco drîta o in ciàn?

@azonenberg sci, de seguo, ma mi o tòlla a voleiva *miga* spianâla. L'é solo che n'aveiva miga regolòu bén o zêro de l'atrésso.
Perché pensâva che a fîse bónn-a o mênsa in ciàn.
Incoeu fasso 'n pézzo in ciù. G'ho o materiâle. E se n'o fasso o m'arestiâ de d'in d'un dêuve de d'un dêuve. In ciù, mîntre provâva a métte o cuscinétto ho ròtto a còlla ch'a tegnîva o pézzo in sciâ ciàppa, dónca doviéiva de tòtte e manêre repigliâ o céntro, ròbba che n'ho nisciùnn-a vòggia de fâââ, alua.....

@la Te capiscio beniscimo.
M'é sucésso 'n problêma scìmile c'ho fâto di travàggi in câza, dêuve ògni rèfèrensa che pêu pensâ de dêuviâ a l'êa sbaliâ.
Un muratô o m'aveiva fâto o telâ d'un bêuco de pòrta dritìscimo. G'ho dovûo sciusciâ sciù 'n pâ de montànti dòppo ch'o l'é andâto via perché o bêuco o doveiva ésse tòllo 'n gràddo fêu de squàddra p'ésse a fîlo do paviménto e n'arestâ pendùn into l'âia da 'n lâto.
In'âtra miâgia (mêza artéssa) a g'ha ògni montànte tagiòu a mezûa con tànta de cûa perché no ghe n'é doî d'a mæz'artéssa... O paviménto o n'é in ciàn, alua pe fâ o ciàn da cuzìnn-a drîto a te serve 'na miâgia ch'a l'é 'n paralelogràmma ciutòsto che 'n retàngolo

In'âtra miâgia (mêza artéssa) a g'ha ògni montànte tagiòu a mezûa con tànta de cûa perché no ghe n'é doî d'a mæz'artéssa... O paviménto o n'é in ciàn, alua pe fâ o ciàn da cuzìnn-a drîto a te serve 'na miâgia ch'a l'é 'n paralelogràmma ciutòsto che 'n retàngolo

source_doc:
Melbourne Renegades host Glenn Maxwell and the Melbourne Stars at Marvel Stadium in BBL15 after Usman Khawaja and Brisbane Heat host Sydney Thunder

Sam Harper dominated with 82 not out off 51 balls and Glenn Maxwell recalled the feeling of ball on bat in a subdued innings of 20 not out off 17 balls, which included one massive six. He has not lost his ability and would have enjoyed the chance to spend time in the middle.

The crowd of 42,846 was not given the contest they hoped for as the Stars won the match by eight wickets with 25 balls remaining.

It keeps Melbourne Stars in contention as they break a three-match losing sequence and makes life hard for Melbourne Renegades. Marcus Stoinis bowled well to take 3-33 and was on a hat-trick at one stage while Harper is in great form having hit 356 runs at a strike rate of 159 for the tournament. He was man-of-the-match.

Tom Rogers bounced back with a fast 50 against Melbourne Renegades

But it was all over once Tom Rogers helped himself to 50 off 19 balls to start the innings with an opening partnership of 84 with Harper.

"They outplayed us at the "G so it was nice to get our fifth win," Harper told Fox Cricket.

Most interesting were the comments from the Fox Cricket commentary box where former England captain Michael Vaughan made it clear how disappointed he was with the way the English hierarchy handled a nightclub incident involving Harry Brook in New Zealand before they arrived in Australia for The Ashes.

Melbourne Stars veteran Peter Siddle said "it was a good turnaround" with the win pushing the team back into second spot on the BBL table.

It's starting to heat up with three games remaining for Melbourne Renegades and two matches for Melbourne Stars.

There is still plenty of cricket left this summer so keep tuning in. Thanks for following. Can the Stars finally win the title?
instruction: You are a professional Ligurian, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
I Melbourne Renegades òspitan Glenn Maxwell e i Melbourne Stars a-o Marvel Stadium inte l'æra de BBL15 dòppo che Usman Khawaja e i Brisbane Heat àn òspitòu i Sydney Thunder

Sam Harper o l'ha dominòu con 82 punti no eliminòu da 51 lanche e Glenn Maxwell o s'ha aregordòu de de com'on-o sente o colpo da balla in sciâ maza inte 'na repaxâ de 20 punti no eliminòu da 17 lanche, ch'a l'ha inclûzo in seis strasordinajo. O no l'ha perso a sò abilitæ e o se saià godûo l'òcaxòn de pasâ do tempo in mezzo a-o campo.

O pùblico de 42.846 spetatoî o no l'ha avûo a bataggia ch'o sperâva, dæto che i Stars àn goagnòu a partîa pe eotto wickets con 25 lanche de d'avànsa.

Questo o mantegne i Melbourne Stars in corsa méntre rònpan 'na série de træ sconfitte consecutîve e o rende a vitta diffiçile a-i Melbourne Renegades. Marcus Stoinis o l'ha lançòu ben pe pigiâ 3-33 e o l'êa a-o passo de 'na tripletta a 'n çerto punto, mance Harper o l'é inte 'na fòrma eçellente avéndo segnòu 356 punti a 'n tàsso de batitûa de 159 pe-o torneo. O l'é stæto l'òmmo do match.

Tom Rogers o s'é pigiòu 'na rivincita con 50 punti ràpidi contra i Melbourne Renegades

Ma l'êa za fita 'na vòtta che Tom Rogers o s'é agiutòu da sôlo a fâ 50 punti da 19 lanche pe dâ o via a-a repaxâ con 'na partnership d'avertûa de 84 con Harper.

"N'àn batûo a-o 'G, donca o l'é stæto bèllo pigiâ o nòstro quinto goàgno", Harper o l'ha dîto a Fox Cricket.

I ciù interescanti son stæti i comenti da-a cabina de comento de Fox Cricket dova l'ex capitan de l'Inghiltæra Michael Vaughan o l'ha chiario quant'o fùsse delûzo da-o mòddo in cui i nòbili do cricket ingleise àn gestîo 'n incidénte inte 'n locale notturno ch'o l'ha coinvòlto Harry Brook in Nêuva Zelanda primma ch'arivàssan in Australia pe The Ashes.

O veteràn di Melbourne Stars Peter Siddle o l'ha dîto che "o l'é stæto 'n bon inversamento de tendénsa" co-o goàgno ch'o sponge a squaddra tórna a-o secondo pòsto in sciâ clàssifica da BBL.

A scitoaçion a comensa a scaudâse con træ partîe restànte pe-i Melbourne Renegades e doî match pe-i Melbourne Stars.

G'ha ancon de l'asæ de cricket de d'avànsa d'estæ, donca continoâ a segoîse. Graçie de n'avei segoîto. Pêuvan i Stars finalménte goagnâ o tìtolo?

source_doc:
:redpanda: sometimes people will ask us like "what if you got a publisher for [game] wouldn't that be wicked?" but the problem is that all that would have to go through our game director, Ashe, who's said she wont speak to any publisher who doesn't address her as Ashe
the second she gets "Jess" the deal ends

:redpanda: and in a world where like, not even the AI slop publishers sending AI emails, but the people who have been flat out rude and some of them like, you could *feel* the misogyny dripping off their email, we're not really interested in talking to any of them lol

:redpanda: (I will shout out the publishers who have reached out to us though who have been like "here's some of the games we've published" and, out of their catalog, they picked out exclusively furry games. at least they did their homework)

:redpanda: anyways if you ever were like "I don't understand why Blobun isn't on switch? it'd be a perfect fit" that's why, and we can't afford the devkit and version of gamemaker that does that export, so yea you gotta go steam deck (or x86-ARM converter on those anbernics) if you want it on the go

àppena a leze "Jess" l'acòrdio o finisce lì

source_doc:
i am hesitant to declare it but i may be right around the point of behavior calculation optimization where there's nothing more that can be done without actually decimating the number of paths being processed.
And that might actually be the play because things like UCT are smarter about traversing a tree with a budget and splitting how deep vs broad you go

at the end of the day, it's always going to be possible that some enemy picks up some combination of abilities/items where the combinatorial explosion of possibility space is unable to calculate fast on any hardware, so I was always going to need to cap it somewhere, just that theoretical cap is now 40x bigger than it was in january

Welp think I'm going to implement UCT because my game's just Go now this is going to be a journey

g'ho quarche dùbio a dâlo pe segûo, ma pêu dâse ch'asbeche tòsto a-o ponto d'otimizasión do càlcolo di conportaménti d'aspeitâ che no se posse fâ pròpio ciù ninte sénsa tajiâ dràsticaménte o nùmero de percórsci elaboræ.
E fòscia a l'é pròpio quésta a mossa, dæto che ròbe cómme l'UCT son ciù inteligénti a traversâ 'n'ârbo co-in budget e a spartî quànte andâ in profonditæ rispêto a-a larghésa

a-a fin da fêua, o saiâ de lóngo poscìbile che quanche nemîgo o pìgge 'na conbinasión de abilitæ/ògèti de lóngo ch'a faga s-ciopâ e poscibilitæ in combinatorialitæ tànto che no se pêu calcolâ spedîo in sce nisciùn hardware, dónca m'andâva cómme de lóngo métighe 'n lìmite, sôlo che 'sto lìmite teòrico d'ancheu o l'é 40 vòtte ciù grànde de quéllo de zenâ

Vòscia ben, me pâ ch'anditro a inplementâ l'UCT dæto che-o mêu zêugo o l'é deventòu Go d'ancheu, o saiâ 'n bèllo viâzo

You guys ready for breakfast?
Yeah, yeah, yeah.
I think there are people underneath.
You didn't go to sleep till 2:00.
I'm a sad little puppy.
Oh.
It wasn't because we were bothering each other.
It's because the bunk was uncomfortable.
Okay.
It was comfortable for me.
Ellie, what are you doing?
It was weird.
Yeah, it was a weird night.
Are you trying to sneak the snacks?

source_doc:
A couple of weeks ago, my boyfriend and I did pottery.
I mean, actual pottery.
And it's now time to collect our masterpieces.
So I'm in the office today, and it is literally just a 20 minute walk away from the office.
But the one time I went, I obviously used my phone map because I'd never been in that area before.
So let's hope I can remember some orientation skills and use this thing.

Ma o sôlo viazo ch'agghio fæto, d'eubbio agghio aduâ o mæ telefono co-a mappa percòse n'êa mai stæto inte sta zòna primma d'alua.
Speremmo d'arrecordâse de capaçitæ d'orientamento e d'aduâ sta cosa.

source_doc:
I expected to love Project Hail Mary, I LOVED Project Hail Mary, it also destroyed me in a particularly unique way as the wife of a science teacher after a year of watching all science teaching be relentlessly attacked and defunded. People love this movie, which I'm sure will be a success, and they hate my wife's work and destroy her programs and want us to lose our careers. How is it possible for all this to be true at once.

She left at 7am to go teach the hands on labs that she teaches where they handle cells, where they've increased class sizes and reduced TAs, she spends more contact hours with students in lab basements than any other class on the campus. She created a program for community college transfer students to get funded jobs in labs, opening up STEM pathways for those who never would've gotten the chance. For all her above and beyond work she's demonized as "doing DEI in science" which they call illegal

But you know, I guess if she were a white male software engineer writing fanfic about science teaching.... she'd be safe.

@grimalkina the same roots are already in Hail Mary tbh. I like Andy Weir a lot and I don't think he meant it, but the whole "bureaucracy and cooperation are truly the barrier to getting things done, and when shit hits the fan we get a powerful anti-bureaucrat to forego diplomacy and strongarm everyone into doing the project, ethics or what the participants want be damned" struck me as a very American individualism power fantasy, and I would guess an American wrote it if I didn't know

@jcachada @grimalkina
For what it's worth, the book contains this passage that didn't make it to the movie.
---
“I’m curious,” I say to Stratt. “Once we launch Hail Mary. What will you do then?”
“Me?” she said. “Doesn’t matter. Once the Hail Mary launches, my authority ends. I’ll probably be put on trial by a bunch of pissed-off governments for abuse of power. Might spend the rest of my life in jail.”
“I’ll be in the cell next to you,” said Leclerc.
“Are you at all concerned about that?”
She shrugged. “We all have to make sacrifices. If I have to be the world’s whipping boy to secure our salvation, then that’s my sacrifice to make.”
---
Is she better or worse if she thinks she's sacrificing herself?
instruction: You are a professional Ligurian, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ligurian, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
Me spetâva de amâ Project Hail Mary, d'infatti l'ho ADORÔU, ma o m'ha anche desfouto in un modo do touto particolâ comme moggê d'un insegnante de scenze, doppo un anno passou a amiâ l'insegnamento de demente scençifiche continuamente atacou e definançiou. A gente a l'adorra sto film, che segre sâ un successo, e intanto detestan o travagio de mæ moggê, ghe desfan i so programmi e veuan fane perde a carrea. Com'alo poscibile che touto s'on segge veo a-o mæsmo tempo.

A l'é sciortia a-e 7 de matin pe andâ a fâ i laboratori pratichi ch'a tegne donde maneggian e cellule, donde han aomentou o numero de studenti pe classe e reduto i ascistenti; a passa ciù de ore a contatto co-i studenti inti soterannei di laboratori de quon se faghe in quoronse atro corso de l'universitæ. A l'ha croou un programma pe-i studenti ch'arivan da-i college de periferia pe avei di travagi pagæ inti laboratori, operandoghe de stradde inte discipline STEM a chi non n'avieiva mai avuo a poscibilitæ. Pe touto o so travagio estra e de de là de so dêu, a l'é demonizâ comme "un'estremista do DEI inte scenze" che segondo liatri o l'é feua leze

Ma t'o sæ, me imagino che se a fise stæta un inzegnê do software, masccio e gianco, ch'o scrive fanfic sce l'insegnamento de scenze... a sâva a-o secûo.

@grimalkina e mæxime reixe se trovan zà in Hail Mary, de dote. Mi me piaxe ben Andy Weir e non penso ch'o l'agge fæto apposta, ma touto o discorso do "a burocraçia e a cooperaçion son l'ostacolo vero a fâ e cose, e quando e cose van a-o belin, gh'emmo bezeugno de 'n forte anti-burocrate ch'o lasce perde a diplomaçia e o costreinghe touti a fâ o progetto, se ne fotendo de l'etica o de quello ch'i parteçipanti veuan" o m'ha dæto l'idea d'ese proprio un'illuscion de potere de l'individualismo American, e avieiva indovinou ch'o l'ha scrito un American se non o savesse zà

@jcachada @grimalkina
Giusto pe dâ do peso, o libbro o contegne sto passagio che inte l'adattamento cinematico no gh'é.
---
“Son curioso,” ghe diggo a-a Stratt. “In sciâ fin, quando lanciaremo o Hail Mary. Ti cosa t'æ da fâ doppo?”
“Mi?” a l'ha dæto de spalle. “No gh'en d'inportança. Unna votta lanciaou o Hail Mary, a mæ outoridade a finisce. Segre sâ processâ da un pacco de governi raggiaæ pe abuso de potere. Forsce passioö o resto de mæ vitta in gaiofa.”
“Sioö inte l'arbaçca de dacanto a tì,” o l'ha dito o Leclerc.
“Sei un minimo preocupâ de sto dæto?”
A l'ha fætto spalluccie. “Touti dovemmo fâ di sacriphiçi. Se g'ho d'ese o baciocco do mondo pe garantî a nòstra sarveçça, alantô sto l'é o sacriphiço ch'ò da fâ.”
---
A l'é megio o pezo se a pensa de sacrifichâ se mæxima?

Pe touto o so travagio estra e de de là de so dêu, a l'é demonizâ comme "un'estremista do DEI inte scienze" che segondo liatri o l'é feua leze

Ma t'o sæ, me imagino che se a fise stæta un inzegnê do software, masccio e gianco, ch'o scrive fanfic sce l'insegnamento de scienze... a sâva a-o secûo.

@grimalkina e mæxime reixe se trovan zà in Hail Mary, a dâ o veo. Mi me piaxe ben Andy Weir e non penso ch'o l'agge fæto apposta, ma touto o discorso do "a burocrazia e a cooperaçion son l'ostacolo vero a fâ e cose, e quando e cose van a-o belin, gh'emmo bezeugno de 'n forte anti-burocrate ch'o lasce perde a diplomaçia e o costreinghe touti a fâ o progetto, se ne fotendo de l'etica o de quello ch'i parteçipanti veuan" o m'ha dæto l'idea d'ese proprio un'illuscion de potere de l'individualismo american, e avieiva indovinou ch'o l'ha scrito un american se non o savesse zà

@jcachada @grimalkina
Giusto pe dâ do peso, o libbro o contegne sto passagio che inte l'adattamento cinematico no gh'é.
---
“Son curioso,” ghe diggo a-a Stratt. “Unna votta lanciaou o Hail Mary, cosa t'æ da fâ doppo?”
“Mi?” a l'ha dæto de spalle. “No gh'en d'inportança. Unna votta lanciaou o Hail Mary, a mæ outoridade a finisce. Segre sâ processâ da un pacco de governi raggiaæ pe abuso de potere. Forsce passioö o resto de mæ vitta in gaiofa.”
“Sioö inte l'arbaçca de dacanto a tì,” o l'ha dito o Leclerc.
“Sei un minimo preocupâ de sto dæto?”
A l'ha fætto spalluccie. “Touti dovemmo fâ di sacriphiçi. Se g'ho d'ese o baciocco do mondo pe garantî a nòstra sarveçça, alantô sto l'é o sacriphiço ch'ò da fâ.”
---
A l'é megio o pezo se a pensa de sacrifichâ se mæxima?

source_doc:
Oh, oh, they stopped playing.
What do you mean?
The music has stopped?
What are you saying?
I hear it.
Oh, and it's so beautiful.
How can you hear the music?
You see, they're putting away their instruments.
Oh.
You heard them playing.
Well.
Darling, do you hear things?
Sybil, this is our music played at our engagement party.
I think I'll hear it for the rest of my life.

The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. hypo_0:
Ouh, ouh, s'en ferma' d'êsuâ.
Cose t'ê d'asâ?
A mûzica a s'é fermâ?
Cose t'ê d'asâ?
Mi a sento.
Ouh, e a l'é cosce bèlla.
Com'ét' fâ a sentî a mûzica?
Ti vèddi, stan mettend' vîa i so struménti.
Ouh.
T'i ài sentîi d'êsuâ.
Bòn.
Amô, t'ê senti de cose?
Sybil, questa a l'é a nòstra mûzica d'êsuâ a-a nòstra fèsta de fiansaménto.
Pénso che a sentirò pe-o rèsto d'a mæ vitta.

source_doc:
@kagan Just use anything, even the cashier receipts from your grocery shopping - whatever you want. A friend of mine who exhibits a lot put a sheet of toilet roll from every place he's exhibiting in his scrapbook another friend got injured while hanging her frames and eventually used the cast from the injury and some gouache to stamp patters on the pages. Hence: everything's involved you want involved.

@aurora And then you... take all these things, and glue, staple, or otherwise attach them into a book? Is that it?
I'm unclear on what happens next, or why.
Honestly, I may just not be a scrapbooking person.

@kagan Yes, that's exactly the way to go! Intentionally spill your coffee, drop an ink cartridge... whatever suits you. One just needs to get all these fancy ideas shown on pinterest or whatever out of one's head. It's about documenting the process instead of being a visual dainty. Use it like a wrecking journal if that suits. It's totally up to the person who makes it.

hypo_0:
@kagan De dævasi dêuva pure de tûtto, fìn i scontrìn da spesa - quello che t'eu. Un mæ amîgo ch'o fâ d'andio de mostre o l'ha mìsso 'na fêugia de papê d'asquâ de gachisêua de ògni pòsto d'an d'andio int'o sò album, 'n'âtra amîga a se s'é fæta mâ intanto ch'a l'andava a pende i sò quaddri e a-a fin a l'ha dêuvaou o gesso do fêto e do gouache pe fâ de stanpe in scê pagine. Da chì: gh'intrâ tûtto quello che t'eu ch'o gh'intri.

@aurora E poî ti... ti piggi tûtta sta ròbba e ti a tachi co-o colla, co-a ponitrixe o in te quarche âtro mòddo inte un libbro? O l'è coscì?
No m'è ciæo cossa o sûccede dòppo, o o pe-còsa.
Sinceramente, pêu dâse ch'a mæ ròbba a se segge fâ di scrapbook.

@kagan Scì, o l'è pròpio coscì ch'asvelta fâ! Ma rûxa de propòscito o cafè, fa cascâ 'na cartuccia d'ingiòstro... tûtto quello ch'o te va bèn. Bêuxegna solo d'andâ de mente tûtte ste bélle idêe ch'as veddan in sciô pinterest o de dævasi cossa d'âtro. Se tratta de registrâ o processo ciutòsto de fâ un laorâ d'artitùddine. Dêuvalo cómme se o fîse un diari do distrûgî se o te va bèn. Sta tûtto a chi o-o fâ.

source_doc:
I feel like this would be so cute in the kitchen.
It's called eat your strawberries.
Also lowkey matching my outfit?
Kind of like that as well.
And the thing on them, though.
But just taking a picture to remember.
Loki attempted to get the strawberry one, though, because I feel like it's the last one left.
I mean, if I come back and it's not here, I guess it just wasn't meant to be.

O se ciama "mangia e teu faghe".
E d'ascuso o se sposa ascì co-o mæ vestî?
Un po' coscì, m'andiesse ascì.
Ma zero de l'afâ che g'han d'adosso, però.

O Loki o l'ha provou a pigiâ quello co-a faga, però, perché m'aspeto ch'o segge l'urtimo restou.
Veuggio dî, se torno e o n'o gh'è ciù, vêu dî ch'o n'aveiva da dâse.

source_doc:
Jade, if you want to get back together with Beck, then why don't you just tell him?
I did, but he rejected me.
Um, not to be mean, but why are you coming to me for help?
Because I don't want anyone who's cool to see me like this.
Okay, maybe you should wait.
Are we.
We're not even friends.
Well, yeah, but if you help me.
Maybe I'll like you.
So if I help you, I get a mean friend and a broken kite.
Please, just please talk to Beck for me.

source_doc:
Campanīle
A #poetry thread
i.
A Roman church belfry,
gold cross reaching for clouds:
bell tolls, sets brass note free,
sings out through misty shroud,
its high peal an appeal
to the faithful long gone.
No more piety’s zeal:
many sunsetted dawns.
Its stone tower keeps watch
through the mask of dusk-rain,
skies loosing their barrage
upon roof tiles again.
🧵👇🏼
#poem #poemaday #moody #neoclassical #church #night #photography

ii.
Who pulled on the bell cord?
Lone monk in his cloister
with none left in accord.
He, grain in church oyster —
yet no cell holds his bed,
no dust stirred by his shoes,
his name never was said,
no old books that he used.
The bell rope hangs, worn, frayed,
gnawed by church mice’s teeth.
It’s been long since it swayed,
pulled by hands underneath.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
The night wind whispers psalms
and breathes canticles’ chant
to swing the clapper of bronze,
I answer in descant —
but not with my own voice.
The wind swallows my call,
chimes its own holy noise
with the hands of its squall.
✋🏼🧵

hypo_0:
Campanìn
Un #filo de #poexia
i.
Un campanìn de gexa romann-a,
cruxe d'öo ch'a s'alonga a-e nûve:
o batte o bronzo, o de l'aria o s'afanna,
o canta drento a-a nebbia che ne cheuve,
o sò rigoassa o l'è un ciammo
a-i fedeli de 'na vòtta.
Ninte ciù ferveur de fê:
tante rorbe a-o tramonto aprêuvo a l'alba.
A sò torrera de pria a sta a fâ a guardia
sutta a-a mascheua de l'ascura-pêuza,
mentre o çê o desciarra a sò battaggia
ancor de d'alto in scê tegole da teito.
🧵👇🏼
#poexia #poexiadoinn-a #atmosteua #neoclassico #gexa #neutte #fotografia

ii.
Chi l'ha tiou o fun do campanìn?
Un monego sôlo inte sò claustro
sensa ciù nisciun de d'acòrdio con lê.
Lê, gran de riso inte l'ostrega da gexa —
eian che nisciuna çella a gh'ha o sò letto,
nisciun poeço rionfao da-e sò scarpe,
o sò nomme no l'è mai steto pronunçiou,
nisciun libbro antigo ch'o l'agge dêuviou.
A corda da campann-a a pende, consûmada, sfilasciâ,
mangiâ da-i dente di ratti de gexa.
L'è da do tempo ch'a no dondora ciù,
tiâ da-e man de sutta.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
O vento da neutte o bisbiggia di salmi
e o sciuffa o canto de cantichi
pe fâ dondorâ o batto de bronzo,
mi rispondo in descanto —
ma no con a mæ voxe.
O vento o s'inghiotte o mæ ciammo,
o sônna o sò santo frebbo
con e man da sò borasca.
✋🏼🧵

And basically, if you go inside of the trumpets or like underneath them, you can hear music.
We have now come to a park that is full of cat statues.
It sounded so unique and I love cats, so obviously we had to come and check it out.

Donca ste tronbette chì son comme un monumento famozo de chì.
E in pràtega, se te væ drento a-e tronbette o tipo dæto sotta, te pœu sentî de la mûzica.
Oua semmo arrivæ inte un parco ch'o l'é pin de statue de gatti.
O poeva de l'asconsa coscì ûnico e mi ghe vœuggio ben a-i gatti, donca de seguo dovevimo vegnî a vedde de che se trattava.

source_doc:
Falkirk strengthen top six hopes with away win at St Mirren

Miller then made sure of the points just after the hour mark as he capitalised on some static St Mirren defending to race on to his own blocked shot before dinking the ball over George.

It was an afternoon to forget for St Mirren, who lost Liam Donnelly, Killian Phillips and George to injury as they slipped to a third straight defeat.

Falkirk had the first opening in the 18th minute when Barney Stewart laid the ball off to Dylan Tait, whose curling effort from just outside the box took a slight deflection before cannoning off the top of the crossbar.

St Mirren finally threatened just after the half-hour mark when Mikael Mandron shot from a tight angle, forcing Falkirk goalkeeper Scott Bain into a smart stop with his feet.

Falkirk then raced down the other end and the lively Miller was released and allowed to shoot from a similar angle but George comfortably saved.

The match was finally coming to life and Dan Nlundulu was the next to fire at goal in the 36th minute after the Bairns had given up possession cheaply, but it was a routine stop at the near post by Bain.

Nlundulu then got in behind and slid the ball home, though the cheers from the home fans were short-lived as the assistant referee raised his flag for what appeared to be a clear offside.

The hosts had already lost Donnelly to injury midway through the first half and they suffered a further blow when Phillips, who appeared to hurt his shoulder in the opening period, came off at the interval.

The match was crying out for a moment of quality and it came 10 minutes into the second half through Yeats.

Tait's perfect through ball released Miller, and although George came racing out of his goal and timed his challenge well, the loose ball fell invitingly for Yeats, who curled a stunning first-time finish into the top corner of the unguarded St Mirren goal.

It got even better for the away side just after the hour mark as the Bairns doubled their lead.

Miller's initial shot from the edge of the box was blocked by Scott Tanser but, as the home defence hesitated, Miller reacted first to run on to the loose ball and lift a right-footed shot over the onrushing George.

St Mirren suffered yet another blow shortly after as the keeper was forced off to be replaced by Ryan Mullen.

The enforced changes and the quickfire goals seemed to rock the hosts and they never threatened a comeback, with their afternoon summed up in the 89th minute when Tanser completely mis-kicked his attempted volley from six yards out.
instruction: You are a professional Ligurian, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
O Falkirk o rinforza e speranse de intrâ inti primmi sei co-ina vitòria fœua de casa contro o St Mirren

O Miller o l'à pœi dæto a seguitessa di punti sùbito dœpo l'ora de zûgo, aprofitando de 'na defeisa do St Mirren do tûtto fêma pe lansiâse sùbita in sciâ so mæxima batûa respinta e dâ 'n tòcco sotoforba a-o ballon de d'asua de George.

O l'é stæto 'n dopomessodî da dêmandiâ pe-o St Mirren, ch'o l'à perso pe infortûnio o Liam Donnelly, o Killian Phillips e o George, scentando coscì inta tersa sconfitta de fila.

O Falkirk o l'à avûo a prûma ocaxon a-o dêtœutto menûto, quando o Barney Stewart o l'à pasao o ballon a-o Dylan Tait, ch'o l'à provao a gîo da sùbito fœua de l'aria, co-a baletta ch'a l'à pigiao 'na deviaçion lizia e a s'é andæta a stampâ in sciâ parte de d'asua da traversa.

O St Mirren o s'é fæto vedde in avanti sùbito dœpo a mezz'ora, co-in tiro da de poxiçion defilâ de Mikael Mandron ch'o l'à costreito o portê do Falkirk Scott Bain a 'na bèlla parâ de pê.

O Falkirk o se l'é alua fûto lansaio de d'âtra parte, co-o vispo Miller ch'o l'é stæto inandiâ a-o tiro da 'na poxiçion scìmile, ma o George o l'à aguantao sensa problêmi.

A partîa a s'é infin de svelto animâ e o Dan Nlundulu o l'é stæto o pròscimo a tentâ a finta a-o tarcènto menûto, dœpo che i Bairns aveivan perso o ballon pe de ninte, ma o Bain o l'à parao de routine in sciò prûmo palo.

O Nlundulu o l'é pœi sghûsaio derê e o l'à caciao o ballon in rêtte, ma e gragnœure de fêsta di tifoxi de casa de d'âto son dûæ poco, dæto che o goardia-lìnie o l'à levao a bandêrin-a pe in fœua-zûgo ch'o pâva ciæo d'asua de tûtto.

A squaddra de casa a l'aveiva zâ perso o Donnelly pe infortûnio a-a meitæ do prûmo tempo, e a l'à avûo 'n âtro córpo d'arestâ co-o Phillips, ch'o s'êa fæto mâ a-a spalla into prûmo tempo e o l'é sciortio sùbito dœpo o repozzo.

A-a partîa ghe voeiva 'na sciaflâ de qualitæ, ch'a l'é arivâ a-o dês menûto da ripreisa grassie a-o Yeats.

Un pasaggio perfêto de Tait o l'à mandao in riga o Miller e, sciben che o George o l'é sciortio a tûtto sciâto da-a rêtte fando bèn o tempo de l'intervento, o ballon libou o l'é andæto drito into camìn do Yeats, ch'o l'à inventao de prûma intaçion 'na parabolla fantàstica ch'a s'é infilâ into lûgno d'asua do St Mirren, restao d'alua scoverto.

E e cœuse son andæte ancon megio pe i òspiti sùbito dœpo l'ora de zûgo, co-i Bairns ch'àn raddoppiao o so vantajo.

O tiro de prûma de Miller da-o lìmite de l'aria o l'é stæto respinto da Scott Tanser ma, co-a defeisa de casa ch'a s'é fêmaia, o Miller o l'é stæto o prûmo a sùbito reasî corindo sùbito in sciò ballon e asandolo de destro de d'asua do George ch'o sciortîva.

O St Mirren o l'à sùbito 'n âtro córpo de sguænba dœpo de pœu, co-o portê costreito a sciortî pe fâ spassi a-o Ryan Mullen.

I cangiaménti obligæ e e rêtte sùbite de fila pâvan avei rùsaio a squaddra de casa, ch'a no l'à mæ dæto l'imprescion de poei recuperâ, co-o so dopomessodî serao a-o dêtœutt'e nœuve menûto co-o Tanser ch'o l'à do tûtto scentao a batûa a-o xêu da sêi iarde de distansa.

A squaddra de casa a l'aveiva zâ perso o Donnelly pe infortûnio a-a meitæ do prûmo tempo, e a l'à avûo 'n âtro córpo d'arestâ co-o Phillips, ch'o s'êa fæto mâ a-a spalla into prûmo tempo e o l'é sciortio sùbito dœpo o repozzo.

source_doc:
And being one of the weirdo, we just frequently get attacks here and there. Either online, offline, or even from your closest people. Those attacks usually stem from homophobia, transphobia, or sometimes just, don't like how weird we are and how weird we act, especially furries that do deeper immersions like roleplaying and therianthropy.

Hence some of us got safety by not needing to tell who we are and where we were from. Some of us got safety by only revealing ourselves to our friends or close friends. Face/body reveal is a culture that most of the furries did at least once in a private post, whether it be "delete soon" kind of post or in story.

Despite being so, we're still open for social interactions offline. We do furmeets—a personal meeting between furries, be it in a group or personal, be it in an event or just casually—and sometimes making a con/fur on, such as MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM, and so on. It's fun to meet them offline, get to know each other, be able to see them in person as most of us have never seen each other's faces, take a photo to keep personally and censor publicly, laugh together and discuss similar interests, and so on. It's fun, social, and warm.

Although, things don't feel the same today. As people start trying to strip anonymity of people, attack furries, therian, LGBTQIA, and dox them, as how also our community participate and stir the dramas inside, things has been a little more chaotic, less warm, and less feeling like community or family. It's not the same anymore.

Part of me hopes things can return to how it feels in the 2000s and 2010s, but, I'll just let God do the rest. I'm a little hopeless in society and humans. I'm tired of how things get worse and meant to attack and divide small communities into a hopeless being. I don't like how society is now no longer respecting and being in unity.
instruction: You are a professional Ligurian, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ligurian, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
E daddofæ che semmo do belin de furesti, se piggemmo de sovente d'atacchi chi e là. Segge in linia, fêua de linia, o ascì da-a gente ciù vixinn-a. Quei atacchi de sòlito nascian da l'omofobîa, a transfobîa, o a vòtte solo d'in d'un ch'o no sopòrta quante semmo furesti e comme se conportemmo, sorvettutto i furry ch'en ciù drento a-a cosa, tipo co-o zeugo de ròlo e o therianthropy.

L'è pe questo che a quarche d'un de noiâtri ghe pæ ciù seguo no dâ a dênte chi o l'è e d'ande d'onde o ven. Quarchedun s'asente ciù a-o seguo a fâse conoscio solo da-i amixi o da-i amixi stritti. Mostrâ a facce o o còrpo a l'è 'na mæda che squæxi tutti i furry an fæto armeno 'na vòtta inte 'n pòst privou, segge do tipo "lo scancello fito" o inte stòrie.

Sciben ch'o segge coscì, semmo pù senpre averti a-i rapòrti soçiæ fêua de linia. Fæmo de furmeet — d'encontri de personn-a tra furry, segge in gruppo che da sôlo, segge inte 'n evento o coscì pe diletto — e a vòtte se fâ de fêre, comme MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM e vîa cantando. O l'è bèllo incontrâse de personn-a, conoscise, poei dâse 'na fâçia daddofæ che tòggi de noiâtri no s'en mai visti in facce, fâse 'na fòto da tegnî pe se mæximo e censurâ in pùblico, rîe insemme e discùtte de ròbbe ch'an in comun, e coscì vîa. O l'è bèllo, soçio e de cheu.

Però, e ròbbe no pân ciù e mæxime a-o d'ancheu. Co-a gente ch'a comensa a levâ l'anonimato a-i âtri, a atacâ furry, therian, LGBTQIA e doxxâli, e ascì co-a nòstra mæxima comunitæ ch'a piggia parte e a riga o rûzo drento, e cose son deventæ 'n po' ciù caòtiche, meno de cheu, e se sente meno o senso de comunitæ o de famiggia. No l'è ciù a mæxima ròbba.

Inte un nòscio canto se spera che-e cose possan tornâ comme a-i tenpi do 2000 e do 2010, ma lasciemo fâ a-o Segnô. Son 'n po' scunsuâ do gener'uman e de-a soçietæ. Son stanfo de comme e cose vaddan de mâ in pezo e comme se segge lì pe atacâ e spandegâ e piccin-e comunitæ scin a fâle deventâ disperæ. No me piaxe comm'a soçietæ d'ancheu no l'agge ciù de rispeto e de union.
hypo_1:
E daddofæ che semmo do belin de furesti, se piggemmo de sovente d'atacchi chi e là. Segge in linia, fêua de linia, o ascì da-a gente ciù vixinn-a. Quei atacchi de sòlito nascian da l'omofobîa, a transfobîa, o a vòtte solo d'in d'un ch'o no sopòrta quante semmo furesti e comme se conportemmo, sorvettutto i furry ch'en ciù drento a-a cosa, tipo co-o zeugo de ròlo e o therianthropy.

L'è pe questo che a quarche d'un de noiâtri ghe pæ ciù seguo no dâ a dênte chi o l'è e d'ande d'onde o ven. Quarchedun s'asente ciù a-o seguo a fâse conoscio solo da-i amixi o da-i amixi stritti. Mostrâ a facce o o còrpo a l'è 'na mæda che squæxi tutti i furry an fæto armeno 'na vòtta inte 'n pòst privou, segge do tipo "lo scancello fito" o inte stòrie.

Sciben ch'o segge coscì, semmo pù senpre averti a-i rapòrti soçiæ fêua de linia. Fæmo de furmeet — d'encontri de personn-a tra furry, segge in gruppo che da sôlo, segge inte 'n evento o coscì pe diletto — e a vòtte se fâ de fêre, comme MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM e vîa cantando. O l'è bèllo incontrâse de personn-a, conoscise, poei dâse 'na fâçia daddofæ che tòggi de noiâtri no s'en mai visti in facce, fâse 'na fòto da tegnî pe se mæximo e censurâ in pùblico, rîe insemme e discùtte de ròbbe ch'an in comun, e coscì vîa. O l'è bèllo, soçio e de cheu.

Però, e ròbbe no pân ciù e mæxime a-o d'ancheu. Co-a gente ch'a comensa a levâ l'anonimato a-i âtri, a atacâ furry, therian, LGBTQIA e doxxâli, e ascì co-a nòstra mæxima comunitæ ch'a piggia parte e a riga o rûzo drento, e cose son deventæ 'n po' ciù caòtiche, meno de cheu, e se sente meno o senso de comunitæ o de famiggia. No l'è ciù a mæxima ròbba.

instruction: You are a professional Ligurian, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
Va ben.
E te pæ de andâ in sciöita.
Veuggio dî, a l'é pròpio de l'òttima ròba chi.
O so ch'en bòn che t'o sentas un pöco.
Fasso fadiga a tegnîte o passo.
Ma mi no son mianco inta mæ forma megio.
Pènso che a colìna a l'é tòsto difìcile.
A colìna a l'é de lóngo difìcile.
Scì.
Te despiax de no l'avéi sauo primma?
In sciö fâ múscoli?
Sensa dùbio.
Ah, scì.
hypo_1:
D'acòrdio.
E t'ê drêtto a andâ in sciöita.
Veuggio dî, sta chi a l'é pròpio de l'òttima ròba.
O so ch'en bòn che t'o senti un pöco.
Fasso fadiga a tegnîo o tò passo.
Ma mi no son mànco inta mæ forma megio.
Pènso che a colìna a ségge tòsto challenging.

source_doc:
She talked about how impossible it is to be a woman in today's society.
She spoke for over two minutes without being interrupted by a single man, saying things like, you have to be a boss, but you can't be mean.
You have to be thin but not too thin.
You have to never get old, never be rude, never show up.
Oh, sorry.
Our male director is telling me I need to wrap it up here to present America with her.
To see her award.
Is the woman that she delivered that speech to.
Please welcome Margot Robbie.

source_doc:
@Edent ah, interesting - was the Hub 5 something you had to request from Virgin, or did you just get one elsewhere and set it up? (As per recent discussion was issued with a 5x, with its lack Modem Mode.)

@yvan I already had the Hub 4. I went onto their online chat and whinged about poor download speeds until they sent me a new Hub.
If you're on the XPON network, I don't think you have a choice though.

@Edent ah yeah, just been trying to do some research, but it's all a bit muddy... I'm FTTP/XGS-PON so I think just stuck with the 5x... not an insurmountable problem, just a little annoying. (But compared to unreliable <40mpbs BT rotting fenland copper that cost me more than Virgin... I'm not really complaining.)

hypo_0:
@Edent ah, interessante - o Hub 5 o l'è stæto quarcossa ch'ti gh'as dovuto domandâ a Virgin, ò t'o gh'as avùo da n'atra parte e t'o gh'as configurou? (Comme da discorso de de recente, a mi m'han dæto un 5x, ch'o no gh'ha a modalitæ modem.)

@yvan mi gh'aveivo zà o Hub 4. Son andou in sciâ so chat online e m'en son lamentou pe-a veloçitæ de download bassa finché no m'han spedìo un Hub neuvo.
Se t'ê in sciâ ræ XPON, me pâ ch'ti no gh'aggias de sçelta però.

@Edent ah sci, stavo ghjusto provando a fâ de riçerche, ma l'è tutto in po' confuzo... mi son FTTP/XGS-PON quindi me pâ de êse bloccou co-o 5x... no l'è un problema ch'no se peua superâ, solo un po' fastidiozo. (Ma in confronto a-o ramme marsio de BT de palù ch'o va a meno de 40mbps, ch'o no l'è affidabile e o me costava ciù de Virgin... no me lamento miga tòsto.)

source_doc:
Laverne, you you forget about moving.
I want you to call down.
I want to reserve the auditorium for tomorrow.
Then call every doctor in this building and tell them to be there for a rally.
We are going to fight this.
The great Kirk Corporation.
Well, it's an uphill battle against these corporations.
But I'm with you all the way.
It's like my daddy used to say, never give up a pediatrics office without a fight.
Your daddy said that?
Well, actually, he said about a whiskey still.
But I'm adapting it to the present situation.

Veuggio riservâ l'auditorium pe doman.
Poi ciamma tutti i doti de sto palasso e dighe d'ese dæti pe 'n'asenblea.
Lottaitmo contro de questo.
A grande Kirk Corporation.
Beh, a l'è 'na battaggia in salita contro ste multinassionæ.
Ma mi son con ti scinto in fondo.
A l'è comm'o dizeiva sempre mæ poæ, no dâ mai via un studio de pediatria sensa combatte.
Tò poæ o dizeiva questo?
Beh, in realtæ, o o dizeiva pe 'n destillatô de whiskey.
Ma o t'adatto a-a situasion de d'ancheu.

source_doc:
and it's not a bad film — it's a spectacular-looking one in spots — but it is also a film entirely made out of other, better and more thematically cohesive films. so it's 2001 and the three-body problem and arrival and wall-e a little bit, but it's also Quips Sexyman Saves The World Part XVII and ultimately just not that lot

while watching i wondered why the earth needed to be in peril, and if the other two members of the multicultural crew dying to leave the White Man in charge was some kind of an anti-woke statement; but in light of some of the book author andy weir's 'most media literate libertarian' comments about how star trek should be just about spaceships going pew-pew, at least to him the answer is yes to the latter and 'fascism' to the former

@esvrld I read the book a little while back and I may have given him too much credit, especially given his recent decision to open his mouth, but I took the death of the international crew to strand the white boy as an understanding that his second book failed because he is not any good at writing people interacting with each other and his only skill is creating clever little puzzles for his self-insert to solve in complete isolation. Giving him an alien buddy was a good move because it opens the possibility of character interaction without requiring it to resemble the way humans relate to one another

Whoa, you mean Blender Market, the thing I said was the first step towards the Blender environment becoming a shitty subscription service, renamed itself to the oh-so-appealing name "Superhive" and then decided to mandate subscriptions?
WHOA WHO COULD HAVE GUESSED?! Not me, that's for sure. This is completely out of left field!

TBH, I have never seen a single company with "Hive" in the name that wasn't a complete shitshow run by assholes, so I never bought anything on that platform -
Sorry
I didn't RENT anything on that platform if I could help it.
Maybe it's unfair, but "clearly we, a company that specializes in connecting creators with their audience, should name ourselves HIVE, because the creators are just our loyal little bees, and audience is our loyal little bees, work for us!" always gives me bad vibes.

"Hive implies busy crowds!"
Hive implies a queen.
instruction: You are a professional Ligurian, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ligurian, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
Belin, t'êu dî che Blender Market, de de bando d'accatâ de l'atrézzatûa che dizevo ch'o fise o primmo passo verso o deventâ de Blender 'n'atra fegura de serviçio d'abonamento de merda, o s'ha cangiao o nomme into tanto fescion "Superhive" e pêu o l'ha deçizo de fâ vegnî i abonamenti d'obbligo?
BELIN CHI O POÈIVA PREVEGHE?! No mi de segûo. O l'è sbalao de brutto, n'ou saieva mài dæto!

A dî a veitæ, n'ho mài visto 'na sola ditta co-o nomme "Hive" ch'a no fise un rebelotto totâle gestio da de ræfe, d'alora n'ho mài accatao ninte sciuscia plataforma -
Scûza
N'ho mài AFFITTAO ninte sciuscia plataforma, pe quanto fise poscibile.
Magara o no l'è giusto, ma "chiaro che noi, 'na ditta ch'a se fâ d'andâ a mette in contatto i creatori co-o sò pùblico, se dovemo ciamâ HIVE (Alvê), perché i creatori son solo e nòstre fedêli aveggette e o pùblico o l'è e nòstre fedêli aveggette, che lòuan pe noi!" o me dâ senpre de brùtte sensaçioin.

"Hive o veu dî folla de gente d'andâ de pressa!"
Hive o veu dî 'na regìnn-a.

Belin, t'êu dî che Blender Market, de de bando d'accatâ de l'atrézzatûa che dizevo ch'o fise o primmo passo verso o deventâ de Blender 'n'atra fegura de serviçio d'abonamento de merda, o s'ha cangiao o nomme into tanto fescion "Superhive" e pêu o l'ha deçizo de fâ vegnî i abonamenti d'obbligo?
BELIN CHI O POÈIVA PREVEGHE?! No mi de segûo. O l'è sbalao de brutto, n'ou saieva mài dæto!

A dî a veitæ, n'ho mài visto 'na sola ditta co-o nomme "Hive" ch'a no fise un rebelotto totâle gestio da de ræfe, d'alora n'ho mài accatao ninte sciuscia plataforma -
Scûza
N'ho mài AFFITTAO ninte sciuscia plataforma, pe quanto fise poscibile.
Magara o no l'è giusto, ma "chiaro che noi, 'na ditta ch'a se fâ d'andâ a mette in contatto i creatori co-o sò pùblico, se dovemo ciamâ HIVE (Alvê), perché i creatori son solo e nòstre fedêli aveggette e o pùblico o l'è e nòstre fedêli aveggette, che lòuan pe noi!" o me dâ senpre de brùtte sensaçioin.

"Hive o veu dî folla de gente d'andâ de pressa!"
Hive o veu dî 'na regìnn-a.
