```json
  "Account.VatNumber.title_empty": "Are you a VAT-registered business?",
  "ProductDetails.CartItems.OutOfStock.singular": "1 item in the bag, no more left in stock",
  "ProductDetails.Loyalty.Available.WithBalance.subtitle": "Redeem Loyalty at checkout for {{balanceAmount}} off, earn {{rewardAmount}} for your next purchase",
  "ProductDetails.Loyalty.tooltip": "Loyalty is a discount program that lets you buy products and earn points to redeem on your next purchase. Your Loyalty balance is updated when you pay online or in-store. The Loyalty amount shown on this page can be recalculated at the checkout.",
  "ProductDetails.Subscriptions.Details.Annually.description.setup_fee": "Once you subscribe, we will place a new order with this product every year. You will be charged {{firstChargeAmount}} for your first order, and then {{repeatChargeAmount}} for each repeat order. You can easily manage your subscription or cancel it anytime with no additional charges.",
  "ProductDetails.Subscriptions.Details.Daily.description.setup_fee": "Once you subscribe, we will place a new order with this product every day. You will be charged {{firstChargeAmount}} for your first order, and then {{repeatChargeAmount}} for each repeat order. You can easily manage your subscription or cancel it anytime with no additional charges.",
  "ProductDetails.Subscriptions.question": "Would you like to buy this product one time or subscribe for it?",
  "ProductDetails.CompositeProduct.Savings.description": "{{discount}}% off this item if bought in a bundle:",
  "ProductDetails.CompositeProduct.NoSavings.description": "This item can be bought in a bundle:",
  "Account.XE.Loyalty.tooltip": "Loyalty is a discount program that lets you buy products and earn points to redeem on your next purchase. Your Loyalty balance is updated when you pay online or in-store.",
  "Account.XE.StoreCredit.tooltip": "Store credit is a balance issued by a store, for example, after a return. You can use it on future online or in-store purchases.",
  "Account.LoyaltyBalance.description": "Balance: {{amount}} available to redeem",
  "Account.Orders.CantFindOrder.description": "If you can’t find your purchase, it may be linked to another email address. Try signing in with the email address you provided during in-store checkout. If you still don’t see any orders or the list looks wrong, contact our store. We will be happy to help!"
}
```

source_doc:
Local stable out to cash in at Coffs with four contenders

Local trainer Noel Mayfield-Smith is hoping to have a lucrative day at Sunday's Coffs Harbour meeting with four runners stepping out for the stable on the six-race card.

The Group 1-winning horseman will start his day in the second event of the day when Ausbred Yahoo contests the Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605m) with two-kilogram claiming apprentice Ella Drew taking the ride.

Racing returns to Coffs Harbour on Sunday.

Ausbred Yahoo has been racing in good form with a third placing at Kempsey three starts ago being followed by two successive seconds at Coffs Harbour, the latest when beaten by Sunday's rival Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith links with another apprentice, three-kilogram claimer Leanne Boyd, when Never Island starts in the Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

A winner of three of her 15 starts, Never Island will carry 59.5 kilograms after Boyd's allowance. Never Island was beaten less than a length when second behind Montgomery at Grafton and backed that up with a last-start fifth at Coffs Harbour behind In The Fine Print when again beaten less than a length.

Raymond Spokes takes the ride on the Mayfield-Smith-prepared Monte Cruise in the O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise is also a three-time winner from just the nine starts. She hasn't raced since July when finishing last of eight at Eagle Farm and has had two trials at this track in preparation for her return, finishing second behind Saturday's Wyong winner Petticoat before winning the latest of them.

Mayfield-Smith rounds out the day when he again links with Boyd when she rides Cardsharp in the Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

hypo_0:
Scuderia locale a-a caccia de goagni a Coffs con quattro corridôi

L'alenatô locale Noel Mayfield-Smith o spera de tàscia e de passâ 'na giornâ d'oro a-o d'inzene de Coffs Harbour de sta domenega chi, con quattro cavalli in gara into programma de sei corse.

L'ommo de cavalli, zà vincitô de Gruppo 1, o comensâ o so giorno inta segonda gara da giornâ, con Ausbred Yahoo ch'o correrà o Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605m) montòu da l'allieva fantina Ella Drew, ch'a goderà de 'n sgravio de doî chilli.

E corse ritornan a Coffs Harbour sta domenega.

Ausbred Yahoo o l'ha corso in bònna forma darpö, con un terso pòsto a Kempsey træ corse fa, sighio da doî segondi pòsti consecutivi a Coffs Harbour, l'urtimo di quæ subîo pe man do rivale de domenega Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith o se lierà a 'n'atra allieva fantina, Leanne Boyd, ch'a goagna un d'abbon d'un sgravio de trei chilli, quande Never Island a partirà inte l'Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

Vincitô de træ de so 15 corse, Never Island o porterà 59,5 chilli dòppo o sgravio de Boyd. Never Island o l'è stæto battoû de meno d'un naxâ de longhezza quande o l'è arivòu segondo derê a Montgomery a Grafton e o l'ha confermòu a prestasion co-in quinto pòsto inte l'urtima corsa a Coffs Harbour derê a In The Fine Print, dond'o l'è stæto torna battoû de meno d'una longhezza.

Raymond Spokes o monterà in sella a Monte Cruise, preparòu da Mayfield-Smith, inta corsa O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise a l'ha ascì goagnòu træ vòtte inte sole nœuve corse dispotæ. A no corre da lùggio, quande a l'ha finîo urtima de œutto a Eagle Farm, e a l'ha disputòu doî test in sta pista chi in preparasion do so ritorno, arivando segonda derê a Petticoat, vincitô de sàbbo a Wyong, primma de goagnâ l'urtimo de sti test.

Mayfield-Smith o finisce a giornâ quande o se lierà tórna con Boyd, ch'a monterà Cardsharp inta gara Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

Musk:

King [chuckling]: Hello, Very Based. I'm Steve.

King: Wha, I thought I was making a joke.

Thank you, Malcolm.
Not at all, Mr. Dreiser.
Tell Paul I said goodbye.
I will.
What are you sniffling about, Theodore?
I'm not sniffling.
Look here, son, I'm tired of having you mope around because Paul's going away to school.
You should be happy that your brother's going to be a minister.
I am happy.

Well.
Hello, Edinburgh.
How dare I welcome you to the Edinburgh International Book Festival, the foremost literature festival, certainly in the United Kingdom, if not in the world.
Do we agree?
It's my favourite anyway.
And that's what.
That's what counts.
Because I'm the chair.
A little bit of power corrupts, does it not?

source_doc:
Ashley Barnes at the double as Burnley claim welcome win over Millwall

Ashley Barnes bagged a brace as Burnley put their Premier League worries on hold to cruise into the fourth round of the FA Cup with a 5-1 win over Millwall.

The 36-year-old scored his first goal of the season early on and added his second midway through the second half as the blundering Lions gifted a confident home side the most emphatic of wins.

Boss Scott Parker made eight changes to the side that started in Wednesday's 2-2 draw with Manchester United and they did not disappoint, as further goals from Loum Tchaouna and Jaidon Anthony put them out of sight by half-time.

Substitute Jaydon Banel added Burnley's fifth on the stroke of 90 minutes before the shell-shocked Lions, who had completely capitulated, netted an added-time consolation through Josh Coburn.

Burnley dominated the opening exchanges and grabbed the lead in the 11th minute when Jacob Bruun Larsen squared for Barnes to sweep home past visiting goalkeeper Steven Benda.

The Lions mustered little in response, with Aidomo Emakhu booting their best chance straight at Burnley keeper Max Weiss after being released down the left by Joe Bryan.

But the visitors slowly grew into the game and should have levelled when Jake Cooper got his head on Alfie Doughty's cross from deep on the left but was denied by a brilliant over-arm save from Weiss.

The keeper saved again from Cooper on the half-hour as Millwall threatened a leveller but the visitors were undone by two defensive errors that put the game beyond their grasp.

Tchaouna was allowed to thread his left-foot shot from the edge of the box past a static Benda on 35 minutes and shortly before the break the Millwall keeper's poor clearance ultimately gifted Anthony the chance to slide home his side's third.

Millwall looked livelier at the start of the second half and Thierno Ballo should have done better when he found space to get a shot off in the left side of the box, but the home side were clearly in cruise control.

Tchaouna came close to his second when he rifled a shot against the outside of Benda's right-hand post and the increasingly inevitable fourth arrived on 65 minutes when Kamarl Grant made a hash of clearing Anthony's right-wing cross and a delighted Barnes mopped up.

Hunting for a hat-trick, Barnes flashed a header straight at Benda as the linesman's flag was raised, but it was Banel who completed the rout from close range before Coburn's confident finish in stoppage time.
instruction: You are a professional Ligurian, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
Doppietta d'Ashley Barnes col Burnley ch'o se piggia 'na feliçe vittoia in sce-o Millwall

Ashley Barnes o mette a segno 'na doppietta e o Burnley o mette da parte e preoccupaçioin de Premier League pe passâ a-o quarto turno de FA Cup co-ina vittoia pe 5-1 in sce-o Millwall.

O xogao de 36 anni o l'ha marcao o so primmo gò sfontao de Stagion a l'iniçio de-o xeuo e o l'ha azzonto o so segondo a-a meitæ de-o segondo tempo, co-i Lions in gran difficoltæ che han regalao a-i padroin de casa, pin de fiduçia, a ciù netta de vittoie.

O mister Scott Parker o l'ha cangiao eito xogoei rispetto a-a formaçion ch'a l'ha començao o pareggio pe 2-2 de mercoardì co-o Manchester United e sti chi no han deluso, con de atre ræ de Loum Tchaouna e Jaidon Anthony ch'han serrao a partia zà primma de l'intervallo.

O sostiuto Jaydon Banel o l'ha azzonto o quinto gò de-o Burnley proprio a-o 90°, primma che i Lions, scioccæ e do tutto areixi, trovessan o gò de-a bandêa inte-o recupero con Josh Coburn.

O Burnley o l'ha dominao e battue iniçiaæ e o l'ha piggiao o vantaggio a-o l'11° menuto, quando Jacob Bruun Larsen o l'ha pasao o ballon a Barnes ch'o l'ha inçiofao o portê ospite Steven Benda.

I Lions han fæto ben poco pe risponde, co-o Aidomo Emakhu ch'o l'ha sballao a so megio occaxion tirando drito in sci-o portê de-o Burnley Max Weiss dòppo ese stæto lançao in sce-a sinistra da Joe Bryan.

Ma i ospiti son cresciui de man in man inte-o xeuo e aviæan dêuo pareggiâ quando Jake Cooper o l'ha corpio de testa in sce-o traverson de Alfie Doughty da-a sinistra, ma o l'ha trovao 'na superba parata de Weiss ch'o l'ha sviao d'arezzo.

O portê o l'ha parao torna in sce-o Cooper a-a mezo'oa, co-o Millwall ch'o spiâva a-o pareggio, ma i ospiti son stæti condannæ da doî erroî defensivi ch'han misso a partia feua da-a so portâ.

A-o 35° menuto Tchaouna o l'ha potuo infilâ o so tiro de sinistro da-o limite de l'aria superando un immobile Benda, e poco primma de-o repozo un brutto rinvio de-o portê de-o Millwall o l'ha finio pe regalâ a Anthony l'occaxion de sponçâ dentro o terzo gò de-a so squaddra.

O Millwall o l'ha parsciùo ciù vivo a-o prinçipio de-o segondo tempo e Thierno Ballo o l'aviæ dêuo fâ megio quando o l'ha trovao o spaçio pe tirâ da-o lao sinistro de l'aria, ma i padroin de casa controlâvan a partia con feliçitæ.

Tchaouna o l'ha sfiorao o so segondo gò de person-a scioandæ 'n tiro contro l'esterno de-o palo drito de Benda, e o quarto gò, ormai inevitabile, o l'è arrivao a-o 65° menuto quando Kamarl Grant o l'ha sballao o rinvio in sce-o traverson da-a destra de Anthony e un feliçe Barnes o n'ha aprofeitao.

In çerca de-a tripletta, Barnes o l'ha sferrao 'na capâ drita in sce Benda mentre a bandêa de-o guardalinn-e a s'auçava, ma a-a fin o l'è stæto Banel a dâ o corpo de graçia da vixin primma de-o gò de fiduçia de Coburn inte-o tempo de recupero.

Tchaouna o l'ha sfiorao o so segondo gò de person-a scioandæ 'n tiro contro l'esterno de-o palo drito de Benda, e o quarto gò, ormai inevitabile, o l'è arrivao a-o 65° menuto quando Kamarl Grant o l'ha sballao o rinvio in sce-o traverson da-a destra de Anthony e un feliçe Barnes o n'ha aprofeitao.

In çerca de-a tripletta, Barnes o l'ha sferrao 'na capâ drita in sce Benda mentre a bandêa de-o guardalinn-e a s'auçava, ma a-a fin o l'è stæto Banel a dâ o corpo de graçia da vixin primma de-o gò de fiduçia de Coburn inte-o tempo de recupero.
hypo_6:
Doppietta de Ashley Barnes co-o Burnley ch'o se piggia 'na feliçe vittoia in sce-o Millwall

Ashley Barnes o mette a segno 'na doppietta e o Burnley o mette da parte e preoccupaçioin de Premier League pe passâ de slancio a-o quarto turno de FA Cup co-ina vittoia pe 5-1 in sce-o Millwall.

O xogao de 36 anni o l'ha marcao o so primmo gò de-a stagion a l'iniçio de-o xeuo e o l'ha azzonto o so segondo a-a meitæ de-o segondo tempo, co-i Lions in gran difficoltæ che han regalao a-i padroin de casa, pin de fiduçia, a ciù netta de vittoie.

O mister Scott Parker o l'ha cangiao eito xogoei rispetto a-a formaçion ch'a l'ha començao o pareggio pe 2-2 de mercoardì co-o Manchester United e sti chi no han deluso, con de atre ræ de Loum Tchaouna e Jaidon Anthony ch'han serrao a partia zà primma de l'intervallo.

O sostiuto Jaydon Banel o l'ha azzonto o quinto gò de-o Burnley proprio a-o 90° menuto, primma che i Lions, scioccæ e do tutto areixi, trovessan o gò de-a bandêa inte-o recupero con Josh Coburn.

O Burnley o l'ha dominao e battue iniçiaæ e o l'ha piggiao o vantaggio a-o l'11° menuto, quando Jacob Bruun Larsen o l'ha pasao o ballon a Barnes ch'o l'ha infilao o portê ospite Steven Benda.

I Lions han fæto ben poco pe risponde, co-o Aidomo Emakhu ch'o l'ha sballao a so megio occaxion tirando drito in sci-o portê de-o Burnley Max Weiss dòppo ese stæto lançao in sce-a sinistra da Joe Bryan.

Ma i ospiti son cresciui de man in man inte-o xeuo e aviæan dêuo pareggiâ quando Jake Cooper o l'ha corpio de testa in sce-o traverson de Alfie Doughty da-a sinistra, ma o l'ha trovao 'na superba parata de Weiss ch'o l'ha sviao o ballon d'arezzo.

O portê o l'ha parao torna in sce-o Cooper a-a mezo'oa, co-o Millwall ch'o spiâva a-o pareggio, ma i ospiti son stæti condannæ da doî erroî defensivi ch'han misso a partia feua da-a so portâ.

Oh, great.
Here comes Jade.
Can we sit somewhere else?
Nope.
Fine.
We'll sit with the girl who can't keep her mouth shut and got you fired.
Beck, I swear, if there was anything I could do to make it up to you, I would.
I bet you would.

source_doc:
Relentless Clan power past Steelers in statement home win

The Clan got off to a strong start with Joe Hazeldine slamming a first-time shot into the Sheffield net after some nice slip passing between Hugo Roy and Deven Sideroff.

Despite some strong defensive play from Glasgow, the Steelers found a breakthrough via Brien Diffley's sharp shooting through traffic before Mikko Juusola gave the visitors the lead with a deflected shot from right wing.

In the second period, the Clan saw momentum swing their way with Steven Seigo slipping a tidy finish from close-range past Matthew Greenfield to tie the game up.

Shortly after, Rylan Schwartz grabbed a go-ahead goal with a bullet from the backdoor after some luck with the Clan avoiding a too many men call.

Sheffield forced their way back into the game with Ryan Tait driving on net and backhanding a shot which Brine saved but didn't keep hold of as Kevin Tansey poked a third goal over the line for the visitors.

With the score line tied going into the final frame, the noise peaked inside Braehead and Glasgow gained control of the game.

Tristin Langan saw retribution for the ongoing battle he had to put up with throughout the game with Mitchell Heard as he cracked the bar with a beautiful finish to give his side the lead.

A holding penalty on Miihkali Teppo applied pressure to the hosts' advantage late on with the Steelers pulling their netminder for the extra attacker.

Langan grabbed his second of the game on the empty net though to round off the night with a well-earned and much-needed two points for the Clan on home ice.

Glasgow Clan head coach, Corey Neilson said after the game: "We were the better team. Our forecheck was excellent, that's something we've worked on all week and it was relentless tonight. The identity we were looking for is starting to show. It was really enjoyable to coach with full lines and take advantage of a team that's playing short, because usually we're on the other side of that."

Sheffield Steelers head coach, Aaron Fox, said: "I thought we were pretty good for the majority of the game. Glasgow jumped on us early, but our bounce back was good. Our guys were gassed by the end, we only had three lines but we were in the battle all game, I can't fault the compete level of our guys."
instruction: You are a professional Ligurian, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
Un Clan implacabile o sùpera i Steelers inte 'na vitöia in cà ch'a fa dâse de mente

O Clan o l'ha començòu co-o drito, con Joe Hazeldine ch'o l'ha tiou de prìmma 'na bómba inta pòrta de Sheffield dòppo 'n bèllo scambi de pasaggi tra Hugo Roy e Deven Sideroff.

Mentre Glasgow a fava 'na fòrte fâze defenscîva, i Steelers han trovòu a fêua co-un tîo precîzo de Brien Diffley in mezo a-a fissa de d'ommi, primma che Mikko Juusola o dæse o vantàggio a-i òspiti con 'n tîo deviaou da l'âse drita.

Ino secóndo perîodo, o Clan o l'ha pigiòu o contròllo do zeugo con Steven Seigo ch'o l'ha infilòu 'n bèllo tîo da vixìn a-o Matthew Greenfield pe paregiâ a partîa.

Pòco dòppo, Rylan Schwartz o l'ha segnòu o gòl do vantàggio con 'na sventolâ da derê a-a pòrta, dòppo 'n córpo de sciòrta do Clan ch'o l'ha schivòu 'na penalitæ pe tròppi d'ommi in pìsta.

Sheffield o s'ha dæto da fâ pe drentâ tórna in partîa, con Ryan Tait ch'o s'ha portòu vèrso a pòrta e o l'ha tiou de revèrso; Brine o l'ha paròu ma o n'ha mantegnûo o contròllo do dìsco, e coscì Kevin Tansey o l'ha ruzâou o tèrzo gòl pe-i òspiti oltre a lìnia.

Co-o punteggio in paritæ a l'início de l'ùrtimo perîodo, o frebùgno o l'ha tocòu o màscimo a-o Braehead e Glasgow o l'ha pigiòu e rénde do zeugo.

Tristin Langan o l'ha trovòu a sò rivìnta inta lùtta continoa ch'o l'ha avûo pe tùtta a partîa con Mitchell Heard, stampando o dìsco contro a travèrsa con 'na bèlla concluzion ch'a l'ha dæto o vantàggio a-a sò squàddra.

Ina penalitæ de trattenûo a Miihkali Teppo a l'ha mìsso a-a pröva o vantàggio di padroìn de cà inte l'ùrtima fâze, con i Steelers ch'han levòu o portê pe zontâ o sèsto òmmo in fâze d'atàcco.

Langan o l'ha segnòu comónque o sò secóndo gòl da partîa inta pòrta svöia, pe serâ a serâta con doî pónti ben meritæ e asbæsiæ pe-o Clan in sciâ pìsta de cà.

L'alenatô do Glasgow Clan, Corey Neilson, o l'ha dæto dòppo a partîa: "Sémmo stæti a squàddra megîzo. O nòstro forecheck o l'è stæto eçelente, l'è 'na de quelle cöse in sce quæ emmo travagiòu tùtta a setemâna e staséia o l'è stæto implacabile. L'identitæ ch'êvamo aprêuvo a çercâ a comensa a véddise. O l'è stæto pròpio 'n piaxei dâ e driti con de lìnîe conpléte e aprofitâ de 'na squàddra ch'a l'êa a-o strécto con i d'ommi, perché de sòlito sémmo niatri da l'âtra parte de sta scitoaçion."

L'alenatô di Sheffield Steelers, Aaron Fox, o l'ha dæto: "Pénso che sémmo stæti asbæto bravi pe-a ciù parte da partîa. Glasgow o n'ha asaltòu a-o prìmipio, ma a nòstra reaçion a l'è stæta bón-a. I nòstri d'ommi êvan stràcchi mòrti a-a fìn, aveivamo sôlo træ lìnîe ma sémmo stæti inta lùtta pe tùtta a partîa, no pòsso criticâ o livéllo de conpetitivitæ di nòstri d'ommi."

O nòstro forecheck o l'è stæto eçelente, l'è 'na de quelle cöse in sce quæ emmo travagiòu tùtta a setemâna e staséia o l'è stæto implacabile. L'identitæ ch'êvamo aprêuvo a çercâ a comensa a véddise. O l'è stæto pròpio 'n piaxei dâ e driti con de lìnîe conpléte e aprofitâ de 'na squàddra ch'a l'êa a-o strécto con i d'ommi, perché de sòlito sémmo niatri da l'âtra parte de sta scitoaçion."

L'alenatô di Sheffield Steelers, Aaron Fox, o l'ha dæto: "Pénso che sémmo stæti asbæto bravi pe-a ciù parte da partîa. Glasgow o n'ha asaltòu a-o prìmipio, ma a nòstra reaçion a l'è stæta bón-a. I nòstri d'ommi êvan stràcchi mòrti a-a fìn, aveivamo sôlo træ lìnîe ma sémmo stæti inta lùtta pe tùtta a partîa, no pòsso criticâ o livéllo de conpetitivitæ di nòstri d'ommi."
hypothesis:
Un Clan implacabile o sùpera i Steelers inte 'na vitöia in cà ch'a fa dâse de mente

O Clan o l'ha començòu co-o drito, con Joe Hazeldine ch'o l'ha tiou de prìmma 'na bómba inta pòrta de Sheffield dòppo 'n bèllo scambi de pasaggi tra Hugo Roy e Deven Sideroff.

Mentre Glasgow a fava 'na fòrte fâze defenscîva, i Steelers han trovòu a fêua co-un tîo precîzo de Brien Diffley in mezo a-a fissa de d'ommi, primma che Mikko Juusola o dæse o vantàggio a-i òspiti con 'n tîo deviaou da l'âse drita.

Ino secóndo perîodo, o Clan o l'ha pigiòu o contròllo do zeugo con Steven Seigo ch'o l'ha infilòu 'n bèllo tîo da vixìn a-o Matthew Greenfield pe paregiâ a partîa.

Pòco dòppo, Rylan Schwartz o l'ha segnòu o gòl do vantàggio con 'na sventolâ da derê a-a pòrta, dòppo 'n córpo de sciòrta do Clan ch'o l'ha schivòu 'na penalitæ pe tròppi d'ommi in pìsta.

Sheffield o s'ha dæto da fâ pe drentâ tórna in partîa, con Ryan Tait ch'o s'ha portòu vèrso a pòrta e o l'ha tiou de revèrso; Brine o l'ha paròu ma o n'ha mantegnûo o contròllo do dìsco, e coscì Kevin Tansey o l'ha ruzâou o tèrzo gòl pe-i òspiti oltre a lìnia.

Co-o punteggio in paritæ a l'início de l'ùrtimo perîodo, o frebùgno o l'ha tocòu o màscimo a-o Braehead e Glasgow o l'ha pigiòu e rénde do zeugo.

Tristin Langan o l'ha trovòu a sò rivìnta inta lùtta continoa ch'o l'ha avûo pe tùtta a partîa con Mitchell Heard, stampando o dìsco contro a travèrsa con 'na bèlla concluzion ch'a l'ha dæto o vantàggio a-a sò squàddra.

Ina penalitæ de trattenûo a Miihkali Teppo a l'ha mìsso a-a pröva o vantàggio di padroìn de cà inte l'ùrtima fâze, con i Steelers ch'han levòu o portê pe zontâ o sèsto òmmo in fâze d'atàcco.

Langan o l'ha segnòu comónque o sò secóndo gòl da partîa inta pòrta svöia, pe serâ a serâta con doî pónti ben meritæ e asbæsiæ pe-o Clan in sciâ pìsta de cà.

I nòstri d'ommi êvan stràcchi mòrti a-a fìn, aveivamo sôlo træ lìnîe ma sémmo stæti inta lùtta pe tùtta a partîa, no pòsso criticâ o livéllo de conpetitivitæ di nòstri d'ommi."

source_doc:
Ate a little more chicken and had a wash. Also had a little more fight when I made her take her fluids last.
We phoned the vet at 830 this morning to ask if they looked under her soft pallet while she was sedated, as she has major ear polyps. Was told the vet would call back. They didn't, rang just now (1645 local) and was told the vet wasn't in today. I was a bit annoyed and said "we paid you over £600 yesterday, you said phone if we have questions, we have questions you're not answering!"
"I don't like your tone, sir "
"It's not your fault personally, but when I pay the better part of a grand I expect a level of service that you're not providing"
"I'll get a vet from the other branch to ring you"

Seeing vet at other practise at half seven for more anti nausea medicine. They're not going to charge out of hours rate as we rang first thing.
Just got another 10ml of rescue fluids into her.

Back. Anti nausea jab, gabapentin, and she's home. Ate some chicken and some cheese.
Got more gabapentin in pill form for her, too

Won't stop eating. Having to slow her down to prevent her from vomiting. She's also absolutely, completely, totally, off her tits. Mullered. Stoned. Caned. Fully in the yellow submarine.
Vet says this'll reset her appetite, or, when we stop giving her painkillers, show it's pain stopping her eating, which would mean medical imaging time.

She's eating a bit, and even played a little, but she's still on the medications so it might be that. Still giving her recovery fluids, which she's still not fighting as she would normally.

Valencia has decided we are all Suspicious. Won't come when called, runs if you go to her. Still comes on her own terms, so it's fine, she's just seen her adoptive sister repeatedly wrapped in a towel and made to drink Stuff, and she wants none of that, thank you very much.

Ming update: she's a little more active, but still floppy and sleeping a lot. She's on two lots of painkillers still, so she's probably fairly stoned.
She IS eating, little and often, and finished off the last of her rescue fluids from a saucer by herself. She's washing, but she hasn't slapped valencia in ages, and she's still not right. Hoping it's the painkillers, and that when we withdraw them, her appetite remains.

Ming has finished the course of painkillers and is showing determined desire to go out, which we're not allowing yet. She's eating, playing, but it'll be a few days until the drugs are cleared from her system and we'll then see how she is.
Cautiously optimistic.
instruction: You are a professional Ligurian, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ligurian, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
A l'ha mangiòu ancón in pö de polastre e a s'è lavâ. A l'ha ascì feto in pö ciù de rexistensa l'urtima vòtta ch'ò prövòu a fâghe pigiâ i sò lìquidi.
Emmo ciamòu o veterinario de matìn a-e 8:30 pe domandâghesì gh'éan anæti a amiâ sotta o çê da bocca doçe mentre ch'a l'êa anestetizâ, vistu ch'a l'ha de gròsse rousaseringhe inte l'oêgia. N'an dæto che o veterinario o n'aviæ riciamòu. No l'an feto, aloa gh'ò dæto de colpo mi òua (e 16:45 de d'ancheu) e m'an dæto che o veterinario o no gh'êa mancu d'ancheu. Me son in pö rabiòu e gh'ò dæto "ieri v'emmo pagòu ciù de 600 sterline, gh'æ dæto de ciamâ se gh'éan de domande, e niatri e domande e fèmmo e voî no rispondéi!"
"No me piaxe o sò ton, sciô"
"No l'é colpa sò de person-a, ma quando pagu tòsto mize liri me speto un livello de serviçio che voî no m'un dæ"
"Faso riciamâ da un veterinario de l'atra sede"

Incontro co-o veterinario inte l'atra clìnica a-e sette e meza pe do ciù contra a nàusea. No ne fâan pagâ a tariffa d'urgensa fêua d'orario perché emmo ciamòu domatìn presto.
Ghe son ariescîu a dâghen ancón 10ml de lìquidi d'urgensa.

Tornæ. Pontûa contra o vomito, gabapentin, e a l'è a-a caza. A l'ha mangiòu in pö de polastre e de formaggio.
O pigiòu ascì do gabapentin in pillore pe lê

A no se ferma ciù de mangiâ. Ghe tocca fâla andâ ciàn pe no fâla vomitâ. A l'è ascì de bruttu, de brutto, de brutto fêua de testa. Stratonâ. Inscioæa. Sballâ. Do fûto fêua da-o mondo.
O veterinario o dixe che questo o ghe risetta l'apetitto, òppuru, quando fèmmo fìn co-i anti-inflamatori, s'a l'ha do mâ ch'a no-a fa mangiâ, ch'a n'aviæ d'andâ a fâ de lastre.

A mangia in pö, a l'ha persòn xogòu in pö, ma a l'è ancón sotta i rimedi d'aloa a poriæ ese pe quello. Ghe dagu ancón i liquidi de ricupero, che comunque no-i sbatte via comme a fia de l'ordinario.

Valencia a l'ha deçizo che semmo tutti de fuxilâ. No-a vên se a ciàmmi, a scappa se ti t'avixi. A vên ancón a-i sò comodi, aloa va ben, a l'ha solo visto a sò sêu adotiva anvigiâ d'in scio d'un pannello e fâla béive de Cöse, e lê no-a vêu fâ ninte de quello, grassie tante.

Agiornamento in sciâ Ming: a l'è in pö ciù ativa, ma ancón flascia e a dorme tòsto sempre. A l'è sotta doî anti-inflamatori de d'ancheu, aloa l'è façile ch'a l'é bòn-a sciòccâ.
A mangia de seguo, in pö e de vòtte, e a l'ha finîo l'urtimo di sò liquidi d'urgensa de d'ancheu da-o tondìn da lê sola. A se lava, ma o n'ha dæto de sventorlæ a valencia de d'ancheu, e a no l'è ancón a posto. Speremmo ch'o sêu pe-i analgesici, e che quando ghe i levèmmo, l'apetitto o ghe reste.

Ming a l'ha finîo a cura de analgesici e a l'ha de vêu andâ fêua de fûto, cossa che no ghe permettemmo ancón. A mangia, a xoga, ma ghe vêu doî o trei giorni pe fâ desbancâ o rimedio da-o sò corpo e aloa amiemo comme a sta.
Speremmo de sci.

"No l'é colpa sò de person-a, ma quando pagu tòsto mize liri me speto un livello de serviçio che voî no m'un dæ"
"Faso riciamâ da un veterinario de l'atra sede"

Incontro co-o veterinario inte l'atra clìnica a-e sette e meza pe do ciù contra a nàusea. No ne fâan pagâ a tariffa d'urgensa fêua d'orario perché emmo ciamòu matìn presto.
Ghe son ariescîu a dâghen ancón 10ml de lìquidi d'urgensa.

Tornæ. Pontûa contra o vomito, gabapentin, e a l'è a-a caza. A l'ha mangiòu in pö de polastre e de formaggio.
Ghe n'ò d'ancheu de gabapentin in pillore pe lê

A no se ferma ciù de mangiâ. Ghe tocca fâla andâ ciàn pe no fâla vomitâ. A l'è ascì de bruttu, de brutto, de brutto fêua de testa. Stratonâ. Inscioæa. Sballâ. Do fûto fêua da-o mondo.
O veterinario o dixe che questo o ghe risetta l'apetitto, òppuru, quando fèmmo fìn co-i anti-inflamatori, s'a l'ha do mâ ch'a no-a fa mangiâ, ch'a n'aviæ d'andâ a fâ de lastre.

A mangia in pö, a l'ha fin-a xogòu in pö, ma a l'è ancón sotta i rimedi d'aloa a poriæ ese pe quello. Ghe dagu ancón i liquidi de ricupero, che comunque no-i sbatte via comme a fia de l'ordinario.

Valencia a l'ha deçizo che semmo tutti de fuxilâ. No-a vên se a ciàmmi, a scappa se ti t'avixi. A vên ancón a-i sò comodi, aloa va ben, a l'ha solo visto a sò sêu adotiva anvigiâ d'in scio d'un pannello e fâla béive de Cöse, e lê no-a vêu fâ ninte de quello, grassie tante.

Agiornamento in sciâ Ming: a l'è in pö ciù ativa, ma ancón flascia e a dorme tòsto sempre. A l'è sotta doî anti-inflamatori d'ancheu, aloa l'è façile ch'a l'é bòn-a sciòccâ.
A mangia de seguo, in pö e de vòtte, e a l'ha finîo l'urtimo di sò liquidi d'urgensa da-o tondìn da lê sola. A se lava, ma a no l'ha dæto de sventorlæ a Valencia d'ancheu, e a no l'è ancón a posto. Speremmo ch'o sêu pe-i analgesici, e che quando ghe i levèmmo, l'apetitto o ghe reste.

Ming a l'ha finîo a cura de analgesici e a l'ha de vêu andâ fêua de fûto, cossa che no ghe permettemmo ancón. A mangia, a xoga, ma ghe vêu doî o trei giorni pe fâ desbancâ o rimedio da-o sò corpo e aloa amiemo comme a sta.
Speremmo de sci.

source_doc:
Oh, did you see that?
A dog who can dance.
I think maybe that beats the time you yawn and got your mouth stuck open.
Daddy, can we keep him?
No one's claimed him yet.
Yeah, and he's so much fun.
I don't know girls, I don't know.
I don't know, maybe, maybe, maybe we'll talk about it.
And, Joey, if you need me, I'll be at Nick's.
It's opening night.
See you.
Later.
Hey, Barbara.
Let's go take pictures of Joey dancing, okay.
Good idea.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
Oh, t'at'ha visto?
Un can ch'o sa dancâ.
Penso che fòscia questo o ségge megio de de quella vòtta che t'ê sbadigiâ e te s'è bloccâ a bocca averta.
Papà, poemo tegnilo?
Nisciun o l'ha ancora reclamâ.
Sî, e o l'è coscì risatô.
No sé, fige, no sé.
No sé, fòscia, fòscia, fòscia ne parliemo.
E, Joey, se t'ha' de bezéugno de mi, saiò da Nick.
L'è a séia de l'avertua.
Se vedemo.
Cianin.
Eila, Barbara.
Andemo a fâ de fòto a Joey ch'o danca, va ben?
Bona idea.

source_doc:
On a lighter note, just saw someone complaining about when games beg you to switch to easy mode when you fail.
I also hate this.
I love having an easy mode. Hell, I think games should just fuckin' let you cheat, as long as competitions all have agreed-on rules about it.
But every game that's pestered me into easy mode has been an instant put-down. I have plenty of games to play, if you want me to be done faster, congrats, I'm done faster.

This is what makes modern Marios - modern-ish anyway - so impossible for me to play.
"Did you die thwee times mawwio? Here's the golden supersuit of invincibility because you suck! If you don't want it, just carefully avoid ever pressing anything besides "start level yes again no no nothing else just start the level".
This is also why I stopped trying to play Phantom Pain. Whenever I died, it'd offer me the chicken hat and default to "yes", eventually I forgot to manually say "fuck off".

I get it's a retention thing, but it's so disrespectful.
Autoscaling difficulty also pisses me off, because I'll be gearing up for a challenge and then the game will panic and lower it to super easy because I've been "struggling".
I'll die or something, go back to try again, but nope, now the challenge is gone. You succeeded! You made the game go away! Don't worry, those challenges were for someone else. Someone better.
I can't remember if I ever completed a game with autoscaling difficulty.

I guess the basic difference between me and their target audience is that I like to figure out how to do something, while their target audience - at least in their heads - likes to take a log flume through a Disneyworld attraction.
A little jostling, a little fluids, but don't worry, baby, daddy Walt's got ya. You're safey-wafe, you don't even have to move, just sit there and tee hee, here's a wittle splashy-splash.
If I wanted that, I'd go sit in a fucking dog park and pet a dog.
instruction: You are a professional Ligurian, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ligurian, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
Parlando de cose ciù alegre, ò apen-a visto un ch'o se lagnava de quando i zeughi t'arcomandan de passâ a-a modalità façile quando ti perdi.
A mi ascì a m'inzega sta cosa chi.
Me piaxe che ghe segge ina modalità façile. Belin, penso che i zeughi doviæan pròpio dâte a poscibilitæ de inbrogiâ, basta che inte conpetiçioin ghe seggan de regole condivize in merito.
Ma de l'arbanella, tutti i zeughi che m'an scassòu e balle pe passâ a-a modalità façile son stæti desmantiæ sùbito. Gh'ò pin de zeughi da zeugâ, se ti veu che finisce ciù in frouia, congratulaçioin, ò finio ciù in frouia.

Questo o l'é o motivo pe cui i Mario moderni - o squæxi moderni - son inposcibili da zeugâ pe mi.
"T'ê mòrto træ vòtte, Mario? Chi gh'é o super-vestito d'öo de l'invincibilitæ perché ti fæ schifo! Se no ti o veu, fanni atençion a no sciâcâ mai ninte d'atro che "iniçia o livello scì de neuvo no no ninte d'atro solo iniçia o livello".
Questo o l'é ascì o motivo pe cui ò dexeuòu de zeugâ a Phantom Pain. Ogni vòtta che moivo, o m'ofriva o capello da polastra inpostòu in sciù "scì", e a-a fin me son desmentegòu de dìghe "vatt'a fâ fotte" manualmente.

O capisso che l'é ina questioin de mantegnî i zeugaoi, ma l'é cosci irreverente.
A difficoltæ ch'a s'adata da sôla a me fâ ascì raggia, perché magari me stago preparando pe ina sfida e pœu o zeugo o va in panico e o-a dizescia a super façile perché "stâgo fadigando".
Mœuo o quarcosa do genere, torno lû d'atesta, ma nani, ninte, òua a sfida a l'é sparîa. Ti gh'ê ruscio! T'ê fæto sparî o zeugo! Trancuillo, quelle sfide e l'æan pe n'atro. Un ciù bravo.
No me vegne in mente se ò mai finio un zeugo co-a difficoltæ ch'a s'adata da sôla.

Me sa che a diferença prinçipâ tra mi e o so pùblico de rinfuso a l'é che a mi me piaxe capî comme fâ ina cosa, mentre a-o so pùblico de rinfuso - a-o meno inta so testa - ghe piaxe fâse un gio in sciâ canoa inte 'n'atraçion de Disneyworld.
Un po' de scossoni, un po' de d'ægua, ma no t'inquiætâ, piccin, ghe pensa papà Walt. Ti ê a-o seguo, no ti t'ê manco da mœuve, dagghe de panissa e rie, chi gh'é un po' de sbrofœu.
Se voese quello, andriæ inte 'n parco pe-i chen a fâ de caresse a un can, belin.

Ma de l'arbanella, tutti i zeughi che m'an scassòu e balle pe passâ a-a modalità façile son stæti desmantiæ sùbito. Gh'ò pin de zeughi da zeugâ, se ti veu che finisce ciù in frouia, congratulaçioin, ò finio ciù in frouia.

Questo o l'é o motivo pe cui i Mario moderni - o squæxi moderni - son inposcibili da zeugâ pe mi.
"T'ê mòrto træ vòtte, Mario? Chi gh'é o super-vestito d'öo de l'invincibilitæ perché ti fæ schifo! Se no ti o veu, fanni atençion a no sciâcâ mai ninte d'atro che "iniçia o livello scì de neuvo no no ninte d'atro solo iniçia o livello".
Questo o l'é ascì o motivo pe cui ò dexeuòu de zeugâ a Phantom Pain. Ogni vòtta che moivo, o m'ofriva o capello da polastra inpostòu in sciù "scì", e a-a fin me son desmentegòu de dìghe "vatt'a fâ fotte" manualmente.

O capisso che l'é ina questioin de mantegnî i zeugaoi, ma l'é cosci irreverente.
A difficoltæ ch'a s'adata da sôla a me fâ ascì raggia, perché magari me stago preparando pe ina sfida e pœu o zeugo o va in panico e o-a dizescia a super façile perché "stâgo fadigando".

No me vegne in mente se ò mai finio un zeugo co-a difficoltæ ch'a s'adata da sôla.

Me sa che a diferença prinçipâ tra mi e o so pùblico de rinfuso a l'é che a mi me piaxe capî comme fâ ina cosa, mentre a-o so pùblico de rinfuso - a-o meno inta so testa - ghe piaxe fâse un gio in sciâ canoa inte 'n'atraçion de Disneyworld.

Se voese quello, andriæ inte 'n parco pe-i chen a fâ de caresse a un can, belin.

source_doc:
Celtic hammer Dundee United on O'Neill's return

Normal service resumed at Celtic Park as champions Celtic secured a dominant 4-0 win over Dundee United and their first clean sheet since Martin O'Neill's previous game in charge.

Two first-half goals in five minutes from Yang Hyun-jun and Arne Engels sent Celtic on their way as O'Neill returned to the dugout in style following Wilfried Nancy's brief but disastrous reign.

Substitute Benjamin Nygren grabbed his 11th goal of the season and Daizen Maeda netted on the rebound to equal Celtic's two biggest wins of the league season so far. Both of them were in O'Neill's caretaker spell in charge, which resulted in seven wins from eight games.

Celtic sent for the 73-year-old on Monday after terminating Nancy's contract in the wake of six defeats - and 18 goals against - in eight matches.

The chaos, confusion and defensive fragility that marked Nancy's reign disappeared as the Hoops moved three points off the top of the table.

Nobody in the stadium would have been surprised to see O'Neill restore Celtic's long-standing 4-3-3 formation and the team picked up where they left off under O'Neill, as if they had awoken from a nightmare and got on with life as normal.

Centre-back Liam Scales was back to the consistent form he displayed before suffering in and out of a back three under the Frenchman.

Callum McGregor dictated play again and Celtic's wide players, Yang and Sebastian Tounekti, were given attacking licence after being handed wing-back roles by the former Columbus Crew head coach.

Celtic enjoyed 78 per cent possession, had 22 shots at goal and let United have just three. Their opponents averaged 12 shots during Nancy's tenure and United managed 17 themselves during their 2-1 win over the Hoops at Tannadice less than four weeks ago.

Celtic penned United in from the start, with Kieran Tierney instrumental in creating a series of first-half chances.

The left-back had a shot deflected wide, Yang and Scales threatened from headers and Maeda flicked a low cross of the bar, before the pressure paid off in the 27th minute.

Such was Celtic's dominance that Scales found himself in possession on the edge of the box and rolled a pass to Yang, who drilled home from 20 yards.

Maeda soon mis-kicked a volley before Engels produced a first-time finish from Tierney's pass.

It was not all plain sailing for Celtic in the first half. Mexican right-back Julian Araujo marked his first start with a yellow card for a dangerous challenge on Will Ferry, who was still hobbling when he took the resulting free-kick.

United also had chances and Dario Naamo looked unsure whether to head or volley Craig Sibbald's deep cross and did neither and Owen Stirton twice came close.

The striker was firstly foiled by a goal-saving block from Scales after being gifted possession by Auston Trusty and later shot just wide from 18 yards after the Celtic central defence backed off.

United brought on winger Amar Fatah for holding midfielder Pan Camara at half-time but Celtic were even more dominant in the second half.

Reo Hatate and Maeda missed good chances before Nygren shot high into the net from six yards in the 63rd minute.

Maeda had an easy finish six minutes later after Tounekti's shot was saved.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
O Celtic o batte nettamente o Dundee United a-o rientro de O'Neill

Torna a normalitæ a-o Celtic Park: i campioin do Celtic se assegûan de d'âto a-a partia un 4-0 contro o Dundee United e a so primma partia sensa pigiâ gò sotta a direçion de Martin O'Neill da-o seu urtime incontro.

Doî gò into primmo tempo in çinque menuti, segnæ da Yang Hyun-jun e Arne Engels, an mænnou o Celtic in sciâ via do trionfo, con O'Neill ch'o l'è tornou in banchina con stile dòppo a breve e desastrosa gestion de Wilfried Nancy.

O subentrou Benjamin Nygren o l'ha marcou o seu 11° gò de sta stagion e Daizen Maeda o l'ha insaccou in sciâ rebatûa, eguagiando e doe ciù grende vittorie do Celtic in campionato fin unsettled. Tutte doe ean stæte sotta a direçion de traghettatô de O'Neill, ch'a l'ha portou a sette vittorie in eotto partie.

O Celtic o l'ha reciammou o tecnico de 73 anni lunedì, dòppo avei rescisso o contratto de Nancy a seguito de sei sconfitte - e 18 gò subîi - in eotto incontri.

O caos, a confuxon e a fragilitæ defensciva ch'aveivan caraterizzou a gestion de Nancy son sparîe, co-i Hoops ch'an azzeratou a distansa a sofi tre punti da-a vetta da clascifica.

Nisciun a-o stadio o se l'æ fito de fâse meraveggia a-o vedde O'Neill ripristinâ o clascico modulo 4-3-3 do Celtic; a squadra a l'ha rigaçou da-o punto dond'a s'æ fermâ con O'Neill, comme s'a se fûse resvegiâ da un incubo per tornâ a-a normalitæ.

O defensô centrale Liam Scales o l'è tornou a-a fuxon de rendimento ch'o l'aveiva de feua primma de fâ a spola drento e feua da a defeiza a trei do françeize.

Callum McGregor o l'ha dettou i tempi de zeugo de neuvo e i esterni do Celtic, Yang e Sebastian Tounekti, an avúo libertæ d'attacco dòppo ese stæti impiegæ comme terçin d'ala da l'ex allenatô do Columbus Crew.

O Celtic o l'ha avúo o 78% de possesso balla, effettuando 22 tiri in pòrta contro i sôli trei do United. Sotta a guida de Nancy i aversai aveivan de media 12 tiri, e o mæximo United o n'aveiva fati 17 sôlo quattro settemane fa, inta vittoria pe 2-1 contro i Hoops a Tannadice.

O Celtic o l'ha schiccou o United fin da-o prinçipio, con Kieran Tierney decisivo inta creaçion de diværse occaxoin into primmo tempo.

O terçin scinistro o l'ha visto un so tiro deviaou in córner, Yang e Scales an menassaou co-i córpi de testa e Maeda o l'ha sfiorou a traversa con un cross basso, primma che a prescion a deise i so frûti a-o 27° menuto.

O dominio do Celtic o l'era coscì netto che Scales o s'è trovou co-a balla a-a limite de l'area e o l'ha servio Yang, ch'o l'ha insaccou con un tiro da 20 metri.

Pòco dòppo Maeda o l'ha svirgolaou a balla, primma che Engels o trovesse o gò do raddoppio de primma intençion sciandando o passaggio de Tierney.

Non tûtto o l'è stæto façile pe-o Celtic into primmo tempo. O terçin dritio messecan Julian Araujo o l'ha rimediou un cartellin giano pe un brutto intervento in sciâ Will Ferry a-o seu debutto da titolâ; Ferry o cloppava ancon mæntre o batteiva a puniçion ch'a n'è derivâ.

Anche o United o l'ha avúo e so chance: Dario Naamo o l'è parsciu indeçiso se colpî de testa o de colpo a volo in sciâ traverson de Craig Sibbald e o l'ha finio pe no fâ ninte, mæntre Owen Stirton o l'ha sfiorou o gò doe vòtte.

L'attaccante o l'è stæto primma fermou da un grande intervento defenscivo de Scales, dòppo avei riçevúo un regalo da Auston Trusty, e ciù tardi o l'ha tirou feua de pòco da 18 metri, aprofeitando de l'atattezamento pascivo da defeiza centrale do Celtic.

A-o rientro da-o tempo, o United o l'ha inserio l'esterno Amar Fatah a-o pòsto do median de rottura Pan Camara, ma o Celtic o l'è stæto ancón ciù padron do campo inta segonda fraçion de zeugo.

Reo Hatate e Maeda an sbaliou de bònne occaxoin, primma che Nygren o trafezesse o portê sotta a traversa da doe passee a-o 63° menuto.

Maeda o l'ha avúo un gò façile sei menuti dòppo, in sciâ repaçion do portê dòppo un tiro de Tounekti.

L'attaccante o l'è stæto primma fermou da un grande intervento defenscivo de Scales, dòppo avei riçevúo un regalo da Auston Trusty, e ciù tardi o l'ha tirou feua de pòco da 18 metri, aprofeitando de l'atattezamento pascivo da defeiza centrale do Celtic.

A-o rientro da-o tempo, o United o l'ha inserio l'esterno Amar Fatah a-o pòsto do median de rottura Pan Camara, ma o Celtic o l'è stæto ancón ciù padron do campo inta segonda fraçion de zeugo.

Reo Hatate e Maeda an sbaliou de bònne occaxoin, primma che Nygren o trafezesse o portê sotta a traversa da doe passee a-o 63° menuto.

Maeda o l'ha avúo un gò façile sei menuti dòppo, in sciâ repaçion do portê dòppo un tiro de Tounekti.

O Celtic o sbran-a o Dundee United a-o rientro de O'Neill

Torna a normalitæ a-o Celtic Park: i campioin do Celtic se assegûan un netto 4-0 contro o Dundee United e a so primma partia sensa subî gò da l'urtima vòtta che Martin O'Neill o l'era in banchina.

Doe ræ into primmo tempo in çinque menuti, segnæ da Yang Hyun-jun e Arne Engels, an mænnou o Celtic in sciâ via do trionfo, mæntre O'Neill o l'ha fætto o so ritorno in banchina con stile dòppo a breve e desastrosa gestion de Wilfried Nancy.

O subentrou Benjamin Nygren o l'ha marcou o so 11° gò de sta stagion e Daizen Maeda o l'ha insaccou in sciâ rebatûa, eguagiando e doe ciù grende vittorie do Celtic in campionato fin unsettled. Tutte doe ean stæte sotta a direçion de traghettatô de O'Neill, ch'a l'ha portou a sette vittorie in eotto partie.

O Celtic o l'ha reciammou o tecnico de 73 anni lunedì, dòppo avei rescisso o contratto de Nancy a seguito de sei sconfitte - e 18 gò subîi - in eotto incontri.

O caos, a confuxon e a fragilitæ defensciva ch'aveivan caraterizzou a gestion de Nancy son sparîe, co-i Hoops ch'an dæto un taggio a-o distacco e se treuvan a sôli trei punti da-a vetta da clascifica.

Nisciun a-o stadio o se l'è fito meraveggiou a-o vedde O'Neill ripristinâ o clascico modulo 4-3-3 do Celtic; a squadra a l'ha rigaçou da-o punto dond'a s'era fermâ con O'Neill, comme s'a se fûse resvegiâ da un incubo per tornâ a-a normalitæ.

O defensô centrale Liam Scales o l'è tornou a-a costansa de rendimento ch'o l'aveiva de feua primma de patî i continui cangiamenti de ròllo inta defeiza a trei do françeize.

Callum McGregor o l'ha dettou i tempi de zeugo de neuvo e i esterni do Celtic, Yang e Sebastian Tounekti, an avúo libertæ d'attacco dòppo ese stæti impiegæ comme terçin d'ala da l'ex allenatô do Columbus Crew.

O Celtic o l'ha avúo o 78% de possesso balla, effettuando 22 tiri in pòrta contro i sôli trei do United. Sotta a guida de Nancy i aversai aveivan de media 12 tiri, e o mæximo United o n'aveiva fati 17 sôlo quattro settemane fa, inta vittoria pe 2-1 contro i Hoops a Tannadice.

O Celtic o l'ha schiccou o United fin da-o prinçipio, con Kieran Tierney decisivo inta creaçion de diværse occaxoin into primmo tempo.

O terçin scinistro o l'ha visto un so tiro deviaou in córner, Yang e Scales an menassaou co-i córpi de testa e Maeda o l'ha sfiorou a traversa con un cross basso, primma che a prescion a deise i so frûti a-o 27° menuto.

O dominio do Celtic o l'era coscì netto che Scales o s'è trovou co-a balla a-o limite de l'area e o l'ha servio Yang, ch'o l'ha insaccou con un tiro da 20 metri.

Pòco dòppo Maeda o l'ha svirgolaou a balla, primma che Engels o trovesse o gò do raddoppio de primma intençion sciandando o passaggio de Tierney.

Non tûtto o l'è stæto façile pe-o Celtic into primmo tempo. O terçin dritio messecan Julian Araujo o l'ha rimediou un cartellin giano pe un brutto intervento in sciâ Will Ferry a-o seu debutto da titolâ; Ferry o cloppava ancon mæntre o batteiva a puniçion ch'a n'è derivâ.

Anche o United o l'ha avúo e so chance: Dario Naamo o l'è parsciu indeçiso se colpî de testa o de colpo a volo in sciâ traverson de Craig Sibbald e o l'ha finio pe no fâ ninte, mæntre Owen Stirton o l'ha sfiorou o gò doe vòtte.

A-o rientro da-o tempo, o United o l'ha inserio l'esterno Amar Fatah a-o pòsto do median de rottura Pan Camara, ma o Celtic o l'è stæto ancón ciù padron do campo inta segonda fraçion de zeugo.

Reo Hatate e Maeda an sbaliou de bònne occaxoin, primma che Nygren o trafezesse o portê sotta a traversa da doe passee a-o 63° menuto.

hypothesis:
O Celtic o sbran-a o Dundee United a-o rientro de O'Neill

Torna a normalitæ a-o Celtic Park: i campioin do Celtic se assegûan un netto 4-0 contro o Dundee United e a so primma partia sensa subî gò da l'urtima vòtta che Martin O'Neill o l'era in banchina.

Doe ræ into primmo tempo in çinque menuti, segnæ da Yang Hyun-jun e Arne Engels, an mænnou o Celtic in sciâ via do trionfo, mæntre O'Neill o l'ha fætto o so ritorno in banchina con stile dòppo a breve e desastrosa gestion de Wilfried Nancy.

O subentrou Benjamin Nygren o l'ha marcou o so 11° gò de sta stagion e Daizen Maeda o l'ha insaccou in sciâ rebatûa, eguagiando e doe ciù grende vittorie do Celtic in campionato fin unsettled. Tutte doe ean stæte sotta a direçion de traghettatô de O'Neill, ch'a l'ha portou a sette vittorie in eotto partie.

O Celtic o l'ha reciammou o tecnico de 73 anni lunedì, dòppo avei rescisso o contratto de Nancy a seguito de sei sconfitte - e 18 gò subîi - in eotto incontri.

O caos, a confuxon e a fragilitæ defensciva ch'aveivan caraterizzou a gestion de Nancy son sparîe, co-i Hoops ch'an dæto un taggio a-o distacco e se treuvan a sôli trei punti da-a vetta da clascifica.

Nisciun a-o stadio o se l'è fito meraveggiou a-o vedde O'Neill ripristinâ o clascico modulo 4-3-3 do Celtic; a squadra a l'ha rigaçou da-o punto dond'a s'era fermâ con O'Neill, comme s'a se fûse resvegiâ da un incubo per tornâ a-a normalitæ.

O defensô centrale Liam Scales o l'è tornou a-a costansa de rendimento ch'o l'aveiva de feua primma de patî i continui cangiamenti de ròllo inta defeiza a trei do françeize.

Callum McGregor o l'ha dettou i tempi de zeugo de neuvo e i esterni do Celtic, Yang e Sebastian Tounekti, an avúo libertæ d'attacco dòppo ese stæti impiegæ comme terçin d'ala da l'ex allenatô do Columbus Crew.

O Celtic o l'ha avúo o 78% de possesso balla, effettuando 22 tiri in pòrta contro i sôli trei do United. Sotta a guida de Nancy i aversai aveivan de media 12 tiri, e o mæximo United o n'aveiva fati 17 sôlo quattro settemane fa, inta vittoria pe 2-1 contro i Hoops a Tannadice.

O Celtic o l'ha schiccou o United fin da-o prinçipio, con Kieran Tierney decisivo inta creaçion de diværse occaxoin into primmo tempo.

O terçin scinistro o l'ha visto un so tiro deviaou in córner, Yang e Scales an menassaou co-i córpi de testa e Maeda o l'ha sfiorou a traversa con un cross basso, primma che a prescion a deise i so frûti a-o 27° menuto.

O dominio do Celtic o l'era coscì netto che Scales o s'è trovou co-a balla a-o limite de l'area e o l'ha servio Yang, ch'o l'ha insaccou con un tiro da 20 metri.

Pòco dòppo Maeda o l'ha svirgolaou a balla, primma che Engels o trovesse o gò do raddoppio de primma intençion sciandando o passaggio de Tierney.

Non tûtto o l'è stæto façile pe-o Celtic into primmo tempo. O terçin dritio messecan Julian Araujo o l'ha rimediou un cartellin giano pe un brutto intervento in sciâ Will Ferry a-o seu debutto da titolâ; Ferry o cloppava ancon mæntre o batteiva a puniçion ch'a n'è derivâ.

Anche o United o l'ha avúo e so chance: Dario Naamo o l'è parsciu indeçiso se colpî de testa o de colpo a volo in sciâ traverson de Craig Sibbald e o l'ha finio pe no fâ ninte, mæntre Owen Stirton o l'ha sfiorou o gò doe vòtte.

L'attaccante o l'è stæto primma fermou da un grande intervento defenscivo de Scales, dòppo avei riçevúo un regalo da Auston Trusty, e ciù tardi o l'ha tirou feua de pòco da 18 metri, aprofeitando de l'atattezamento pascivo da defeiza centrale do Celtic.

A-o rientro da-o tempo, o United o l'ha inserio l'esterno Amar Fatah a-o pòsto do median de rottura Pan Camara, ma o Celtic o l'è stæto ancón ciù padron do campo inta segonda fraçion de zeugo.

Reo Hatate e Maeda an sbaliou de bònne occaxoin, primma che Nygren o trafezesse o portê sotta a traversa da doe passee a-o 63° menuto.

Maeda o l'ha avúo un gò façile sei menuti dòppo, in sciâ repaçion do portê dòppo un tiro de Tounekti.

source_doc:
The hosts took the lead in the 26th minute via the prolific Diaz as the Real Madrid player showed his scoring instinct.

Achraf Hakimi's corner was headed goalwards by Ayoub El Kaabi and Diaz deflected the ball in from close range.

He has now scored in each of Morocco's five games and extends his own record for most goals by a Moroccan at a single Cup of Nations finals, but left the field late on with a heavily strapped thigh that will be a concern for coach Walid Regragui.

Chances were hard to come by for both sides, but Abde Ezzalzouli headed narrowly over the crossbar from another Hakimi corner, while the latter laid on a headed chance for Saibari that was spurned.

Cameroon were unfortunate not to get a penalty kick when Mbeumo was caught in the box as Mauritanian referee Dahane Beida waved play on, while Georges-Kevin Nkoudou headed wide at the back post with the Indomitable Lions' best chance of the game.

Morocco made it 2-0 minutes later to kill off the contest when Saibari was left unmarked at the back post and had time to control the ball and fire low into the far corner of the net.

Ismael Saibari gave Morocco breathing space against Cameroon (REUTERS)

In Friday's other quarter-final, Iliman Ndiaye scored the only goal as Senegal booked an Afcon semi-final berth for the third time in the last four tournaments, beating 10-man Mali 1-0.

Ndiaye netted after 27 minutes, taking advantage of a goalkeeping howler to put Senegal ahead in a tense derby against their west African neighbours.

Mali were reduced to 10 men for the second half after captain Yves Bissouma was sent off for a second caution on the stroke of halftime.

He was booked first for a clumsy challenge in the 25th minute and was dismissed after a needless foul on Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Mali were down to 10 men from the 26th minute of their previous clash against Tunisia and still managed to squeeze through on penalties but there was no recovery this time around against a polished Senegalese outfit.
instruction: You are a professional Ligurian, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
I padroin de caza son andæti in vantaggio a-o 26° menuto graçie a-o prolifeco Diaz, co-o zogao do Real Madrid ch'o l'ha sfoggiou o sò istinto do gol.

O corner de Achraf Hakimi o l'è stæto colpito de testa verso a porta da Ayoub El Kaabi e Diaz o l'ha deviou o ballon in ræ da vexin.

O l'ha coscì segnou in ciaschedunn-a de çinque partie do Marocco e o l'alonga o sò record de ciù gol segnæ da un marochin inte 'na sola faza finale de a Coppa d'Africa, ma o l'ha lasciou o campo verso a fin co-ina fissa bendatua a-a coscia ch'a saià un motivo de preocupaçion pe l'alenatô Walid Regragui.

E ocaxioin son stæte ræe pe tutte doe e squadre, ma Abde Ezzalzouli o l'ha colpito de testa de poco d'asua de a traversa da un atro corner de Hakimi, mentre quest'urtimo o l'ha servio de testa un'ocaxion pe Saibari ch'a l'è stæta sciupâ.

O Camerun o l'è stæto sfortunou a no dâse l'assegnon de un rigore quando Mbeumo o l'è stæto atterrou in area, co-i arbitro mauritano Dahane Beida ch'o l'ha fæto d'andâ avanti, mentre Georges-Kevin Nkoudou o l'ha colpito de testa a-o lao do segondo palo inte l'ocaxion ciù grossa de a partia pe-i Leoins Indomabili.

O Marocco o l'ha fæto o 2-0 pochi menuti doppo pe serâ a partia, quando Saibari o l'è stæto lasciou smarcou a-o secondo palo e o l'ha avuo o tempo de controllâ o ballon e de tiâ basso de preçixon inte l'angoezo ciù lontan de a ræ.

Ismael Saibari o l'ha dæto sciâto a-o Marocco contro o Camerun (REUTERS)

Inte l'atro quarto de finale de venerdì, Iliman Ndiaye o l'ha segnou o solo gol co-o quæ o Senegal o s'è garantio un posto in semifinale de l'Afcon pe-a terça votta inte urtime quattro ediçioin, battendo o Mali in 10 ommi pe 1-0.

Ndiaye o l'ha insaccou doppo 27 menuti, aprofitando de 'n'errore clamoroso do portê pe mette o Senegal in vantaggio inte un derby tezo contro i vexin de l'Africa ocidentale.

O Mali o l'è rimasto in 10 ommi pe-o segondo tempo doppo che o capitan Yves Bissouma o l'è stæto espulso pe 'na segonda amoniçion proprio in sciô finî do primmo tempo.

O l'era stæto amonio a-o primmo colpo pe un feugo goffo a-o 25° menuto e o l'è stæto mandou feua doppo un fallo inutile in sciô Idrissa Gana Gueye.

O Mali o l'era za rimasto in 10 ommi feua do 26° menuto de a sò partia de primma contro a Tunisia e o l'era pù riêscio a pasâ a-i rigori, ma de sta votta no gh'è stæta nisciun-a rimonta contro 'na squadraccia ben organizâ comm'o Senegal.

O Marocco o l'ha fæto o 2-0 pochi menuti doppo pe serâ a partia, quando Saibari o l'è stæto lasciou smarcou a-o secondo palo e o l'ha avuo o tempo de controllâ o ballon e de tiâ basso de preçixon inte l'angoezo ciù lontan de a ræ.

Ismael Saibari o l'ha dæto sciâto a-o Marocco contro o Camerun (REUTERS)

Inte l'atro quarto de finale de venerdì, Iliman Ndiaye o l'ha segnou o solo gol co-o quæ o Senegal o s'è garantio un posto in semifinale de l'Afcon pe-a terça votta inte urtime quattro ediçioin, beating o Mali in 10 ommi pe 1-0.

Ndiaye o l'ha insaccou doppo 27 menuti, aprofitando de 'n'errore clamoroso do portê pe mette o Senegal in vantaggio inte un derby tezo contro i vexin de l'Africa ocidentale.

O Mali o l'è rimasto in 10 ommi pe-o segondo tempo doppo che o capitan Yves Bissouma o l'è stæto espulso pe 'na segonda amoniçion proprio in sciô finî do primmo tempo.

O l'era stæto amonio a-o primmo colpo pe un feugo goffo a-o 25° menuto e o l'è stæto mandou feua doppo un fallo inutile in sciô Idrissa Gana Gueye.

O Mali o l'era za rimasto in 10 ommi feua do 26° menuto de a sò partia de primma contro a Tunisia e o l'era pù riêscio a pasâ a-i rigori, ma de sta votta no gh'è stæta nisciun-a rimonta contro 'na squaddra ben organizâ comm'o Senegal.

This guy helps me with all my chores.
My cat sitter spoils my cats with treats, so I need to give them some treats because they're probably like, what the heck, mom?
All right, boys.
I didn't really make you work for that.
Go get it.
No, Gunnar.
Gunnar is so mean.
instruction: You are a professional Ligurian, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Va ben, figgieu.

Andæ a pigiâlo.

source_doc:
@hannorein@mastodon.social sooo, we’re tagging verified human content now for them to have a dataset with less slop to train on?
I don’t know, they should asphyxiate from their own barfed up slop mess they’ve created until their latent vector space converges to unity.

@helpsterTee @hannorein My first thought as well. I killed off my personal site since I didn't want to feed the various Torment Nexuses. Marking genuine human content just makes building new, unpoisoned and slop free data sets easier.
I thought about doing the opposite and building a "poison pot" for AI crawlers but my poor little server is not that beefy.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social yeah, if we suffer, let them suffer.
If your employer stuffs AI in your daily routine, instead of resigning, use malicious compliance and apply it to totally mundane problems and embrace slightly-wrong answers while burning through corporate token credit to ruin quarterly performance.
I’m so fed up with this and they’re using it anyways against us, so let’s have a little fun, while we can 🫤
Edit: they’re making up numbers all the time and faking profits for a while now, the usage that’ll bankrupt your employer won’t place a dent at slop headquarters unprofitable scam business anyways or their forest burning slopetuum mobile.
instruction: You are a professional Ligurian, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ligurian, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
@hannorein@mastodon.social dónca, d'ancheu mettemmo e tichete a-i contegnûi umain verificæ coscì lô g'han un dataset con meno rumenta da dâghe in pastura pe l'adestramentu?
No se saiâ, doviévan sofocâ inte de fango de rumenta ch'han dæto de vomito e ch'han drento scinn-a-o ponto che o so spaçio vetoriale latente o n'andese a fónde inte 'n'unicitæ.

@helpsterTee @hannorein O mæ mæsimo primmo pensero. Ho scassòu o mæ scito personale perché no voévo dâ da mangiâ a-i vari "Torment Nexus". Marcâ i contegnûi umain autentichi o rende solo ciù façile o compito de creâ di dataset nêuvi, netti e sensa rumenta.
Pensâvo de fâ o contraio e creâ 'na "pignatta de velen" pe-i crawler de l'IA, ma o mæ poveo carretta de server o n'é mia coscì fòrte.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social scì, se sofrimmo niatri, che se l'asogno anche lô.
Se o to datore de travaggio o te mette l'IA inte l'ativitæ de tutti i giorni, invece de dâ e dimiscioìn, fanni 'n'obediença mâvisiosa e dónca adòvrala pe di problemi do tutto banali e piggia de bòn graddo e risposte de pægio sbaliaæ, consumando o credito de gettoìn de l'azienda pe ruinâ e prestaçioìn trimestrali.
Ne n'ho proprio pin i scasçio d'ògni cösa, e lô a dêuva p'asæ contra de niatri, alantô dònca devertemmonse 'n po' scinn-a-a giornâ ch'as pêu 🫤
Cangiamentu: s'inventan de longo de scifre e fàn finta de fâ di goagni da 'n bel peçço d'ancheu, l'ûzo che fese fallî o to datore de travaggio no lasciâ manco un ségno in sciâ truffa improdutiva do quartê generâle da rumenta, ni d'ancheu in sciâ so machina perpetua de rumenta ch'arde i boschi.
hypo_1:
@hannorein@mastodon.social alôa, mettemmo de tichete a-o contegnûo uman verificòu coscì lô g'han un dataset con meno rumenta d'adestrâse d'asæ?
No se saiâ, doviévan sofocâ into so mæsimo vomito de rumenta ch'han creòu, scinn-a-o ponto che o so spaçio vetoriâ latente o converze inte 'n'unitæ.

@helpsterTee @hannorein O mæ mæsimo primmo pensero. Ho dæto o corpo de graçia a-o mæ scito personâ da-o momento che no voévo dâ da mangiâ a-i vari Torment Nexus. Marcâ o contegnûo uman outentico o rende solo ciù façile fâ di dataset nêuvi, netti e sensa rumenta.
Pensâvo de fâ o contraio e d'andâ a creâ 'na "pignatta de velen" pe-i crawler de l'IA, ma o mæ poveo carretta de server o n'é mia coscì fòrte.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social scì, se sofrimmo niatri, che se l'asògno lô ascì.

source_doc:
What's the matter with you?
Are you in a trance or something?
You're in the wrong lane.
Oh, I'm sorry.
Helen.
There goes my whole week's salary.
I haven't had a full paycheck since Christmas.
Oh, that's all going to be changed tonight.
But, gee, what if they just say strike and leave us out on a limb?
They won't.
Our demands are reasonable.
Yeah.
If I lose this job, it'll mean pedaling, chewing gum and lead pencils for me.
I ain't a looker.

Once upon a time in a kingdom of great beauty.
There was a beast of a property market.
We have seen 40 houses.
The market's just too fast.
Prices are realistic.
If only there was a fearless hero to save the day.
I could kiss you.
Or a fairy godmother.
To make dreams come true.
Oh, angel.
But we live in the real world.
They'll just have to make do with us.
We're back.

source_doc:
right, so, as i was saying, i dmed this very well known and very friendly seeming artist-type person and gave em the usual spiel:
- how bridge works
- how to bridge
- please do so because i want to follow you and reblog some of your stuff that i like
- if you don't want to, that's fine
and they responded "not doing that" which is all well and good but then they blocked me???
just like, for absolutely no fucking reason

not naming any names because i do NOT dislike anybody involved and i certainly do not want to incite any brigading, but this has happened with several people now, including people who have REBLOGGED AND LIKED BRIDGED POSTS FROM THIS ACCOUNT (my main), which is WHY I WANTED TO FOLLOW THEM

if they had just said "no thanks" they would have gotten an "ok, perfectly understandable! :)" or the like from me, but now everyone has to put up with my confused ranting instead. i'm not even angry, i'm just *genuinely baffled*

bsky people, is this a genuine issue over on your platform (because it's one i've almost *never* had over here on this side of the bridge) or am i just running into bad apple after bad apple

I honestly don't know what people's general feelings are about enabling the Bridgy Fed here, because that's just not a topic that ever comes up tbh (unfortunately)… But there's definitely some subset of people here who are super trigger-happy about the block button, I'm not a fan of this either.

hypo_0:
alua, scio, comm'allæ che dizevo, ho scrîto in privou a 'n'artista super conosciûo che o pæva ascì tònto amichevole e gh'ho dæto o mæ sùbito descurso:
- comme fonçionn-a o bridge
- comme fâ o bridge
- pe piasê fallu perché te veuggio vegnî apreuvo e rebloggâ un pö de ròbbe che me piâxen
- se t'urtisce, va ben pægio
e lù o m'ha risposto "manco pe sònno" che o va bén, pe caritæ, ma donca o m'ha bloccou???
coscì, sensa nisciun fottuo motivo

no fasso de nomi perché no gh'ho ninte contro nisciun de quelli in mezo e de seguo no veuggio scatenâ de lincisamenti, ma m'é za capitou con diverse person-e, compreizo de gente che HAN REBLOGGOU E METTÛO "ME PIÂXE" A DE PÒST BRIDGÆ DA QUESTO ACCOUNT (o mæ prinçipâ), ch'O L'É O MOTIVO PE-O QUALE VEGGIO VEGNÎGHE APREUVO

se m'avesan dæto solo un "no grassie", gh'avieiva risposto "ok, perfettaménte conprensibile! :)" ò quarcòssa do genere, ma coscì òua tutti quanti s'han da beccâ o mæ sfogo confûzo. no son manco arraggiou, son solo *propio scioccou*

gente de bsky, ma o l'é 'n problema d'alòstra in sciâ vostra piataforma (perché da 'sta parte do ponte o m'é succesùo pratticamente *mai*) ò son solo mi ch'encontro sèmpre e de peme d'asua

sinceraménte no so cöse a gente a ne pense do fâ funçionâ Bridgy Fed de chi, perché a dâ o mægno a l'é 'na ròbba ch'a no salta fœua quæxi mai (purtroppo)... Ma gh'é de seguo un gruppo de person-e de chi ch'en super façili a scorrî o dæo in sciô tasto de blòcco, no me piaxe manco a mi 'sta ròbba chi.

All right, I'm gonna be over here making pasta.
With, like, I don't know if it's gonna work.
The way you do it is.
Wait, what are you doing?
I'm doing it.
I don't like.
It.
This is how you do it.
I've watched.
Guys.
This is.
Nothing's gonna go wrong.
You're gonna take a clump of flour, a little bit of salt, mix it around, you're gonna make a little well in the middle, and that's where you're gonna pour a touch of olive oil.
But mainly like an egg's worth of the liquid aquafaba.

Progress after a while off. I got the sewing machine out to do the bill and a crown seam. Half the crown sewn plus the bill, resting atop the paper form made from the pattern. I had to rip and re-sew the machine stitch because I pinned along instead of across the seam and went off track. I might re-do the bill if I want a little more depth.
#millinery

Eight crown panels and two bill panels assembled into three pieces and pinned for general shape. Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern in green velvet. Mostly machine stitched.
The pattern calls for topstitching along the seams of the crown panels, which might suggest either matching or contrasting thread.
#millinery

Top view before I sew the crown halves together. Reviewing the how-to video. I see Sachi is using a few tiny spring clips during sewing instead of pinning the whole seam.

A bit of a messy join on the eight panels coming together at the peak of the newsboy cap, so I am thinking a larger button may be in order to disguise the seams.

Crown fully pieced, with cloth covered.button at peak. Raw edges loosely tucked under. Seams neither pressed nor topstitched.
#millinery

source_doc:
I'm doing a eekly 1hr meeting where I'm going over with a director of engineering my soap box on managing a product management organization and actually it's coming out to be a pretty good episodic thing

Topics have been
- different types of product managers and the basic skill sets in developing requirements
- how product managers ensure an ongoing cadence for an engineering team
- dealing with product managers with varying backgrounds (engineering, data analyst, operational SME, consulting etc)
what's been fun is that this Director and I worked at a previous company with product managers that I didn't manage and I'm able to reference "hey remember that person? that person was awesome and here's why."

so in various email chains and slack threads I'll forward them to said director (if he's already not in there) and be like "ok a GOOD product manager would do THIS" and a "BAD product maanger would do THAT" rememember when so and so did THIS? that was good.

hypo_0:
Fasso 'n'encontro de n'ora a-a settemann-a con un dretô de l'inzegneria d'un produto do mæ d'ingambæ, e in sciâ fin o sta vegnindo feua comme 'na serie de rinfreschi de tæra ben fæta

I argomenti son stæti
- diversi tipi de product manager e e competense de baze pe sviluppâ i requixiti
- comme i product manager asseguano un ritmo de travaggio regolâ a un team de inzegneria
- comme gestî i product manager con de prepasçioin diverse (inzegneria, analixi di dæti, esperti de ssettô d'operaçioin, consulensa ecc.)
A cossa diverteinte a l'è stæta che sto dretô e mi emmo travaggiou inte 'na ditta de primma con de product manager che no gestiva mi e me ven de dî: "oh, t'arregordi de quella person-a? Quella person-a a l'ea formidabile, e o mottevo o l'è questo."

Alua inte varie discussioin via email e scingovi in scia slack ghe i inoltro a-o dretô (se o no ghe l'ha za) e ghe diggo "allua, un BON product manager o fæscia QUESTO" e un "CATIVO product manager o fæscia QUELLO" t'arregordi quando pægo-la o l'ha fæto QUESTO? Quello o l'ea bon.

source_doc:
$partner has a video consult with Ikea to quote for a fitted kitchen. It's a fascinating glimpse into the ecosystem of online services for boomers.
1. They send link for video consult, three weeks ago. It uses Ikea's proprietary videoconf solution
2. They request the designs & 3D renders for the new kitchen
3. they send an email saying "thanks for sending through the design
4. We dial in today, they start the call with "our system blocked your files, let's design your kitchen together"
1/x

5. Partner asks if there's any way to share the (very detailed, took us like a full man week to put together) designs, but the Ikea salesdrone is on a script, and isn't having a bar of it.
6. The next step in the script is "laboriously do the design from scratch over the phone with the client, hunting and pecking on the keyboard and not fast using the UI of their design software"
2/x

7. They cannot share their screen, so it's a clown show of repeated misunderstanding about which part of which image is being referred to

8. the clock has just ticked past what should have been the full consult, and they're 35% the way thru getting the required measurements.

9. So far there's been literally 8 minutes of salesdrone laboriously inputting the measurements supplied
