hypo_0:
O $partner o gh'à 'na video-consulensa con l'Ikea pe-o preventivo de 'na cuxinn-a a-a mezua. L'è 'na fanta-scoverta de l'ecosistema de servixi online pe-i boomer.
1. Mandan o colegamento pe-a video-consulensa tréi setemann-e fa. Se dœuvia a piataforma de videoconferensa proprietaria de l'Ikea
2. Demandan i disegni e i render 3D pe-a nœuva cuxinn-a
3. Mandan 'na mail co-scritto "grazie de avei spedio o disegno"
4. Se coleghemmo ancœu, e començan a ciamâ con "o nòstro scistema o l'à blocou i vòstri file, fémmo o disegno da cuxinn-a insemme"
1/x

5. O partner o domanda se se pœu in quarche mòddo condivide i disegni (super detagiæ, gh'emmo misso squæxi 'na setemann-a de travagio pe fâli), ma l'impiegato de l'Ikea o va avanti col copion e o n'en vœu savei do bòn.
6. O passo sucesivo do copion o l'è "rifâ fadigozamente o disegno da zero a-o telefòno co-o cliente, sciortindo e pigiando inscia tastêa e andando a-o rallen-to co-o software de progietasion"
2/x

7. No pœuan condivide o schermo, donca l'è 'no sciò de cloun de continui incontrendi insci-o quæ parte de quæ inmagine se sta a parlâ

8. L'orològio o l'à a-o d'alôa sorpasou o tenpo de domandâ pe tutta a consulensa, e son a-o 35% do travagio pe pigiâ e mezue che ghe vœu.

9. Fin a l'ora gh'è stæto leteralmente 8 menuti de l'impiegato ch'o l'inserisce fadigozamente e mezue dæte

5. O partner o domanda se se pœu in quarche mòddo condivide i progieiti (super detagiæ, gh'emmo misso squæxi 'na setemann-a de travagio pe fâli), ma o robot de l'Ikea o va drito co-o sò copion e o n'en vœu savei mànco a-o bando.
6. O passo sucesivo do copion o l'è "rifâ fadigozamente o progietto da zero a-o telefòno co-o cliente, sciortindo e pigiando tasto pe tasto inscia tastêa e andando a rinfuso co-o software de progietasion"
2/x

7. No pœuan condivide o schermo, donca l'è 'na comédia de continui incontrendi insci-o quæ parte de quæ inmagine se sta a parlâ

8. L'orològio o l'à a-o d'alôa sorpasou o tenpo de domandâ pe tutta a consulensa, e son a-o 35% do camìn pe pigiâ e mezue ch'o vœu.

9. Fin a l'ora gh'è stæto leteralmente 8 menuti de l'impiegato ch'o l'inserisce fadigozamente e mezue dæte

source_doc:
I just had a very nice #dream that I made friends with Lee Chaeyeon. I just started talking to her nand the next thing I know, I have stayed over her house (like when the French kidnapped me for Christmas) and she is telling me to go up stairs and "shuffle up a little bit" (her English was generally excellent) by which she meant "tidy up a little bit" to show her mom we were ready to eat.
She comes upstairs to "shuffle up" her room and starts making gestures to explain what she means ...
1/

(she was always so excited to see me in this dream) because I was taking my coat off instead of "shuffling up."
Then she indicates this little piece of paper and says she has left me an autograph but in return she wants this little trading card I made in second grade of "50 Spikes," a sonic knock-off, obviously with more spikes. (This card actually exists IRL BTW). I start explaining to her what it is and if she really wants it (she did) I at least needed a picture of her holding it.
2/

Partly because I would miss it, but also, otherwise no one would believe me that she had wanted this thing from me.
It was then I realized we still didn't have each others' phone numbers.
3/3

The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ligurian, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
Ho mæmo fæto un belliscimo #seugno d'avei strinto amiçizia con Lee Chaeyeon. Ho comensou a parlâghe e a mæxima rionda m'atruvo a dormî a sò caza (un po' comme quando i françixi m'aveivan rapio pe-o Dênâ) e lê ch'a me dize d'andâ de d'alto e "shuffle up a little bit" (in generale o sò ingleize o l'êa bòn d'asbaio) ch'a voeva dî "arandâ un po'" pe mostrâ a sò mamma che n'êamo pronti a mangiâ.
A monta de d'alto lê ascì pe "arandâ" a sò camera e a comensa a fâ de mosse pe spiegâ quello ch'a voeva dî...
1/

(a l'êa de longo cosscì feliçe de vedeme in sto seugno) dæto che me stavo levando o cappotto invece d'"arandâ".
Insc'o ciù a me mostra un tòcco de carta e a dize ch'a m'ha lasciou un autografo ma in cangio a veu unna d'anchelle cartolinn-e de scangio ch'aveivo fæto a-e elementari de "50 Spikes", unna coppiassa de Sonic, logicamente con ciù ponte. (Sta cartolinn-a a g'ha d'andio da bon fêua do seugno, d'altronde). Inandio a spiegâghe cossa l'è e se d'asbaio a-a voese pròpio (sci, a-a voeva) m'andava d'avei a-o manco unna fòto de lê co-a cartolinn-a in man.
2/

In parte perché me saieiva rincresciuo fane a meno, ma ascì perché, se no, nisciun m'avieiva credúo ch'a voeva proprio sta cossa da mi.
L'è steto lì ch'me son rezo conto che n'aveivamo ancon i nòstri nummeri de telefono.
3/3

source_doc:
Oh.
Over here.
I was like, I swear I saw better ones online.
Oh, this is the one I looked at.
It's like a blue tie dye color where I could go with this purple one.
What one were you thinking?
That's a kit.
Has a strap in it.
Um.
Oh, and a block.
I saw people with these blocks in the class yesterday.
Because when you're doing like certain stretches and you can't reach the ground, it like really helps.

source_doc:
@hacks4pancakes What do you think is actually going on?
Confused? Anxious? Executive Dysfunction? Unrealistic? Bone idle?
(I'm NOT confusing ND with idleness in my internal ontology here, but I wonder if either might be contributing...)

@hacks4pancakes @DamonHD Foe emigration at least, I can imagine myself saying “oh I’m so jealous, I would LOVE to do that” when the truth is there are internal or external reasons why I wouldn’t/couldn’t and someone offering to help me with the logistics wouldn’t change that so I politely decline.

@darryl @hacks4pancakes The grown-up way to politely decline would be "I got ahead of myself: I cannot do that for other reasons much as I'd like to", not brushing it off as a diary issue!

Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. hypo_0:
@hacks4pancakes Cosa ti pansi ch'asceia de bòn sucedendo?
Confûzo? Ansciôzo? Disfunsion esecutîva? Fêua da-a realtæ? Pigro marso?
(No ligo miga a neurodivergensa a-a pigrîxia inta mæ testa, ma me domando se tute doe e cöse pœudan infloensâ...)

@hacks4pancakes @DamonHD S'o fise pe emigrâ, a-o manco, me pœu tòrta de dâ de dize “oh alignments che dæscia, me piæxæ de bòn fâlo” quande a prioritæ a l'é che gh'é de raxoìn de drento o de fêua pe-e quæ no vœuggio o no pœusso, e se quarchedun m'agiutase con l'organizasion no canbierebba ninte, donca dize de no d'un bòn d'oâ.

@darryl @hacks4pancakes A manêa da person-a gràn pe dize de no d'un bòn d'oâ a l'inn-a de dize "me son lanciao tròppo in avanti: no pœusso fâlo pe d'atre raxoìn, anche se me piæxæ", no sghindiâlo comme un prublem-a d'agenda!

Out there.

Yes.

Dond'o l'é, Bill?
Là fêua.
No gh'andæ d'arêto stasêia, dònne?
G'avemmo 'na sorprijâ pe voi.
O pâ interessante.
Tommy, t'aspeita e ti vedriâ.
Pronto?
Scignorìa.
Pronto, Jim.
M'han dâto d'ésse quarchedun pe-a sâla de stasêia.
T'on pènse mica ch'o m'andese drento a-a coxìnn-a s'o savese ch'e m'atrévo a fâ 'n sciòpero, vêu?
T'ê bèllo fûbo, d'acòrdio?
Te pêu dâga a gambe?
Sì.
Dâm'un menûto pe cangiâme de vèstia.

source_doc:
@rechelon extremely unpopular is one way of putting it… i don’t live in berlin but i think people everywhere had roughly the same response, which is “fuck these assholes for doing something that leaves so many uninvolved people without electricity and treating it like necessary collateral damage”. I’ve seen lots of people speculate that it was a false flag to make the left look bad. Not that the cops care, they are probably giddy with excitement now (a gross thing to imagine) that they have a pretense to raid and criminalize the leftist scene.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Yeah, I mean it seems like there's still about half a dozen anticivs raised on meme accounts who are shocked the scene didn't stand with them, but are extremely shocked that old timer anticivs who felt disrespected by said crew and haven't backed them.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
I do worry that we'll see a self-justification spiral where a handful of anticivs get so mad at the movement for not supporting their super based attack on the civilized that they end up in ITS level shit within a year or two of isolation and seething.

hypo_0:
@rechelon dî ch'o l'è "estremamente antipatitico" o l'è doçemente dita… mi no staggo a Berlin ma penso che a gente dapartutto a l'agge avúo ciù o meno a mæxima reaçion, vali a dì "andæ a-o paize de scioe, sciàmme de melle, pe avei fæto unna ròbba ch'a lassa cosci tænta gente ch'a no g'intra ninte sensa dæta e aveila tratâ comme s'a fise un dâno collaterale inevitabile". Gh'ho visto tænta gente pensâ che fise unna farsa pe fâ parê brutta a sanca. No che a-i polisiòtti ghe n'emporte quarcosa, probabile che se sàbbin de gioia (unn'idêa fêda) òua che g'han a scusa pe fâ de perquixiçioin e fâ deventâ criminâ a scena de sanca.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Sci, vœgio dî che parreçche ch'aggh'é ancon unna meza dozena de anti-çiviltæ cresciùi a pan e meme che son de stascia che a scena no l'agge pigiòu e so parte, ma son sorvetutto de stascia do fæto che i vegi anti-çiviltæ, che se son sentiæ pigiæ pe-o culo da dita banda, no l'aggian dæto o so sostegno.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
G'ho a pæura che vederemo unna spirale de auto-giustificaçion dova unna man de anti-çiviltæ se raggia cosci tænto con o movimento pe no avei supportòu o so attacco super ffigo a-a çiviltæ che gh'arivan a finî inte de ròbbe do livello di ITS inte un anno o doî de isolamento e fotta.

source_doc:
@ptoothfish why do all of the kids’ IMDb headshots look like they’re screen grabs from This Person Does Not Exist dot com? 😬

@bloodflowersburning yup the whole production machine is giving uncanny valley
even if they are real kids underneath, i wonder how much tuning up their images get 😬
smiles widened, dimples accentuated, etc
i stand by my assertion they will be treated like hot-swappable parts if they do anything complicated like have an opinion or grow into their faces wrong

@ptoothfish oh they absolutely will. There’s probably even some contract clauses that lands them in deep weta if they even sneeze wrong.

source_doc:
```json
[
  "Lookin’ Good",
  "Boost Your Business !",
  "Shoppable Instagram Posts are just a few clicks away",
  "Let customers order directly from your Instagram posts when you’re powered by Mambalo.",
  "Tap to tag products",
  "Home decor for lovely places like yours",
  "Unleash the power of email with Mailchimp",
  "Use your Mambalo purchase data to segment your email list and create targeted campaigns for current and potential customers.",
  "Share discount coupons",
  "Collect emails with a sign-up form",
  "Short on time? Make ‘em automated",
  "Unleash the power of email with MailChimp",
  "Facebook & Google Retargeting: How to Turn Your Visitors Into Customers",
  "Every visitor on your site is an opportunity to make a sale.",
  "You can sit and wait when your visitors remember your brand, or… You can bring customers back to your online store with remarketing. And that’s no rocket science — read this article to learn how to get started.",
  "Facebook retargeting ads will appear on Facebook sites, and they get about two billion visits every month.",
  "The word “dynamic” in the term means that something in the ads changes – in this case, the items displayed in the ad. To give you a proper understanding of how it works, let’s go through some examples.",
  "We also have a visitor named Janet. Janet also finds the Awesome Super Shoes store on Google. She likes our Red Shoes, but it is four days to her payday and she is short on cash, so she leaves the store website without making a purchase.",
  "Five days later, she is on Facebook, browsing her friends’ posts. Between the posts, she can see an Awesome Super Shoes ad with the Red Shoes she already liked. Since she got her paycheck yesterday, she decides to spoil herself and buy the shoes.",
  "In the evening, he goes through several review sites about running shoes. Since most of the sites are on the Google Display Network, one of them runs an Awesome Super Shoes ad with the Running Shoes Jared has already looked at. He hasn’t found better shoes yet and he’s quite tired, so he decides to buy the Running Shoes.",
  "And that is what dynamic retargeting is about. No matter how visitors get to your webpage, if they don’t purchase anything, they’ll see your ads with the product they were interested in.",
  "Hit launch campaign and that’s it. No coding, no messing with CSV files, no stress. The process is the same for Google remarketing ads.",
  "We can’t wait to learn how you’re doing retargeting in your Mambalo store. Tell us in the comments below!"
]
```

The original text is from software data. Translate the content of json, without translating keys and placeholders (i.e. copy them rather than translate them). Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Produce a valid json output that matches the input format. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
```json
[
  "Bel d'aspeto",
  "Fâ cresce a teu ditta!",
  "I post de Instagram acatabili son a pochi clic de distansa",
  "Lassa che i cleinti ordinen dretamente da-i teu post de Instagram graçie a Mambalo.",
  "Toca pe taggâ i prodotti",
  "Decoraçion pe-a caza pe pòsti delisiosi comme o teu",
  "Scatena a potensa de l'e-mail con Mailchimp",
  "Deuvia i dæti de l'acato de Mambalo pe segmentâ a teu lista de e-mail e creâ de campagne miræ pe cleinti de crowdfunding e potençiali.",
  "Condividdi i coppoìn de sconto",
  "Chegghi i e-mail con un modulo de regiastraçion",
  "Poco tempo? Falli d'ofiçio",
  "Scatena a potensa de l'e-mail con MailChimp",
  "Retargeting de Facebook e Google: comme trasformâ i teu vizitatoî in cleinti",
  "Ogni vizitatô in sciô teu scito o l'è un'oportunitæ pe fâ 'na vendia.",
  "Te peu asetâ e aspêtâ che i teu vizitatoî se ramentoan do teu marchio, ò... te peu fâ tornâ i cleinti into teu negozio online co-o remarketing. E no l'è sciensa di raçi — lezi st'articolo pe aprandio comme començâ.",
  "I ads de retargeting de Facebook aparan in sci sciti de Facebook, e ottegnan circa doî miliardi de vizite a-o meize.",
  "A paròlla \"dinamico\" inte questo termine a scignifica che quarcosa inte l'anunçio o cangia – in questo cazo, i articoli deventæ inte l'anunçio. Pe dâte una bon-a conprension de comme o fonçion-a, andemmo con di ezenpi.",
  "Ghemmo ascì 'na vizitatrixe de nome Janet. Anche Janet a treuva o negozio Awesome Super Shoes in sciô Google. Ghe piaxen e nòstre Scarpette Rosse, ma ghe mancan ancón quattro giorni a-o stipendio e a l'è a-o d'ascon de palanche, donca a lascia o scito do negozio sensa fâ nisciun acato.",
  "Çinque giorni dòppo, a l'è in sciô Facebook, a sfeugiâ i post di so amixi. Tra i post, a peu vedde un anunçio de Awesome Super Shoes con de Scarpette Rosse che ghe piaxeivan za. Siccome a l'ha piggiòu o so stipendio ieri, a decide de fâse un regalo e acatâ e scarpette.",
  "A-a seja, o va a fâ un gio in sci di sciti de recenscion de scarpette da corsa. Siccome a ciu parte di sciti son in sciô Google Display Network, un de questi o gh'ha un anunçio de Awesome Super Shoes con de Scarpette da corsa che Jared o l'ha za amiòu. O no l'ha ancón trovòu de scarpette megio e o l'è assæ stancho, donca o decide de acatâ e Scarpette da corsa.",
  "E questo o l'è de che se tratta o retargeting dinamico. Pâ che i vizitatoî arian a-a teu pagina, se no acatan ninte, veddiàn i teu anunçi co-o prodotto a-o quæ ean interesæ.",
  "Sciacca lansa a campagna e l'è fæto. Nisciun codice, nisciun destorbo con i file CSV, nisciun stress. O proçesso o l'è o mæzo pe i ads de remarketing de Google.",
  "No veddemmo l'ora de savei comme te fæ o retargeting into teu negozio Mambalo. Dillo inte risposte de sotta!"
]
```

source_doc:
Arthur Okonkwo's penalty shootout heroics causes FA Cup shock as Wrexham beat Nottingham Forest

Wrexham won an FA Cup third-round thriller in front of Hollywood owner Ryan Reynolds as Nottingham Forest were dumped out of the competition on penalties after a 3-3 draw.

Arthur Okonkwo was the Wrexham hero with stops from Igor Jesus and Omari Hutchinson giving them a 4-3 victory on spot-kicks after Josh Windass, Callum Doyle, George Thomason and Jay Rodriguez had converted from the spot.

First-half goals from Liberato Cacace and Oliver Rathbone gave Wrexham early control and had Reynolds trading high fives and hugs from his vantage point in the main stand.

Jesus cut the deficit before Dominic Hyam's diving header restored Wrexham's two-goal advantage with 16 minutes remaining.

Forest looked dead and buried but substitute Callum Hudson-Odoi produced two outstanding finishes, the equaliser coming in the 89th minute.

Wrexham have won three successive promotions to go from non-league to the Championship, but this was the first time since being taken over by Reynolds and fellow actor Rob Mac nearly five years ago they had met Premier League opposition.

Forest made eight changes after beating West Ham on Tuesday, with goalkeeper Matz Sels, Jesus and Hutchinson remaining and Wales international Neco Williams on a stacked bench at his local club.

Callum Hudson-Odoi came off the bench and scored twice to force the match to penalties (REUTERS)

Kieffer Moore was not risked after injury as Wrexham sought to extend a four-game winning streak that had taken them a point from the Championship play-off places.

Forest started on the front front with Jesus shooting over and Douglas Luiz found the net after 17 minutes.

Referee Paul Tierney initially awarded the goal, but then ruled it out after deciding Luiz had controlled the ball with his arm before volleying home.

Wrexham had been tidy in possession without a cutting edge but that was to change in the final 10 minutes of the first half.

Ollie Rathbone doubled Wrexham's lead after Liberato Cacace's opener (REUTERS)

Sam Smith dragged wide before Cacace took advantage after 37 minutes to drive home his maiden Wrexham goal from 20 yards aided by the faintest of deflections off Morato's heel.

Wrexham smiles were even wider three minutes later as Rathbone broke through Morato's challenge to fire in his third goal in four games.

It should have been three - and possibly contest over - when Smith scampered through the Forest half unchecked but failed to beat Sels" outstretched leg.

Forest boss Sean Dyche made a triple substitution at half-time with Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White and Nicolas Dominguez sent on to salvage the situation.

Okonkwo saved the decisive penalty to deny Omari Hutchinson in the shootout (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

The visitors were instantly more fluid as Okonkwo tipped over Luiz's free-kick and kept out Nicolo Savona's strike.

Sels saved well from Broadhead but Forest were in the ascendancy and struck when Savona set up the leaping Jesus for a header that hit the post and just about crossed the line.

The drama rose as Hyam headed in a superb George Dobson free-kick and Hudson-Odoi swept home 60 seconds later to set up a grandstand finish.

Hudson-Odoi took the tie into extra time in fantastic fashion, taking a touch on his chest and lofting a perfect volley over Okonkwo, but Wrexham were not to be denied their first top-flight FA Cup scalp for 26 years.

Sean Dyche made eight changes to the Forest side and called on his first choice players but couldn't get over the line (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Elsewhere in the FA Cup, Oxford United advanced to the fourth round with a 4-3 penalty shootout win over MK Dons and Port Vale defeated Fleetwood 1-0.

Wigan Athletic also progressed after a superb display at Deepdale saw the League One side beat Championship play-off chasers Preston North End 1-0 as well.

hypo_0:
E proeççe de Arthur Okonkwo inti rigori portan a una sorpneiza in FA Cup: o Wrexham o batte o Nottingham Forest

O Wrexham o l'ha goagnou un'emozionante partia do terso turno de FA Cup davanzo a-o sò proprietâio de Hollywood Ryan Reynolds, co-o Nottingham Forest eliminou a-i rigori doppo un pari pe 3-3.

Arthur Okonkwo o l'è stæto l'eroe do Wrexham, parando iti de Igor Jesus e Omari Hutchinson pe dâ a-a sò squaddra a vittoia pe 4-3 a-i rigori, doppo che Josh Windass, Callum Doyle, George Thomason e Jay Rodriguez aveivan segnou da-o rebelin.

I gò de Liberato Cacace e Oliver Rathbone into primmo tempo aveivan dæto a-o Wrexham o controllo de l'incontro in framesca, co-o Reynolds ch'o dâva de man battee e e l'abracciava i presenti da-a sò tribuna d'onô.

Jesus o l'ha redûto e distanse primma che un colpo de testa in tuffo de Dominic Hyam o dæse torna o doggio vantaggio a-o Wrexham a 16 menûti da-a fin.

O Forest o pæsciava ormai spacciou, ma o subentrou Callum Hudson-Odoi o l'ha sfregou doas finisoe de classe, co-o gò do pari a-o menûto 89.

O Wrexham o l'ha ottegnûo træ promoçioin consecutive passand da-e categorie diletantistiche a-a Championship, ma questa a l'era a primma votta che incontrava un avversâio de Premier League da quando, squæxi çinque anni fa, o club o l'è stæto rilevou da Reynolds e da-o collega attô Rob McElhenney.

O Forest o l'ha fæto eito cangiamenti doppo avei battûo o West Ham martedì, mantegnindo sôlo o portê Matz Sels, Jesus e Hutchinson, con l'internaçionâ gallese Neco Williams in panchinna into club da sò çitæ.

Callum Hudson-Odoi o l'è introu da-a panchinna e o l'ha segnou doas votte pe portâ a partia a-i rigori (REUTERS)

Kieffer Moore o l'è stæto tegnûo a-o repouso doppo un infortûnio, co-o Wrexham ch'o çercava de prolungâ una serie de quattro vittoie consecutive ch'a l'aveiva portou a un sôlo ponto da-a zona play-off de Championship.

O Forest o l'ha començou in avanti con Jesus ch'o l'ha tirou d'alto, e Douglas Luiz o l'ha trovou o gò doppo 17 menûti.

L'arbitro Paul Tierney o l'aveiva inisialment concesso o gò, ma o l'ha pœi annulou decidendo che Luiz o l'aveiva controllou o ballon co-o brasso primma de sbatte a-a ræ a-o volo.

O Wrexham o l'era stæto ordenou into possesso ballon ma sensa incixivitæ, ma e cose son cangiæ inti urtimi 10 menûti do primmo tempo.

Ollie Rathbone o l'ha radoggiou o vantaggio do Wrexham doppo o gò d'avertûa de Liberato Cacace (REUTERS)

Sam Smith o l'ha tirou a-o scianco primma che Cacace o l'aproveitasse a-o menûto 37 pe dâ a-a ræ o sò primmo gò co-o Wrexham da 20 metri, agiutou da una lezera deviaçion do tacco de Morato.

I sorrisi do Wrexham son diventæ ancon ciùampi tre menûti doppo, quando Rathbone o l'ha superou o contrasto de Morato pe dâ a-a ræ o sò terso gò in quattro partie.

O poeiva drentâ o terso – e fòscia partia finia – quando Smith o l'è scappou via de rionfela inta dæta do Forest sensa ostacoli, ma o n'ha d'atinto a superâ a gamba de Sels ch'a s'allungava.

L'allenatô do Forest Sean Dyche o l'ha compio un triplo cangiamento a-o repouso, mandando in campo Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White e Nicolas Dominguez pe sarvâ a situaçion.

Okonkwo o l'ha parou o rigore decisivo a Omari Hutchinson inta sequensa di tiri (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

I ospiti son stæti da sùbito ciù fluidi con Okonkwo ch'o l'ha dæto un colpo d'eito d'arba a-o puniçion de Luiz e o l'ha respinto o tiro de Nicolo Savona.

Sels o l'ha parou ben sciù Broadhead, ma o Forest o l'era in crescita e o l'ha segnou quando Savona o l'ha servio l'elevaçion de Jesus pe un colpo de testa ch'o l'ha piccou contro o palo e o l'ha superou de poco a linia.

O dramma o l'è cresciou quando Hyam o l'ha segnou de testa sce un gran puniçion de George Dobson, e Hudson-Odoi o l'ha insaccou 60 segondi doppo pe preparâ un finale de fœgo.

Hudson-Odoi o l'ha portou a sfida a-i supplementari in mòddo fantastico, stoppando o ballon de petto e fando un pallonetto perfetto a-o volo de d'alto a Okonkwo, ma o Wrexham o n'ha d'atinto renunçiâ a-o sò primmo scalpo de mascima serie in FA Cup da 26 anni.

Sean Dyche o l'ha compio eito cangiamenti inta squaddra do Forest e o l'ha ciammou i sò zugoe de primma scelta, ma o n'ha d'atinto superâ l'ostacolo (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

In atrove in FA Cup, l'Oxford United o l'ha d'atinto o quarto turno con una vittoia pe 4-3 a-i rigori contro o MK Dons, e o Port Vale o l'ha sconfiggiou o Fleetwood pe 1-0.

Anche o Wigan Athletic o l'ha pasou o turno doppo una prestaçion eçesçionâ a Deepdale ch'a l'ha visto a squaddra de League One batte pe 1-0 anche o Preston North End, pretendente a-i play-off de Championship.

Ollie Rathbone o l'ha radoggiou o vantaggio do Wrexham doppo o gò d'avertûa de Liberato Cacace (REUTERS)

Sam Smith o l'ha tirou a-o scianco primma che Cacace o l'aproveitasse a-o menûto 37 pe dâ a-a ræ o sò primmo gò co-o Wrexham da 20 metri, agiutou da una lezera deviaçion do tacco de Morato.

I sorrisi do Wrexham son diventæ ancon ciù ampi tre menûti doppo, quando Rathbone o l'ha superou o contrasto de Morato pe dâ a-a ræ o sò terso gò in quattro partie.

O poeiva drentâ o terso – e fòscia partia finia – quando Smith o l'è scappou via de rionfela inta dæta do Forest sensa ostacoli, ma o n'ha d'atinto a superâ a gamba destesa de Sels.

L'allenatô do Forest Sean Dyche o l'ha compio un triplo cangiamento a-o repouso, mandando in campo Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White e Nicolas Dominguez pe sarvâ a situaçion.

Okonkwo o l'ha parou o rigore decisivo a Omari Hutchinson inta sequensa di tiri (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

I ospiti son stæti da sùbito ciù fluidi con Okonkwo ch'o l'ha dæto un colpo de d'alto a-o puniçion de Luiz e o l'ha respinto o tiro de Nicolo Savona.

Sels o l'ha parou ben sciù Broadhead, ma o Forest o l'era in crescita e o l'ha colpîo quando Savona o l'ha servio l'elevaçion de Jesus pe un colpo de testa ch'o l'ha piccou contro o palo e o l'ha varcou de poco a linia de porta.

O dramma o l'è cresciou quando Hyam o l'ha segnou de testa sce un gran puniçion de George Dobson, e Hudson-Odoi o l'ha insaccou 60 segondi doppo pe preparâ un finale de fœgo.

Hudson-Odoi o l'ha portou a sfida a-i supplementari in mòddo fantastico, stoppando o ballon de petto e fando un pallonetto perfetto a-o volo de d'alto a Okonkwo, ma o Wrexham o n'ha d'atinto rinunçiâ a-o sò primmo scalpo de mascima serie in FA Cup da 26 anni.

Sean Dyche o l'ha compio eito cangiamenti inta squaddra do Forest e o l'ha ciammou i sò zugoe de primma scelta, ma o n'ha d'atinto superâ a riga de traguardo (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

In atrove in FA Cup, l'Oxford United o l'ha d'atinto o quarto turno con una vittoia pe 4-3 a-i rigori contro o MK Dons, e o Port Vale o l'ha sconfiggiou o Fleetwood pe 1-0.

Anche o Wigan Athletic o l'ha pasou o turno doppo una prestaçion eçesçionâ a Deepdale ch'a l'ha visto a squaddra de League One batte pe 1-0 anche o Preston North End, ch'o lutta pe i play-off de Championship.
hypo_5:
L'eroicitæ de Arthur Okonkwo a-i rigori a l'ha dæto vitta a un córpo de scena in FA Cup: o Wrexham o batte o Nottingham Forest

O Wrexham o l'ha goagnou un thriller a-o terso turno de FA Cup davanzo a-o sò proprietâio de Hollywood Ryan Reynolds, co-o Nottingham Forest ch'o l'è stæto eliminou da-a competiçion a-i rigori doppo un pari pe 3-3.

Arthur Okonkwo o l'è stæto l'eroe do Wrexham, parando i tiri de Igor Jesus e Omari Hutchinson e dando a-i sò a vittoia pe 4-3 da-o rebelin doppo che Josh Windass, Callum Doyle, George Thomason e Jay Rodriguez aveivan segnou i sò rigori.

I gò do primmo tempo de Liberato Cacace e Oliver Rathbone aveivan dæto a-o Wrexham o controllo do zeugo in prinçipio e aveivan fætto scambiâ a Reynolds "batti çinque" e abraççi da-o sò pòsto de fôrza inta tribuna prinçipâ.

Jesus o l'ha redûto o svantaggio primma che un colpo de testa in tuffo de Dominic Hyam o dæse torna e doe ræ de vantaggio a-o Wrexham a 16 menûti da-a fin.

O Forest o pæsciava spacciou, ma o subentrou Callum Hudson-Odoi o l'ha sfregou doe finisoe de classe, co-o gò do pari a-o menûto 89.

O Wrexham o l'ha ottegnûo træ promoçioin consecutive passand da-e serie diletantistiche a-a Championship, ma questa a l'era a primma votta che incontrava un avversâio de Premier League da quando, squæxi çinque anni fa, o club o l'è stæto rilevou da Reynolds e da-o collega attô Rob McElhenney.

O Forest o l'ha fæto eito cangiamenti doppo avei battûo o West Ham martedì, mantegnindo sôlo o portê Matz Sels, Jesus e Hutchinson, con l'internaçionâ gallese Neco Williams in panchinna into club da sò dæta.

In atrove in FA Cup, l'Oxford United o l'ha d'atinto o quarto turno con una vittoia pe 4-3 a-i rigori contro o MK Dons, e o Port Vale o l'ha sconfiggiou o Fleetwood pe 1-0.

Anche o Wigan Athletic o l'ha pasou o turno doppo una prestaçion eçesçionâ a Deepdale ch'a l'ha visto a squaddra de League One batte pe 1-0 anche o Preston North End, ch'o lutta pe i play-off de Championship.

source_doc:
In a surprise Inspector Clouseau twist, I now have an extra thing to investigate for Spooky Kitties Sciences!
I was doing a quick scroll through the evenings secondary camera video, when I spotted a curious The Inspector standing on the trunk of the tree near the feeding station. Kept jumping around, finding him near where the magpies had been, so I initially suspect(edit) he was simply chasing them as they sometimes let him do, until I randomly chance stop...
#SpookyKittiesSciences

There Inspector Clouseau was, rolling around like crazing about 2 meters NE of the tree, mostly hidden by the unfortunate placement of the awnings east post. Still, there he was for 5 minutes, at which point he ran back up the tree, walked across the lawn to the hill, flattened himself at the bottom, and then ran off camera, presumably in the middle of The Zoomies.
2/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Now, as some of my Spooky Kitties Sciences readers may know, the motivations behind that tests are not just to entertain the kitties. While the most important aspect is the genuine curiosity I had seeing the kitties rolling around in the snow, I really wanted to find something that The Inspector liked. I came out of the initial testing with only a single moment to hint that he liked something. What that was is still a mystery.
3/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

source_doc:
Just so you know, Harriet and I didn't actually get back together.
What?
But I saw you kiss her.
Joan.
My acting like I liked you turned real.
And now I'm all confused because I got what I wanted.
But I don't think I want it anymore.
Like that time my parents got Fergie to perform at my ninth birthday and I was like, oh, this is sick.
Then she actually performed and I was like, oh, I forgot what Fergie sounds like.
Does that make sense?
It makes all the sense.

Joan.
U mæ recitâ cumme se te me piêsci u l'è diventòu de l'atru.

source_doc:
```json
[
  "Set up and manage a Facebook Store right from your Mambalo dashboard. Forget social sharing. You’re ready for social selling.",
  "Easily add, promote, and sell products, or manage all your Facebook advertising in just a few clicks — right from your Mambalo dashboard.",
  "Convert window shoppers to paying customers with Facebook remarketing. With a few clicks, we’ll create hyper-targeted ads to remind your customers about products they considered but didn’t buy.",
  "Sell everywhere",
  "Set up and manage a Facebook store right from your Mambalo dashboard. Forget social sharing. You’re ready for social selling.",
  "Worried about the extra management? Mambalo automatically syncs your product information from your online store with Facebook, so any changes you make will instantly appear in your Facebook ecommerce store. Do it once and forget it.",
  "Advertising your Facebook store — made easy",
  "The Facebook Pixel makes advertising on Facebook much more effective. Easily market to your ideal audiences based on the actions they have taken in your online store and track their conversions. Not only do you know exactly who you’re advertising to, but you also have a better understanding of how your ads are performing. All in all, you can make your messaging more powerful, leading to a better return on your advertising dollars.",
  "Remarket. To everyone who visits your site, or just to people who visit specific pages or take specific actions.",
  "Streamlined shipping and taxes: Integrates with major carriers such as USPS, UPS, FedEx, and many others internationally to automatically calculate shipping rates.",
  "WordPress e-commerce Capabilities: Add your online store to WordPress and showcase the same products, prices, and descriptions on your Facebook store as your WordPress storefront or any other site builder like Weebly, Wix, and Adobe Muse.",
  "E-commerce mobile apps: With Mambalo’s free iOS and Android apps, you can manage sales, track inventory, and accept online payments wherever you are.",
  "PCI DSS validated level 1 service: Provides 55+ payment options and secure HTTPS checkout capabilities to ensure you comply with PCI DSS Level 1 requirements.",
  "Is it possible to migrate my store from WooCommerce to Facebook with Mambalo?",
  "I am still confused and need extra help with the Mambalo Facebook commerce app. What should I do?",
  "Don't forget about our Knowledge Base, either. If you want to learn about Mambalo basics, how to manage your Mambalo Facebook store, and other Mambalo Facebook commerce app topics, our Knowledge Base may prove to be a great resource.",
  "The Mambalo team is happy to help you too. Feel free to send us a message at any time, and we will respond as soon as possible.",
  "Google Smart Shopping takes your products beyond Google search to help you advertise across Shopping, YouTube, Gmail, and the Google Display Network.",
  "Maximize sales without the guesswork",
]
```

The original text is from software data. Translate the content of json, without translating keys and placeholders (i.e. copy them rather than translate them). Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Produce a valid json output that matches the input format. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
```json
[
  "Configura e gestisci un Negozio Facebook do direto da-o teu pannello de controllo Mambalo. Smentega a condivision sociale. Ti t'ê pronto pe-a vendita sociale.",
  "Azorzi, promuovi e vendi i teu prodotti in modo façile, ò gestisci tutta a teu publicitæ in sce Facebook in pochi clic — do direto da-o teu pannello de controllo Mambalo.",
  "Converti i vixitatoâ in cliénti paganti co-o remarketing de Facebook. Con pochi clic, creiemo inserçioin super-miræ pe regordâ a-i teu cliénti i prodotti ch'an amiòu ma ch'an dæto aprêuvo a no accatâ.",
  "Vendi dappertutto",
  "Configura e gestisci un negozio Facebook do direto da-o teu pannello de controllo Mambalo. Smentega a condivision sociale. Ti t'ê pronto pe-a vendita sociale.",
  "T'ê inansiòu pe de ciù de gestión? Mambalo o sincronizza in outomatico e informaçioin di teu prodotti da-o teu negozio online con Facebook, coscì che quande t'efettoî di cangiamenti, sti chi saian sùbito vixibili into teu negozio e-commerce de Facebook. Fallo una vòtta e smentegatene.",
  "Publicitæ do teu negozio Facebook — resa façile",
  "O Pixel de Facebook o rende a publicitæ in sce Facebook molto ciù efficaxe. Fanni marketing in modo façile a-o teu pùbrico ideâ in baze a-e açioin ch'an za fæto into teu negozio online e traccia e so converscioin. No solo ti t'asæ de preciso a chi t'ê aprêuvo a fâ publicitæ, ma t'aviæ ascì una megio conprension de comme stan andando e teu inserçioin. Tutto sommòu, ti pêu rende i teu mesaggi ciù efficaci, otegnindo un megio ritorno de dinâ spixi in publicitæ.",
  "Fanni Remarketing. Pe chiunque o vixite o teu scito, ò solo pe e personn-e ch'an vixitòu de pàgine specifiche ò ch'an conpîo de açioin specifiche.",
  "Spediçioin e tascie semplificæ: Se integra co-i prinçipæ corrieri comme USPS, UPS, FedEx e tandi atri a livello internaçionâ pe calcolâ in outomatico e tariffe de spedicion.",
  "Fonsionalitæ de e-commerce pe WordPress: Azorzi o teu negozio online a WordPress e mostra i mæximi prodotti, prezzi e descriçioin into teu negozio Facebook propiamente comme into teu scito de WordPress o con quarsiaxi atro costruttore de sciti comme Weebly, Wix e Adobe Muse.",
  "App de e-commerce pe telefonin: Co-e app gratuitte de Mambalo pe iOS e Android, ti pêu gestî e vendite, tracciâ l'inventaio e acetâ pagamenti online ovunque ti t'asæ.",
  "Serviçio validòu PCI DSS de livello 1: O fornisce ciù de 55 opçioin de pagamento e fonsionalitæ de pagamento sicuro HTTPS pe aseguâ che ti rispetti i requixiti PCI DSS Livello 1.",
  "È cornersce migrare o mæ negozio da WooCommerce a Facebook con Mambalo?",
  "Son ancón confuzo e g'ho de bezegno de ciù agiuto co-a app de e-commerce de Mambalo pe Facebook. Cose doviéiva fâ?",
  "No smentegâ manco a nòstra Base de Conoscensa. Se ti t'ê aprêuvo a inparâ e bazi de Mambalo, comme gestî o teu negozio de Facebook con Mambalo e atri argomenti in sce l'app de e-commerce de Mambalo pe Facebook, a nòstra Base de Conoscensa a se pêu rivelâ un'ottima risorsa.",
  "O team de Mambalo o l'è feliçe d'agiutate ascì. Sentiti lìbero de mandane un mesaggio in quarsiaxi momento, e te rispondiemo o ciù fastezo poscibile.",
  "Google Smart Shopping o porta i teu prodotti d'on de là da-a riçerca de Google pe agiutate a fâ publicitæ in sce Shopping, YouTube, Gmail e a Ræ Display de Google.",
  "Massimizza e vendite sensa andâ a taston",
]
```

source_doc:
Ironing the lightweight green corduroy for my first try at the Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern. I don't know how I feel about the recommendation to use interfacing but it probably does want something to stiffen and thicken it a bit.
#millinery

Sachi's newsboy cap pattern advises to cut the crown pieces diagonal to the weave ("on the bias") to allow more stretch around the circumference but that will make the corduroy rows run aslant, where I prefer them vertical.
We shall see. This is the test cookie to get a feel for the pattern. I like corduroy for texture but green wouldn't be my first choice, and this fabric is lightweight enough that I should add a layer, whether interfacing or what-have-you from the stash.

On a second look, my fabric isn't corduroy at all, it's just velvet, so I can cut at 45° to the fabric weave like Sachi suggests in the Newsboy Cap pattern and it won't look strange.
#millinery

hypo_0:
Stiro o velluo a coste verde e finto pe-o mæ primmo tentativo co-o modello do berretto Newsboy Cap de Sachi's Studio. No so miga cöse pensâ do conseggio de deuviâ a teletta termoadesiva, ma de seguo ghe voe quarcosa pe rinforsâlo e fâlo vegnî in pochin ciù fito.
#millinery

O modello do berretto newsboy de Sachi o conseggia de taggiâ i pesci da colotta in diagonâ rispetto a-a trama ("in sbieco") pe dâgh’un po' ciù de elasticitæ in sciâ circonferensa, ma coscì e righe do velluo a coste deventieivan torte, mentre mi e preferiscio driti.
Vedremo. Questo o l'é o mæ test pe capî com'o va o modello. O velluo a coste o m'onze pe-a consistensa ma o verde o no saieiva a mæ primma deçision, e sto tesciù o l'é coscì finto che doveiva azzonze un strato, che sajeiva a teletta termoadesiva o quarcosa do genere che gh'ò in casa.

A fâghe câzo megio, o mæ tesciù o no l'é manco velluo a coste, o l'é solo velluo liscio, donca posso taggiâlo a 45° rispetto a-a trama do tesciù comm'o dize Sachi inte l'arbanese do Newsboy Cap e o no faià un strano efetto.
#millinery

source_doc:
Tonight in #MMRPG! My back finally shuts up enough that I can GM again as the heroes continue their search for the missing girl Cammie. Vega the Digital Dragon surprises a trio of mischievous scamps who snuck into her arcade in the middle of the night but one of them recognizes her as a town superhero and they end up having a heartwarming moment geeking out over video games. Unfortunately, the moment is interrupted by somebody or something landing on the roof of the arcade... 1/?

Vega goes to investigate and finds Dr. Vesper, in his monstrous bat form that the press has dubbed the "Gargoyle Man," along with a harpy-like creature that Vesper describes as his "little protegee." Vesper says that they have come to introduce themselves and invite Vega to join their society of man-creature misfits that is led by "The Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton of the Laughton Institute. 2/?

Vega buys some time to get the mischievous scamps out of the arcade and call the rest of the Mythics for backup, then plays along at being interested in joining this "new family." Vesper and Harpy (who does not speak once during the interaction) lead Vega to a ship in the harbor, where the Laughton Institute appears to be packing up their things... presumably because they know they're drawing attention from Agent Carter and A.R.G.E.N.T. among others. 3/?

hypo_0:
Stasera in #MMRPG! Flâno a-a schinn-a ch'a me dâ in sciô fia, coscì posso fâ tórna o GM intanto che i nòstri eròi van avanti a çercâ a dàmizela sparia Cammie. Vega o Drago Digitâle a fâ una surpréia a tréi barafòre ch'en intræ d'ascondon inte n'arca-de-göghi in mezo a-a nòtte, ma un de lô o-a riconósce cómme supereròe da çitæ e va a finî ch'an un moménto bèllo e doçe a parlâ de d'avanti a-i dæti di video-göghi. Pe de sgràçia o moménto o vên ruttâ dacant'a quarchecosa o quarchedun ch'atterra in sciô téito de l'arca-de-göghi... 1/?

Vega a va a amiâ de che se tràtta e a treuva o Dr. Vesper, inta so fòrma de ræzo-lapo mostruozo che a stànpa a ciamma "L'Òmmo Gargoyle," inséme a 'na creatûa ch'a pâ 'na fùria che Vesper o definisce a so "piccin-a protetta." Vesper o dixe ch'en vegnûi a prezentâse e a invitâ Vega a unîse a-a so soçietæ de creatûe d'ommo fêua da-o comùn guidâ da "A Madama," a Dra. Diana Laughton de l'Istitûto Laughton. 2/?

Vega a goâgna do ténpo pe fâ sciortî i tréi barafòre da l'arca-de-göghi e a ciamma o rèsto di Mythics de rinfòrso, e pöi a fâ fìnta d'êse d'accòrdio inte l'unîse a sta "neuva famìggia." Vesper e Fùria (ch'a no dâ voxe manco 'na vòtta intanto) portan Vega a un vàscello into pòrto, donde l'Istitûto Laughton o pâ ch'o segge a arremandâ e so ròbe... fòscia percòse san ch'an l'atencion de l'Agénte Carter e de A.R.G.E.N.T. d'arredosso. 3/?
hypo_1:
Stasera in #MMRPG! Flâno a-a schinn-a ch'a me dâ in sciô fia, coscì posso fâ tórna o GM intanto che i nòstri eròi van avanti a çercâ a dàmizela sparia Cammie. Vega o Drago Digitâle a fâ una surpréia a tréi barafòre ch'en intræ d'ascondon inte so sala-göghi in mezo a-a nòtte, ma un de lô o-a riconósce cómme supereròe da çitæ e va a finî ch'an un moménto bèllo e doçe a fâ i rinfotæ in sciô discórso di video-göghi. Pe de sgràçia o moménto o vên ruttâ dacant'a quarchecosa o quarchedun ch'atterra in sciô téito da sala-göghi... 1/?

Vega a va a amiâ de che se tràtta e a treuva o Dr. Vesper, inta so fòrma de ræzo-lapo mostruozo che a stànpa a ciamma "L'Òmmo Gargoyle," inséme a 'na creatûa ch'a pâ 'na fùria che Vesper o definisce a so "piccin-a protetta." Vesper o dixe ch'en vegnûi a prezentâse e a invitâ Vega a unîse a-a so soçietæ de creatûe d'ommo fêua da-o comùn guidâ da "A Madama," a Dra. Diana Laughton de l'Istitûto Laughton. 2/?

Vega a goâgna do ténpo pe fâ sciortî i barafòre da sala-göghi e a ciamma o rèsto di Mythics de rinfòrso, e pöi a fâ fìnta d'êse d'accòrdio inte l'unîse a sta "neuva famìggia." Vesper e Fùria (ch'a no dâ voxe manco 'na vòtta intanto) portan Vega a un vàscello into pòrto, donde l'Istitûto Laughton o pâ ch'o segge a arremandâ e so ròbe... fòscia percòse san ch'an l'atencion de l'Agénte Carter e de A.R.G.E.N.T. d'arredosso. 3/?

source_doc:
My brother in He-Who-Shall-Not-Be-Named, what you are describing is a consequence of _misogyny_, not "misandry."

I desperately need men to realize that just because it's directed at them and an actual serious problem doesn't mean it is "misandry."
Just saw someone describe being discriminated against _for being considered effeminate_ as "misandry" and I just.

It's not that you aren't experiencing something real. You very well may be. But it isn't "misandry." Because "misandry" doesn't exist.
Yes, this applies to trans men as well. "Transmisandry" _also_ isn't a thing and just contributes to anti-feminist narratives. It treats itself as a mirror of transmisogyny, but transmisogyny is _intersective_: we experience transphobia _and_ we experience misogyny _and_ we experience this unholy thing that happens when the two interact. It's not a subset, even an exclusive subset, it's an intersection.
But the following all are absolutely problems that can be talked about!
* Transphobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmasculity
* Transemasculation
* Misogyny
It sucks to be discriminated against, but the language that we use is so, so important here.

The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ligurian, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
Fræ mæ in Colù-ch'o-no-se-pêu-nominâ, quello che t'ê aprêuvo a descrîve l'é 'na conseguensa de _misoginia_, no de "misandria".

Gh'ho pròpio de bezégnu che i òmmi capiscian che sôlo perché 'na ròba a l'é indirissâ contro de lô e a l'é 'n problêma d'asæ serio, questo o no veu dî ch'a segge "misandria".
Ho apen-a visto un ch'o descrivéiva o fætto d'êse discriminòu _perché consideròu efeminòu_ comme "misandria" e mi davvei.

O no l'é che ti no t'agge provòu quarcosa de reâ. L'é probabiliscimo che t'o dagghe provòu. Ma a no l'é "misandria". Perché a "misandria" a no l'existe.
Sci, questo o vale cracks anca pe-i òmmi trans. Manco a "transmisandria" a l'é 'na ròba ch'a n'existe, e a no fæ atro che alimentâ i discorsi anti-feministi. A se pón-e comme o spegio da transmisoginia, ma a transmisoginia a l'é _interfaciâ_: niatri prövemo a transfobia _e_ prövemo a misoginia _e_ prövemo sta ròba tremenda ch'a succede quando e doe se incroxan. No l'é 'n soto-insemme, manco 'n soto-insemme sclusivo, l'é 'n'interseçion.
Ma questi chì sotta son tutti problêmi sacrosanti de quæ se pêu parlâ!
* Transfobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmascolinitæ
* Transemascolinaçion
* Misoginia
O fa schifo êse discriminæ, ma o lenguaggio che deuviemo o l'é cosci, cosci importante chì.

Gh'ho pròpio de bezégnu che i òmmi capiscian che sôlo perché 'na ròba a l'é indirissâ contro de lô e a l'é 'n problêma d'asæ serio, questo o no veu dî ch'a segge "misandria".
Ho apen-a visto un ch'o descrivéiva o fætto d'êse discriminòu _perché consideròu efeminòu_ comme "misandria" e mi davvei no gh'ho paròlle.

O no l'é che ti no t'agge provòu quarcosa de reâ. L'é probabiliscimo che t'o dagghe provòu. Ma a no l'é "misandria". Perché a "misandria" a no l'existe.
Sci, questo o vale anca pe-i òmmi trans. Manco a "transmisandria" a l'é 'na ròba ch'a n'existe e a no fæ atro ch'alimentâ i discorsi anti-feministi. A se pón-e comme o spegio da transmisoginia, ma a transmisoginia a l'é _interseçionale_: niatri prövemo a transfobia _e_ prövemo a misoginia _e_ prövemo sta ròba tremenda ch'a succede quando e doe se incroxan. No l'é 'n soto-insemme, manco 'n soto-insemme sclusivo, l'é 'n'interseçion.
Ma questi chì sotta son tutti quanti problêmi ch'on pêu parlâne eccome!
* Transfobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmascolinitæ
* Transemascolinaçion
* Misoginia
O fa schifo êse discriminæ, ma o lenguaggio che deuviemo o l'é cosci, cosci importante chì.

source_doc:
High Noon review - Billy Crudup brings classic Hollywood western back with a bang

How do you turn a classic Hollywood western into West End musical fare? Add songs, many of Bruce Springsteen's in this case, along with a few rounds of line dancing and a sizzling star in Billy Crudup. Still, it's an odd experience initially as Thea Sharrock's production switches from one brief filmic scene to the next, and the endeavour seems as wooden as the clapboard saloon-bar slats that comprise the handsome set.

As a piece of theatre, it finds its flow. As a debate play, though, it gathers a locomotive energy as it travels towards the showdown between Frank Miller (James Doherty), who is returning to this "dirty little village in the middle of nowhere," and the marshal Will Kane (Crudup) who put him behind bars. That is mostly because of the uncanny and urgent relevance of this 1952 film about a community working out (or rather, squirming out of) its civic responsibilities around institutional wrongdoing.

Originally an allegory of McCarthyism (its screenwriter, Carl Foreman, was blacklisted), the story sets the cowardice of the many against the courage of the few - in this case, the lone, heroic Kane, who mobilises his defence against Miller and his henchmen after being let down by the townsfolk. The film was blasted by John Wayne as un-American for its critical portrait of the community; the production comes to life in its arguments on collective in/action and seems to speak directly about the dilemmas facing the cowboy country of Trump's America (the shooting in Minneapolis just the latest example). Eric Roth's script uses many lines from Foreman's screenplay but fleshes out the debates on the ethical stance of a community in the face of wrongdoing and misguided American myths around immigration.

Cowardice of the many, courage of the few ... cast of High Noon. Photograph: Johan Persson

There is also the joint talent of Crudup and the ever agile Denise Gough who play the central couple on their wedding day. She is Amy Fowler, a Quaker who abhors the actions of violent men; he is the marshal who has just given up his "tin star" to start over as a shopkeeper. That is, until news reaches town that Miller is arriving on the noon train.

Gary Cooper made the role entirely his own, his integrity comparable only to Gregory Peck's Atticus in To Kill a Mockingbird. So Crudup has his long shadow to evade. He manages to hold up the part on stage as an upstanding, earnest and increasingly desperate man. Gough makes her part grittier and more modern than that of her film counterpart, Grace Kelly. The pair are convincing as a couple although their narrow characterisation hems in the full scale of their abilities.

Several other characters seem too flimsy, from Billy Howle's deputy marshal, Harvey Pell, to Rosa Salazar's Mexican businesswoman, Helen, although the affinity between her and Amy is refreshing, and Roth gives more voice and texture to these women as a whole.

Several of Springsteen's songs bring their own American politics (from the frontier optimism of Land of Hope and Dreams to The Rising, written in response to 9/11). Some are sung a cappella, mostly by Gough, who is a strong singer, her voice emanating desolation, but she reprises I'm on Fire one too many times.

It seems like a reluctant musical at times, the songs short and thin but the percussive music and sound design are always arresting, as is the lighting, designed by Neil Austin, which brings emotional clarity and intrigue. A clock is central to Tim Hatley's set design, counting down to the train's thrilling arrival and the subsequent showdown, which manages to contain tension and drama, despite the difficulty of staging a cross-town shootout.

For all its early stiffness, it builds in momentum and there are moving moments. Ultimately, the political message speaks loudest, harnessing the McCarthyist fear of then and the Trumpian terror of today.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
Recension de High Noon - Billy Crudup o sponcia o clascico western de Hollywood con un gran scioppo

Com'on se fa a trasformâ un clascico western de Hollywood inte 'n musical do West End? Se ghanzan de cansoìn, de quelle de Bruce Springsteen in de sto caxu, insemme a quarche gio de line dance e a una stella ch'a brûxa comme Billy Crudup. Eppû, a l'iniçio a l'è un'esperiença bizzarra mentre a produçion de Thea Sharrock a passa da una breve scena de film a l'âtra, e l'impreza a pâ legnosa comme e ascse de legno do saloon ch'allestisciân o beu senario.

Comme euan de tiatro, a trêuva o so ritmo. Comme euan de dibattito, scine, a piggia l'energia de una locomotiva mentre a viagia verso o scontro finale tra Frank Miller (James Doherty), ch'o sta pe tornâ in de sto "brutto paesin in mezo a-o nente", e o marshal Will Kane (Crudup) ch'o l'aveiva misso drento. Questo o l'è sorvattuttu pe via de l'attualitæ misteriosa e urgente de sto film do 1952 in sciâ de unna comunitæ ch'a risolve (o megio, ch'a se darseneustra de) e so responsabilitæ civiche in sce de ingiustiçie de l'itituto.

In orizine un'allegoria do maccartismo (o so sceneggiatô, Carl Foreman, o l'era finio in sciâ lista neigra), a stoia a mette a vigliaccheria di tanti contra o coraggio di pochi - in de sto caxu, o sôlo, eroico Kane, ch'o prepaa a so defeisa contro Miller e i so scherani doppo d'ese steto abbandonòu da-a gente do paise. O film o l'era steto criticòu da John Wayne comme anti-american pe-o so ritratto critico de-a comunitæ; a produçion a piggia vitta inte so discuscioìn in sciâ de l'in/açion collettiva e a pâ ch'a parle dritto di dilemmi de l'America cowboy de Trump (a sparatoia de Minneapolis a l'è sôlo l'urtimo eixempio). A sceneggiatûa de Eric Roth a deuvia tante battûe de quella de Foreman ma a dæ ciù corpo a-i dibattiti in sciâ moralitæ de unna comunitæ de fronte a-o mâ e a-i miti american sbaliæ in sciâ de l'immigraçion.

Vigliaccheria di tanti, coraggio di pochi ... o cast de High Noon. Fotografia: Johan Persson

Ghe l'è ascì o talento combinòu de Crudup e de l'agile Denise Gough ch'interpretân a cobbia protagonista o giurnu do so maiæzo. Læ a l'è Amy Fowler, unna quacchera ch'a detesta l'açion di ommi violenti; lù o l'è o marshal ch'o l'ha appeza a so "stella de latta" pe comensâ da capo comme negoziante. Questo, aomenu finché o no riva in paise l'avvixo che Miller o sta pe rivâ con o treno do mezogiorno.

Gary Cooper o l'aveiva fæto so o rêuo do tutto, a so integritæ a se poeiva paragonâ sôlo a-o Atticus de Gregory Peck in To Kill a Mockingbird. Alua Crudup o gha a so ombria grande da scanpâ. O riesce a mantegnî a parte in scenâ comme un omo onesto, serio e sempre ciù desperòu. A Gough a rende a so parte ciù dùa e ciù moderna de quella do so omologo do film, Grace Kelly. I doi son credibili comme cobbia sciben che a so caraterizaçion streita a limita l'ampiezza do so talento.

Dògni âtro personaggio o pâ tròppo debole, da-o vice marshal de Billy Howle, Harvey Pell, a l'imprenditrice messicana de Rosa Salazar, Helen, sciben che l'affinitæ tra lê e Amy a l'è rinfrescante, e Roth o dæ ciù voxe e consistença a ste donne in generale.

Quarche canson de Springsteen a porta a so politica americana (da l'ottimismo de frontiera de Land of Hope and Dreams a The Rising, scritta in rispòsta a-o 11 settembù). Quarche d'una a l'è cantâ a cappella, sorvattuttu da-a Gough, ch'a l'è unna brava cantante, a so voxe a trasmette desolaçion, ma a ripete I'm on Fire unna votta de troppo.

A votte o pâ un musical rilucozo, e cansoìn son curte e sutili ma a mûxica de percuscioìn e o sound design son sempre fòrti, comme e lûxe, disegnæ da Neil Austin, ch'apportan ciarezza emotiva e f fascino. Un reuaçio o l'è a-o centro da scenografia de Tim Hatley, ch'o conta o tempo fin a-o rivo do treno e o scontro ch'o ne segue, ch'o riesce a mantegnî tenscion e dramma, sciben l'enorme difficultæ de mettî in scena un scontro a feugo in mezo a-o paise.

Pe via de tutta a so rigidezza de l'iniçio, o piggia slancio e ghe son de mumenti commoventi. Defæti, o messagio politico o l'è quello ch'o parla ciù fòrte, sfrûtando a pùa maccartista de alua e o terrore trumpian de ancheu.

I doi son credibili comme cobbia sciben che a so caraterizaçion streita a limita l'ampiezza do so talento.

Dògni âtro personaggio o pâ tròppo debole, da-o vice marshal de Billy Howle, Harvey Pell, a l'imprenditrice messicana de Rosa Salazar, Helen, sciben che l'affinitæ tra lê e Amy a l'è rinfrescante, e Roth o dæ ciù voxe e consistença a ste donne in generale.

Quarche canson de Springsteen a porta a so politica americana (da l'ottimismo de frontiera de Land of Hope and Dreams a The Rising, scritta in rispòsta a-o 11 settembù). Quarche d'una a l'è cantâ a cappella, sorvattuttu da-a Gough, ch'a l'è unna brava cantante, a so voxe a trasmette desolaçion, ma a ripete I'm on Fire unna votta de troppo.

A votte o pâ un musical rilucozo, e cansoìn son curte e sutili ma a mûxica de percuscioìn e o sound design son sempre fòrti, comme e lûxe, disegnæ da Neil Austin, ch'apportan ciarezza emotiva e fascino. Un rêuzo o l'è a-o centro da scenografia de Tim Hatley, ch'o conta o tempo fin a-o rivo do treno e o scontro ch'o ne segue, ch'o riesce a mantegnî tenscion e dramma, sciben l'enorme difficultæ de mettî in scena un scontro a feugo in mezo a-o paise.

Pe via de tutta a so rigidezza de l'iniçio, o piggia slancio e ghe son de mumenti commoventi. Defæti, o messagio politico o l'è quello ch'o parla ciù fòrte, sfrûtando a pùa maccartista de alua e o terrore trumpian de ancheu.

Com'on se fa a trasformâ un clascico western de Hollywood inte 'n musical do West End? Se ghanzan de cansoìn, de quelle de Bruce Springsteen in de sto caxu, insemme a quarche gio de line dance e a una stella ch'a brûxa comme Billy Crudup. Comme euan de dibattito, scine, a piggia l'energia de una locomotiva mentre a viagia verso o scontro finale tra Frank Miller (James Doherty), ch'o sta pe tornâ in de sto "brutto paesin in mezo a-o nente", e o marshal Will Kane (Crudup) ch'o l'aveiva misso drento. Questo o l'è sorvattuttu pe via de l'attualitæ misteriosa e urgente de sto film do 1952 in sciâ de unna comunitæ ch'a risòlve (o megio, ch'a se darseneustra de) e so responsabilitæ civiche in sce de ingiustiçie de l'istituto.

Questo, aomenu finché o no riva in paise l'avvixo che Miller o sta pe rivâ con o treno do mezogiorno.

I doi son credibili comme cobbia sciben che a so caraterizaçion streita a limita l'ampiezza do so talento.

Dògni âtro personaggio o pâ tròppo debole, da-o vice marshal de Billy Howle, Harvey Pell, a l'imprenditrice messicana de Rosa Salazar, Helen, sciben che l'affinitæ tra lê e Amy a l'è rinfrescante, e Roth o dæ ciù voxe e consistença a ste donne in generale.

Quarche canson de Springsteen a porta a so politica americana (da l'ottimismo de frontiera de Land of Hope and Dreams a The Rising, scritta in rispòsta a-o 11 settembù). Quarche d'una a l'è cantâ a cappella, sorvattuttu da-a Gough, ch'a l'è unna brava cantante, a so voxe a trasmette desolaçion, ma a ripete I'm on Fire unna votta de troppo.

A votte o pâ un musical rilucozo, e cansoìn son curte e sutili ma a mûxica de percuscioìn e o sound design son sempre fòrti, comme e lûxe, disegnæ da Neil Austin, ch'apportan ciarezza emotiva e fascino. Un rêuzo o l'è a-o centro da scenografia de Tim Hatley, ch'o conta o tempo fin a-o rivo do treno e o scontro ch'o ne segue, ch'o riesce a mantegnî tenscion e dramma, sciben l'enorme difficultæ de mettî in scena un scontro a feugo in mezo a-o paise.

Pe via de tutta a so rigidezza de l'iniçio, o piggia slancio e ghe son de mumenti commoventi. Defæti, o messagio politico o l'è quello ch'o parla ciù fòrte, sfrûtando a pùa maccartista de alua e o terrore trumpian de ancheu.

Recenscion de High Noon - Billy Crudup o ripòrta in scena o clascico western de Hollywood con un gran botto

Com'on se fa a trasformâ un clascico western de Hollywood inte 'n musical do West End? Se ghanzan de cansoìn, de quelle de Bruce Springsteen in de sto caxu, insemme a quarche gio de line dance e a una stella ch'a brûxa comme Billy Crudup. Eppû, a l'iniçio a l'è un'esperiença bizzarra mentre a produçion de Thea Sharrock a passa da una breve scena de film a l'âtra, e l'impreza a pâ legnosa comme e ascse de legno do saloon ch'allestisciân o formidabile scenario.

Comme euan de tiatro, a trêuva o so ritmo. Comme euan de dibattito, scine, a piggia l'energia de una locomotiva mentre a viagia verso o scontro finale tra Frank Miller (James Doherty), ch'o sta pe tornâ in de sto "brutto paesin in mezo a-o nente", e o marshal Will Kane (Crudup) ch'o l'aveiva misso drento. Questo o l'è sorvattuttu pe via de l'attualitæ misteriosa e urgente de sto film do 1952 in sciâ de unna comunitæ ch'a risòlve (o megio, ch'a se darseneustra de) e so responsabilitæ civiche in sce de ingiustiçie de l'istituto.

In orizine un'allegoria do maccartismo (o so sceneggiatô, Carl Foreman, o l'era finio in sciâ lista neigra), a stoia a mette a vigliaccheria di tanti contra o coraggio di pochi - in de sto caxu, o sôlo, eroico Kane, ch'o prepaa a so defeisa contro Miller e i so scherani doppo d'ese steto abbandonòu da-a gente do paise. O film o l'era steto criticòu da John Wayne comme anti-american pe-o so ritratto critico de-a comunitæ; a produçion a piggia vitta inte so discuscioìn in sciâ de l'in/açion collettiva e a pâ ch'a parle dritto di dilemmi de l'America cowboy de Trump (a sparatoia de Minneapolis a l'è sôlo l'urtimo eixempio). A sceneggiatûa de Eric Roth a deuvia tante battûe de quella de Foreman ma a dæ ciù corpo a-i dibattiti in sciâ moralitæ de unna comunitæ de fronte a-o mâ e a-i miti american sbaliæ in sciâ de l'immigraçion.

Vigliaccheria di tanti, coraggio di pochi ... o cast de High Noon. Fotografia: Johan Persson

Ghe l'è ascì o talento combinòu de Crudup e de l'agile Denise Gough ch'interpretân a cobbia protagonista o giurnu do so maiæzo. Læ a l'è Amy Fowler, unna quacchera ch'a detesta l'açion di ommi violenti; lù o l'è o marshal ch'o l'ha appeza a so "stella de latta" pe comensâ da capo comme negoziante. Un rêuzo o l'è a-o centro da scenografia de Tim Hatley, ch'o conta o tempo fin a-o rivo do treno e o scontro ch'o ne segue, ch'o riesce a mantegnî tenscion e dramma, sciben l'enorme difficultæ de mettî in scena un scontro a feugo in mezo a-o paise.

Pe via de tutta a so rigidezza de l'iniçio, o piggia slancio e ghe son de mumenti commoventi. Defæti, o messagio politico o l'è quello ch'o parla ciù fòrte, sfrûtando a pùa maccartista de alua e o terrore trumpian de ancheu.

source_doc:
Outside of court a never ending stream of flying monkeys has doxxed, harassed and threatened me and anyone they believe have "helped" me in anyway shape or form.
One flying monkey is the tiktoker Areej "liberationluvr" Hakim who jumped on my ex's public posts, and knows my ex privately.
I'll re-post some of their videos about me with a CW.
But I want to make it clear how much these people wish to erase me and my few accomplishments.
Here's violent threats about a witness in my case.

This tiktoker has made it their PRIMARY content to attempt to dox me, my friends and specifically witnesses to my illegal eviction.
In the video they made about me they attempt to paint me as "not an activist", "not a hacker" and "just a grifter".
ALL because my ex decided that splitting bills while navigating a break constituted domestic violence.
They then call their constant online lynch mob chasing me around "activism" and fund raise off MY pain and court process.
#ParentingWhileBlack

Areej "solidarityluvr" is known locally for posting tiktoks of herself stalking + harassing multiple of her ex's all on her tiktok+IG.
Areej maced a trans librarian, Canyon, ON camera as she got off work likely bc Canyon had to enforce BASIC library rules.
Areej cyberbullied Canyon for months after.
Canyon soon thereafter died of a suspected intentional drug overdose.
Many in the community believe Areej's actions directly contributed to Canyon's death.
THESE are the "friends" my ex keeps.

Anywho... this type of leftist infighting, is the worst portlandia coded telenovela ever.
I've NEVER posted anything at all publicly about Areej till now.
Areej did contact me 2years ago with some infighting, which I immediately DECLINED to be involved with.
I had a few private & community conversations about the issues they raised to ensure a restorative justice process had or would occur.
One had occured and had plenty of support so I bowed out.
This had been the extent of our contact.

At the time I bowed out I warned the community against cyber bullying especially 3rd parties to the initial interpersonal conflict.
This warning was directed to Areej, I felt their cyber bullying ON top of the already existing decisions in their favor was in poor taste.
I especially felt Areej doxxing the restorative justice committee/mediators DURING the process was actively abusive.
I warned specifically about the likelihood of Areej's victims self harming being a real risk.
instruction: You are a professional Ligurian, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ligurian, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ligurian, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ligurian, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ligurian, Italy (lij_Latn):
hypo_0:
Fêua do tribunâ, un flusso continno de schiaviçelli m'à scoverto i dæti personâli (doxxâ), m'à molestòu e m'à minacciòu mì e chiunque pensan ch'o m'agge "agiutòu" in quarsiasi mòddo e forma.
Un de sti schiaviçelli a l'é a tiktoker Areej "liberationluvr" Hakim ch'a s'é scagiâ in scî pòst pùblici do mæ ex, e ch'a conosce o mæ ex de person-a.
Ri-pùblicherò operatingo di sò viddeo scingoli in sciâ mæ persón-a con un'avertensa (CW).
Ma dezo rinfresca l'idêa de quant'o se veu scancellâ mì e i mæ pochi traguardi.
Chi gh'é de minacce violente in sce 'n testimònio into mæ câxo.

Sta tiktoker a l'à fæto diventâ o sò contegnûo PRINCIPÂ o tentatîvo de doxxâ mì, i mæ amixi e in particolâ i testimòni do mæ sfratto ilegâ.
No-o viddeo ch'à fæto in sce mì, a me diponze comme "no 'n'ativista", "no 'n hacker" e "solo un scroccon".
TUTTO sôlo perché o mæ ex o l'à decizo che spartî e tàsce intanto ch'as fâva a separaçion o fîse violensa d'asilo.
Lòoro aloa ciaman o sò linçaggio mediatico ch'o me corre aprêuvo "atîvismo" e fàn de colecte co-o MÆ doçio e co-o mæ procèsso a-o tribunâ.
#ParentingWhileBlack

Areej "solidarityluvr" a l'é conosciûa inta zòna pe-i viddeo in sce Tiktok d'asæ d'indasê e d'arfastidî tòsti ex in sciô sò Tiktok e IG.
Areej a l'à spruzzòu do spray a-o peve a 'na bibliotecaria trans, Canyon, davanti e telecamere mán man ch'a sciortîva do-o lòu, fòscia sôlo perché Canyon a doveva fâ rispetâ de rigolette da biblioteca basiche.
Areej a l'à fætto cyberbullismo contra Canyon pe de meixi de drê.
Pöco dòppo Canyon a l'é mòrta d'en'overdose de droga ch'as pensa fîse de propòsito.
Tanta gente do quartê a pensa che e façende de Areej aggian contriboîto de dirêto a-a mòrte de Canyon.
Gente de STA fata chi son i "amixi" ch'o se tegne o mæ ex.

Ad ògni mòddo... sta rissa interna a-a sinistra a l'é a peggio telenovela in stile Portlandia de de longo.
No gh'ò MAI scrîto ninte de pùblico in sce Areej fìn a òua.
Areej a m'aveva scrîto 2 anni fa pe 'na questión de rissa interna, e mì gh'ò DETTO DE NO sùbito a sciortîghe de drento.
Gh'ò avûo do-e ciaccerâte privæ e de quartê in scê questioìn ch'avevan sollevòu pe fâ in mòddo ch'un processo de giustissia reparatîva o fîse stæto fæto ò o se fîse avvîòu.
Un o l'éra stæto fæto e o gh'aveva tòsto de d'agiuto, donca mì me son tiròu a l'andré.
Questo o l'é stæto tùtto o mæ dâghe de drento con lô.

Inton mæzo ch'ò dæto l'andré, gh'avevo dæto de l'avvîzo a-o quartê contra o cyberbullismo specîalmente verso e terse parti de sta rissa interna primâia.
St'avvîzo o l'éra pe Areej, me pæscéiva che o sò cyberbullismo in sciâ de deçisioìn ch'êan za a sò favô o fîse de cattivo gusto.
Me pæscéiva ascì che o doxxing de Areej contra o comitato/mediatoî de giustissia reparatîva INTANTO ch'as fâva o procèsso o fîse propiamente 'n abuso.
Gh'avevo dæto de l'avvîzo in particolâ che o riscio de fâse do mâ da-e vìtime d'Areej o l'éra 'n riscio fêua de fâbula.

Questo o l'é stæto tùtto o mæ dâghe de drento con lô.

Atôno a-o moménto ch'ò dæto l'andré, gh'avevo dæto de l'avvîzo a-o quartê contra o cyberbullismo specîalmente verso e terse parti de sta rissa interna primâia.
St'avvîzo o l'éra pe Areej, me pæscéiva che o sò cyberbullismo in sciâ de deçisioìn ch'êan za a sò favô o fîse de cattivo gusto.
Me pæscéiva ascì che o doxxing de Areej contra o comitato/mediatoî de giustìssia reparatîva INTANTO ch'as fâva o procèsso o fîse propiamente 'n abuso.
Gh'avevo dæto de l'avvîzo in particolâ che o riscio de fâse do mâ da-e vìtime d'Areej o l'éra 'n riscio reâ.

source_doc:
US bound Thompson stars as Galway reach FBD final

California-bound Matthew Thompson lashed home 2-06 as Galway overcame Leitrim by 11 points in Tuam to book their spot in next week's FBD League decider.

2025 Young Footballer of the Year nominee Thompson will be out of action for the entirety of the league and the early part of the championship, with Padraic Joyce confirming that the Salthill-Knocknacarra players is studying in Berkeley for the upcoming semester.

He was the leading figure on a largely experimental Galway side - which also contained Cian Hernon and Kieran Molloy - as they came from three points down at half-time to beat Leitrim.

Thompson buried a goal in the top corner in the first half but the Connacht champions trailed Leitrim at the break, Killian Gaffney proving effective from placed balls, while Ryan O'Rourke and Jack Kelly also landed points.

Galway manager Padraic Joyce remonstrates with the referee over a decision

However, with Thompson converting a second half penalty, Galway eased home after the interval, with 10 different scorers overall as they ran out 2-19 to 0-14 winners.

After two rounds of the FBD League, the top two progress to next week's final, with Galway facing the winner of tomorrow's Roscommon-Mayo tie.

In Leinster, Westmeath have booked their spot in the O'Byrne Cup final after an 11-point win over Offaly in a goal-fest in Mullingar.

Waiting for them in the decider is a Kildare outfit that defeated Dublin 1-22 to 1-13.

Mark McHugh's Westmeath side advanced ahead of reigning champions Longford following a coin toss last Saturday but they impressed on the field of play on Saturday.

A brace of goals apiece from Danny McCarton and Brandon Kelly, plus another from Senan Baker, saw them run out 5-10 to 2-08 winners.

Ciaran Murphy scored two goals either side of half-time to pull the visitors back into the contest, the margin being briefly reduced to three points 11 minutes into the second half.

However, an unanswered burst of 3-02 over the next 15 minutes saw the hosts settle the contest in an emphatic manner.

Kildare found their feet in the second half against Dublin and now are one game away from a first O'Byrne Cup since 2014.

Harry O'Neill fires to the net for Kildare

Both management teams experimented in Newbridge with Dublin in particular shorn of overly familiar faces, but in the first half it seemed to matter little as they led 1-08 to 0-08 at the break.

Jamie McCarville palmed home their goal but it was Clyde Burke who caught the eye for the travelling support with some brilliant shooting that included two orange flags - the second of which was of the highest quality.

Alex Beirne was racking up the scores for the Lilywhites though and his two-point free early in the second half kick-started a run of 1-05 without reply, Harry O'Neill with the goal in the 43rd minute.

Kildare continued to turn the screw with James Harris' late two-pointer sending them on their way.

hypo_0:
Thompson, in partensa pe-i Stati Unii, o brilla mentre o Galway o razunze a finale de FBD

Matthew Thompson, in partensa pe-a California, o l'ha marcao 2-06 mentre o Galway o l'ha superao o Leitrim pe 11 punti a Tuam, assigurandose un posto inta finale de l'FBD League da proscima settemann-a.

Thompson, candidato a Zovegno Zogao de Pallon de l'Annan 2025, o sajâ feua zeugo pe tutta a durata do campionao e pe-a primma parte do torneo, co-o Padraic Joyce ch'o l'ha confermao che o zogao do Salthill-Knocknacarra o studiâ a Berkeley pe-o proscimo semestre.

O l'è steto a figua de spicco de 'na squaddra do Galway in gran parte sperimentale - ch'a comprendeva ascì Cian Hernon e Kieran Molloy - mentre recuperavan da un svantaggio de trei punti a l'intervallo pe batte o Leitrim.

Thompson o l'ha infillao 'n gol inte l'angolo ato do primmo tempo, ma i campiun do Connacht davan de l'arretrao a-o Leitrim a l'intervallo, co-o Killian Gaffney ch'o s'è dimostrao efficace da-e punicioin, mentre ascì Ryan O'Rourke e Jack Kelly han marcao di punti.

L'allenatô do Galway Padraic Joyce o protesta co-a terna arbitrale pe 'na deçixion

Tuttavia, co-o Thompson ch'o l'ha transformao un rigore into secondo tempo, o Galway o l'ha avuo vita façile doppo l'intervallo, con 10 marcatu diversi in totale, finendo pe guaagnâ 2-19 a 0-14.

Doppo doî turni de FBD League, e prime doe se qualifican pe-a finale da proscima settemann-a, co-o Galway ch'o sfidiâ o vinçitô do scontro de doman tra Roscommon e Mayo.

A-o Leinster, o Westmeath o l'ha assigurao o so posto inta finale de l'O'Byrne Cup doppo 'na vittoria pe 11 punti in sciâ squaddra de l'Offaly inte 'na partia ricca de gol a Mullingar.

A spetâli inta finale ghe sajâ o Kildare, ch'o l'ha batto o Dublin 1-22 a 1-13.

A squaddra do Westmeath de Mark McHugh a l'era anæta avanti rispetto a-i campiun in càrega do Longford graçie a-o lancio de 'na munaia o sâbbo passao, ma o sâbbo han imprescionao in sciô campo de zeugo.

Una doppietta de gol a testa pe Danny McCarton e Brandon Kelly, ciù un atro de Senan Baker, han visto a squaddra vinçe pe 5-10 a 2-08.

Ciaran Murphy o l'ha segnao doî gol a-i lati de l'intervallo pe rinfiancâ i ospiti inta disputa, co-o margene ch'o l'è steto reduto pe un mumentin a trei punti a-o menuto 11 do secondo tempo.

Tuttavia, un parçiale de 3-02 sensa risposta inti 15 menuti consecutivi o l'ha dæto a-i padroin de casa a poscibilitæ de chioe a partia in modo netto.

O Kildare o l'ha retrovao o ritmo into secondo tempo contro o Dublin e patches are doua a un solo scontro da-a so primma O'Byrne Cup doppo o 2014.

Harry O'Neill o calcia a-a ræ pe-o Kildare

Entrambe e squaddre de gestion han sperimentao a Newbridge, co-o Dublin in particolâ privo de facce tròppo famigiæ, ma into primmo tempo questo o l'ha parsciù contâ de ræo mentre guidavan pe 1-08 a 0-08 a l'intervallo.

Jamie McCarville o l'ha buttao dentro de man o so gol, ma o l'è steto Clyde Burke a catturâ l'atencion di tifoxi in trasferta con di tiri splendidi che includevan doe bandee arancie - de quæ a segonda a l'era de grandisima qualitæ.

Alex Beirne o l'era drê a accumulâ i punti pe-i Lilywhites però, e a so puniçion de doî punti a l'inissio do secondo tempo a l'ha dæto o via a un parçiale de 1-05 sensa replica, con Harry O'Neill ch'o l'ha segnao o gol a-o menuto 43.

O Kildare o l'ha continuao a sciaccâ o pè in sce l'açeleratô co-o tardivo tiro da doî punti de James Harris ch'o l'ha indirisao a partia.
